President Biden, Senator Schumer, and other Senate Democrats introduced a new bill called The No Kings Act. 2. The No Kings Act would hold Trump accountable for his crimes – including his 34 felony convictions. 3. The corruption that has taken place in the Supreme Court – especially under this conservative majority – will finally be CHECKED. 4. As a result, Trump’s conservative justices are SCARED about their power being reduced. 5\. Republicans HATE this bill, and want to defeat it at all costs. [That’s why we need to raise $75,000 before Trump takes office. If we miss this goal, we won’t have enough support to show how important the No Kings Act is. We’ve got to have a show of strength to show Trump that we’re holding him accountable in his second administration! Will you rush a donation RIGHT NOW?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9aaee56d-34b1-4355-bdb1-891b3c8d3883/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Jim Jordan
subject: I went into the belly of the beast…
body:
Following our historic Republican victory.

Following our historic Republican victory.
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6d9155032776439dbdad71bc12c00d8c&_e=1f5_9syG5up_FUcaJCjLB_GaWIowHOAb_X5TQvtrsdoRLHSGk2BfuSMosm8Vx6laCQeLa4WIaP9hum7iQg5QDSO7bvqk5zihyMOY43IYAYP7Va2bfCleDSlsS-0_Kxq6pQC0lOD7Ew0SGjkGwnPvvwjiZXWEqbe088EkLlS7ykNmQZ810ORXSaXy7qCrthTFLSkTWsnkT9A3cHRlUeoJdSfVRkKnKwl-89-59sWfFs3gwJKuU10wTTQdr-RvG5kObfMdYNOGgqj3h5VXji2cvZr5ZIfr8Q4U4WsxveG-257NTJw6oqlMV-JMnoh1Q0rwlc0CNhyyV5Lo9-aFTUoKJXMO9yylHQUWVzFgx3RY-SI%3D)
---
Friend,
---
By sending President Trump back to the White House, flipping the Senate, and defending our House majority, voters like you delivered a clear message:
---
You asked us to clean house in Washington so that __your__ government would once again work for __you__ - the _PEOPLE_.
---
But there are those on the Left who - despite such a historic mandate from voters - would still have you believe that putting our country and _American_ citizens first is "extreme."
---
**_That 's why I marched right into the belly of the beast on _CNN_ following the election to combat their lies and false narratives about voters like you, Friend._**
---

### 7 Secrets About Hiring a Financial Advisor
Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But [choosing the wrong one](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-VOx3O6_QMnZKftyVB1_Fw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJEt8P0TLaHR0cHM6Ly9hcnRpY2xlcy5zbWFydGFzc2V0LmNvbS9maW5hbmNpYWwtYWR2aXNvci1zZWNyZXRzL3V4L3NlY3JldHMucGhwP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmFpbm1ha2VyJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1ybWFfX2ZhbGNfY29udGVudF9mYXNlY3JldHMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9N19zZWNyZXRzX2xpc3RfcmFscGgmdXRtX3Rlcm09cG9wXzExMDEyNGJfUk0tQ0ItMjAyNDExMjNXA3NwY0IKZz-XtEFnkS1kBVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) could potentially wreak havoc on your retirement. A 2022 Northwestern Mutual study found that 62% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 35% of Americans work with a financial advisor.1 While advisors are prohibited from promising returns, research suggests that people work with a financial advisor:
* Feel more at ease about their finances, and
* Could end up with 15% [more money to spend in retirement](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-VOx3O6_QMnZKftyVB1_Fw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJEt8P0TLaHR0cHM6Ly9hcnRpY2xlcy5zbWFydGFzc2V0LmNvbS9maW5hbmNpYWwtYWR2aXNvci1zZWNyZXRzL3V4L3NlY3JldHMucGhwP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmFpbm1ha2VyJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1ybWFfX2ZhbGNfY29udGVudF9mYXNlY3JldHMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9N19zZWNyZXRzX2xpc3RfcmFscGgmdXRtX3Rlcm09cG9wXzExMDEyNGJfUk0tQ0ItMjAyNDExMjNXA3NwY0IKZz-XtEFnkS1kBVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~).2

Answer a few questions to get matched with up to three vetted financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform have been rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and are legally bound to work in your best interest.

| The information contained in this article is general and not specific to any individual's situation. The SmartAsset quiz matches you with up to 3 financial advisors to which you can compare and decide which to work with. This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances.

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0a354c4dea6460aa22f91361539469d&_e=HnRvuWw8mW2ZEI5Kn64M6uI9lhr7D6TmON5UJ_MNSjhSNRRSCgXhpl-HMwnsJMoG6w_GM13al52oIInOnfLikb1WO9SvlrO_j6cofuZYedRUKoR9CG6anPWvgUYn4jHNYwTFRLNacwIS_xF6-5sdiAoYJX-cyeRJWutLE1J94fWnCi6TIkJwfTguHlNh_qx_qz0icC46TLWduI0flzIADqXEkPwJV2-rdCtVj2pDBFxozYTvU-Vu4ML8K711D4kSun_rOLqiKZEe4Afea-Hpbli66uN-FPVaQcSxiJRSCYErK32391GXz8ANPDAhviR1pX5leJ9ZrVsJntf5g1ImdQGrpm0Cac11MRn624_2sbMzSpliP0-ETfvpUV_ZjSV7TcmDoEo2j0V6q6xo6BrXWw%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0a354c4dea6460aa22f91361539469d&_e=HnRvuWw8mW2ZEI5Kn64M6uI9lhr7D6TmON5UJ_MNSjhSNRRSCgXhpl-HMwnsJMoG6w_GM13al52oIInOnfLikb1WO9SvlrO_j6cofuZYedRUKoR9CG6anPWvgUYn4jHNYwTFRLNacwIS_xF6-5sdiAoYJX-cyeRJWutLE1J94fWnCi6TIkJwfTguHlNh_qx_qz0icC46TLWduI0flzIADqXEkPwJV2-rdCtVj2pDBFxozYTvU-Vu4ML8K711D4kSijRyfoq7p3MXrx9VT8PqoA9qwqKGVdScJFbTRROFdcogA7ZE7mx-i98NInr2I6sH6_d_dt3a7VokhH6g_S_eyeZDtxOXqr99GBbKP9dv5D6IX48_3e9K4tOCc_Iq_gVaX_-VaHQFRchUTtc6BELB6Q%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0a354c4dea6460aa22f91361539469d&_e=HnRvuWw8mW2ZEI5Kn64M6uI9lhr7D6TmON5UJ_MNSjhSNRRSCgXhpl-HMwnsJMoG6w_GM13al52oIInOnfLikb1WO9SvlrO_j6cofuZYedRUKoR9CG6anPWvgUYn4jHNYwTFRLNacwIS_xF6-5sdiAoYJX-cyeRJWutLE1J94fWnCi6TIkJwfTguHlNh_qx_qz0icC46TLWduI0flzIADqXEkPwJV2-rdCtVj2pDBFxozYTvU-Vu4ML8K711D4kSiElZb73NkI17cY4fUg_jAhqXKG__7_ZZ9u4zUjq4lckNMLxNYIT3PINzOJRzkilhMsX9GIBu8z6s90LeSO9dg5Cjv_qiJ84UOmij6nDHK_J3sf0R-a9ZF7H8eHCPheQaNTbaIJ73M2-hsWi2SyMRsQ%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=b0a354c4dea6460aa22f91361539469d&_t=qTGusn1elriovWMaWuG-0JDo55qWVH5_cf-1ZijLeSvLPGf8XylA_XOfnBCtbGLzcS8OY3e1ugvkXf8V8Vgt2pQgeKPgRCIqgkeu0t8OzMqjSHgvWejpjDKPGbQ5tgqpMBcWWzfZ8G8vuAz0vtSjdBOqy1klIkM3Q1Aw01ol6iw%3D)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: They’ve seized all my money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.

But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49a430f644204ec8adf9b4da49a84d06&_e=52NpY-OCx5sy2b7zsyxrwXOiewmFa8lUvluEkCD85MCvRpUI2SnJTRMnn-6ZE4NLmHf2vvEH--g6tQBhqCQH3OCAoJ-DrFSfCnX77EiIVOH3we-BPA0cByKygI8Gl29i4iRKoj2mOZJygd55YQ6xpap55PZ5zSeWDzmAMxw33feUOwC2K9nZsvMwz1XjqPTRANgo7CLu1idDPIyHh9KtsVPGIqPO5xDgIEs24mtVXt35C3a89yjqr9axyRE9x_f4nvw_uxosJ9ayrZKNbilflR-L0CTrMCQFRVNlGRnOJlP8gBCahFmiVZf6xQeNnsfApfCJyQuciHhnUW5hvD_fBbU5BAquNoVDPUC-HHEoc7Wk0h-OilFGQVNEofFGBEsITJkhc_PErRDi2Qye2OdL-Q%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account.
---
Imagine all of your money being seized.
---
__That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me.__
---
I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...
---
As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been __taken away__ from me!
---
But there’s one thing I want to make clear...
---
...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
_**That’s a LIE.**_
---
The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that.
---
And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story.
---
But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund, because even after EVERYTHING the Left has done to me, I will _NEVER_ SURRENDER the fight for freedom and justice. **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49a430f644204ec8adf9b4da49a84d06&_e=52NpY-OCx5sy2b7zsyxrwXOiewmFa8lUvluEkCD85MCvRpUI2SnJTRMnn-6ZE4NLmHf2vvEH--g6tQBhqCQH3OCAoJ-DrFSfCnX77EiIVOH3we-BPA0cByKygI8Gl29i4iRKoj2mOZJygd55YQ6xpap55PZ5zSeWDzmAMxw33feUOwC2K9nZsvMwz1XjqPTRANgo7CLu1idDPIyHh9KtsVPGIqPO5xDgIEs24mtVXt35C3a89yjqr9axyRE9x_f4EyUJJRcBILR5JVpA8ZgU49bLeXCo_mzPFmYfQhcjaN6qFhdA7e2HOyAGt5EYMA1ERTghlmUnX89-4KjsnKopk-OgZtBFA8AnjupLz20qke7-DTjGVmJTyI-v5M-UUgZ7tYUkMLskwxOqpk6KySAXrw%3D%3D)

clean_body: But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice. But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice. | Dear Friend, Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account. Imagine all of your money being seized. That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me. I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH... As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been taken away from me! But there’s one thing I want to make clear... ...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust. That’s a LIE. The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that. And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story. But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just my own freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Joe Biden's brutal Department of Justice helped kill Stephanie Baez's babies ... and now they want to throw her in prison.

Let me tell you, Stephanie is a happy, beautiful young woman you'd want as your friend or next door neighbor.

All she wanted was to start a family, and help heal sick people. She applied to medical school to make that dream come true.

Like many other patriots, Stephanie peacefully protested outside the US Capitol on January 6, 2021.

And like many other patriots, she peacefully entered the Capitol for just a few minutes.

She wasn't violent. She didn't destroy any property.

**Stephanie peacefully took a stand for fair, honest elections. But Joe Biden 's DOJ went after her like she was Public Enemy #1!**

First, they charged her with four misdemeanors. And they turned up the pressure to force her into pleading guilty and taking a plea deal.

But she refused to knuckle under.

**The DOJ was outraged. So they charged Stephanie with a felony that could put her in prison for 20 years!**

As you can imagine, this terrified her.

What's more, the brutal stress of facing 20 years in prison for a crime she didn't commit destroyed her health.

**Since 2022, Stephanie has endured 10 surgeries. She lost two of her babies in miscarriages. And now she faces a vicious show trial on December 3 rd.**

But there's something you can do about it.

I'm John Pierce, founder of National Constitutional Law Union.

Right now, NCLU represents 50 clients who peacefully protested at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021.

**I 'm proud to say President Trump has endorsed our legal fight for January 6 prisoners. Because he knows we're beating Joe Biden's Department of Justice and FBI in case after case:**

We fought like devil dogs for our client, Kenneth Joseph Thomas, and WE WON!

Another January 6 client of ours, Dominic Pezzola, was found NOT GUILTY of committing seditious conspiracy.

**In fact, we 've defeated 23 charges against our 50 January 6 clients so far!**

And while we're excited about our hard won victories, we know Joe Biden and his lawless DOJ are pulling out all the stops to railroad Stephanie and other innocent Americans we're defending in court.

**NCLU is fighting for them because they deserve a strong defense, and because Joe Biden will turn his DOJ and FBI loose on you and me, our families, and other patriots if we don 't defeat them in court.**

The stakes couldn't be higher.

**[Patriot, please help NCLU defend Stephanie and our other innocent clients with your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right now.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c2ecebb7f4494e9c9532316b021aff72&_e=AQIOLpA1mEoxmbGjA7oLFb65uOSB8sfPPsMy5FFlDb86AEQTo4a789lsghFYtqQfFY_up8YBrCWmSzOVhKOzED9lj3NaC5KoR3C5GVPFOdsU6kArEkjQW0a--BDlBoQLHB2d-18nC74sugIk8aKnOMxI4rDDnzAlHzA4ydr0ndVnAEfOIoATt1m-fgcSAEuJIXHMJh0orFu4bokOtgon88vzrlr1WAYgDp96Y8w5NWHj_uKEOJcUZU_NFje7Z5dBrQiRDcN9duwN0wtUwnSsAsoIi_iUDME01L1jBj9g2D_BLcDqf6AQQ9GjkG05YkFPUCcbAxWF5yziYPBCr6IEPgm5vz4iGFdZODxRP6Rl2m2DmyVn58MVWskqB6k8S6A2CbnuEcjZlrUcwj34VddBBQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Joe Biden's brutal Department of Justice helped kill Stephanie Baez's babies ... and now they want to throw her in prison. Dear Patriot, Joe Biden's brutal Department of Justice helped kill Stephanie Baez's babies ... and now they want to throw her in prison. Let me tell you, Stephanie is a happy, beautiful young woman you'd want as your friend or next door neighbor. All she wanted was to start a family, and help heal sick people. She applied to medical school to make that dream come true. Like many other patriots, Stephanie peacefully protested outside the US Capitol on January 6, 2021. And like many other patriots, she peacefully entered the Capitol for just a few minutes. She wasn't violent. She didn't destroy any property. Stephanie peacefully took a stand for fair, honest elections. But Joe Biden 's DOJ went after her like she was Public Enemy #1! First, they charged her with four misdemeanors. And they turned up the pressure to force her into pleading guilty and taking a plea deal. But she refused to knuckle under. The DOJ was outraged. So they charged Stephanie with a felony that could put her in prison for 20 years! As you can imagine, this terrified her. What's more, the brutal stress of facing 20 years in prison for a crime she didn't commit destroyed her health. Since 2022, Stephanie has endured 10 surgeries. She lost two of her babies in miscarriages. And now she faces a vicious show trial on December 3 rd. But there's something you can do about it. I'm John Pierce, founder of National Constitutional Law Union. Right now, NCLU represents 50 clients who peacefully protested at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021. I 'm proud to say President Trump has endorsed our legal fight for January 6 prisoners. Because he knows we're beating Joe Biden's Department of Justice and FBI in case after case: We fought like devil dogs for our client, Kenneth Joseph Thomas, and WE WON! Another January 6 client of ours, Dominic Pezzola, was found NOT GUILTY of committing seditious conspiracy. In fact, we 've defeated 23 charges against our 50 January 6 clients so far! And while we're excited about our hard won victories, we know Joe Biden and his lawless DOJ are pulling out all the stops to railroad Stephanie and other innocent Americans we're defending in court. NCLU is fighting for them because they deserve a strong defense, and because Joe Biden will turn his DOJ and FBI loose on you and me, our families, and other patriots if we don 't defeat them in court. The stakes couldn't be higher. Frankly, we're stretched to the absolute breaking point. There's too much critical work to do, and not enough lawyers, paralegal, secretaries, and more to do it. Don't miss out on helping these patriots get freed from prison! Thank you! In Vigilance, John M. Pierce Chairman and Founder National Constitutional Law Union P.S. ## NATO and Ukraine to Hold Emergency Talks
NATO and Ukrainian officials [will hold emergency talks](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OszAQAJ8GOiP8E4wLF1-TLl97JVrwEvYwNrKdWLz9KddfPxqN5usxPYA8hed_ONCWNU6iF4pxzoScHJC_JtU6uyIKlC1arqWQA78NY7vZxQ2rGzXOCvplHld0g9LKOD3OUhkhW7IfG-dCci6M1B3AfOuNNgOsTqoRG9WjoxJT9x0plA1Xf8U3pm6JR-vtVsqZG_mvEfdG3GutXcCaK-L-ARpxD1AiwwPTE8NysQJ-zyy9ciZg23ViyjHQwg7KmTwyKAWWnb32BBSQcWN6rsY2WXdW8p7yoBvVPw8g_1tQ_jrytuInAAD__6dtZUQ) Tuesday after Russia escalated hostilities with an alleged hypersonic missile strike on a military facility in Dnipro last Thursday. Ukrainian officials stated [the missile that struck](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp_G3ojggsEeGLpkS9eO1g1cktviHwFJlLev3L3jp086Ojpfl_mCnHm9feJCvqVtBglGKCVAzxE5v2fTR5-IgHRPXjkN2qrBjv3dKzBjci46GyJd5UjODhFDuI6DJZSmZ3_QlAKtFEzanRCvg5zcZDFFbUbqjKTIbSun743XdqeU39uTyilsS5_9vbW9dvqjg3MHZ9xXetXjOkZpHDJ1cC6PWhnF46cgryReWMTCtXImsWPJjAutTUTtTAxjQJnQgiXrTIQpJqkCTUOIffFxf3HOXK3rjLwtyPlPo_2X5enhNwAA___QdGTX) Dnipro reached Mach 11 and carried six non-nuclear warheads, each releasing six submunitions on impact. President Vladimir Putin confirmed Russia used [its newly developed hypersonic](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOszAQBOCngc7IXhMTChd_Q5e_vRIteAl7GBvZTlDe_sT11430SaPRfD3GB7Ln8PyPO9myxBEktEIpAXp0yP4ztrWzCxGQrsmqToM26mbu9WqdnLVBY_pFoZy0BOdmh4BEpl9uE9RsrzalQCsFve4axOkm-643uDjd3qlqJTkuMTXfkUNZafGf-KbUzHGvvV1LOXKl_1UwVDCc59mEaQ505ssrGK54QUzeVTAcr8JBbLyLsibCksVGdIgjUc6vRGL78FucRJugPKPHwjFkkeaA6q60bOtk3XGy95xNV7XyuSP73ynlr2veFn4CAAD__ztKaFA) "Oreshnik" ballistic missile in retaliation for Kyiv's use of U.S. and British long-range missiles, claiming it is impossible to intercept. U.S. [officials say](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGuozAQAL8GOiN7TSAULq6hy7VXogWvw94ZO2JNOP7-Ka9_9Uij0fx5TA_kyOn5GzdyJeQJNLTKGAV28sjxmtrau0AEZGtyprdgO3Pr7vXqwIcAeDeBBtJ69i15fZtpXtqZgrZzze5jMwasMTDYvkGcb3rohw6Dt-2dqlaT55L35m_mVFYK8cpv2pslb3V0aykvqeyvCsYKxvM8m5D_JzrlwysYD6lgTHSq_RBhTGpjEY6kDiGv8ImcpKjj346cSKVc1Hq9aJeceFGeAiUhlUPghTGKErzq3fnXyTGydH3V6ueGHL9ryk933g6-AgAA__-G4muP) that the Russian missile did not reach NASA's definition of hypersonic speed--Mach 5.
## Poll: Majority of Country Approves of Trump
A Pew Research Center [survey released Friday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O8yAQAJ8GOiJY8F9B8TXu8rVXWsQs8Z4wIEwc-e1Puf7qkWak-bovd0eR0vO_29G2kBeQYIRSAvTiHcVrMdzbgAioOVo1aNC96vqRb3YNoIYOvFaPCXpl3GjMKKe1k94HGQIn-7EpBVopmPRwc-7RyWmYehe8NiMyI9FTy_X2nSm1DUO88on1tuadR7u1Vg6m_zGYGcxtw41i_DAG85Z3TPg-GMzO75ToaNU1yonB3ElpRgmi06JgXTE14Uqp-USRg2j1tRdRokuHKPgWx6ueeDGYebW-vClGOvqBGfncHf3mePtrzWnhJwAA___Sp2ZT) revealed that more than half of the country approves of President-elect Trump's plans and policies for his upcoming second administration. Trump received positive feedback in several areas, including foreign policy, immigration, and the economy, where nearly 60% expressed confidence in his economic decision-making. A majority of respondents now have a favorable opinion of Trump's post-election conduct, increasing from 28% in 2020 to 53% today. Overall, the percentage of Americans, post-election, satisfied with the country's direction has increased since October, rising from 23% to 29%. [You can see the survey results here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uxCAQhJ8Gd1hm8d8VFGncXdqU1oKXMwk2CPBZfvvI6dON9Ekzo-_rOT_Rebe_PnEjVWyYoYGWC8FBzgs6f81ttShLBCQrUmKQIHvR9WO1KjC26_RghO3HtreIxmijG60XPUo5YuXU3SYESCHgIYcaUXfNY3j0aBfZjsTahhZXQqq_g9vLStZf4U2pNmGrvFpLiZnJDwYTg-k8zzrSmSgTJrPWIb0YTDF4V5zJDKZ7jMEkxJ3hZof2zvAdUwqnvzjGmMKbMg-Wl3RsMfPocc98C7lwTMTzD8XiDHq-Ej-d9_zYnb14WYmbcOwlXQymKqkl3tTlfmBt89rQ-b_P5T-HbwW_AQAA__8oOXaX).
## List: America's 20 Deadliest Animals
A list of the [nation's 20 most dangerous](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAQQL8Gb7Z8BwYyMHTxlq4drUs4HFpsIqBx8_dVund_ek96H-flTDHFfX2njV0LecERVQ_Qo1w8xfRcVOddYEaWHTswEqWGSdvu5rQMQQNAQHXxxoAFO9rpqk2QZCVAF93LBoASAE_SDESXaTyZk6bgpbIs1Mg-tlyGzxz3duOQnvnBZbjmrUvu1tq9CvkmcBY4H8cxpPxg_rmnXOK-viiB80opcXmmWJvAWU5KWhQ4F9q_2Pe0cYlXqv2Wa-s97SuX_F172uNGqXbF-fsRU4pVG6HGdaOY_vLtvx0Ph78BAAD___YpYpQ) creatures has ranked deer as America's deadliest animal, responsible for far more injuries and fatalities than any predator. An analysis of official stats on animal interactions, attacks, and fatalities found deer cause 59,000 injuries and 440 deaths annually, with most fatalities from vehicle collisions, though rare direct attacks can occur during mating season. Dogs, often called man's best friend, ranked second on the list, causing over 4.5 million bites annually, with at least 100 proving fatal. Rattlesnakes, livestock, and hornets round out the top five, with grizzly bears, alligators, and great white sharks ranking seventh, eighth, and sixteenth, respectively. [You can see the full list here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAQQL8Gb7Z8BwYyMHTxlq4drUs4HFpsIqBx8_dVund_ek96H-flTDHFfX2njV0LecERVQ_Qo1w8xfRcVOddYEaWHTswEqWGSdvu5rQMQQNAQHXxxoAFO9rpqk2QZCVAF93LBoASAE_SDESXaTyZk6bgpbIs1Mg-tlyGzxz3duOQnvnBZbjmrUvu1tq9CvkmcBY4H8cxpPxg_rmnXOK-viiB80opcXmmWJvAWU5KWhQ4F9q_2Pe0cYlXqv2Wa-s97SuX_F172uNGqXbF-fsRU4pVG6HGdaOY_vLtvx0Ph78BAAD___YpYpQ).

clean_body: NATO and Ukrainian officials Tuesday after Russia escalated hostilities with a hypersonic missile strike on a military facility in Dnipro last Thursday. | | | | | | Saturday, November 23, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1936, the first issue of the pictorial magazine Life was published, featuring a cover photo of the Fort Peck Dam's spillway by Margaret Bourke-White. You can see the complete . In today's edition, we have an item on Wayne , the harvested from a remote Alaskan island and shipped nearly 5,000 miles by boat and truck to be the nation's Christmas tree. Get all the details on the holiday journey below. We're sponsored today by , offering tips to help you get the best sleep of your life. | NATO and Ukraine to Hold Emergency Talks NATO and Ukrainian officials Tuesday after Russia escalated hostilities with an alleged hypersonic missile strike on a military facility in Dnipro last Thursday. Ukrainian officials stated Dnipro reached Mach 11 and carried six non-nuclear warheads, each releasing six submunitions on impact. President Vladimir Putin confirmed Russia used "Oreshnik" ballistic missile in retaliation for Kyiv's use of U.S. and British long-range missiles, claiming it is impossible to intercept. U.S. that the Russian missile did not reach NASA's definition of hypersonic speed--Mach 5. Poll: Majority of Country Approves of Trump A Pew Research Center revealed that more than half of the country approves of President-elect Trump's plans and policies for his upcoming second administration. Trump received positive feedback in several areas, including foreign policy, immigration, and the economy, where nearly 60% expressed confidence in his economic decision-making. A majority of respondents now have a favorable opinion of Trump's post-election conduct, increasing from 28% in 2020 to 53% today. Overall, the percentage of Americans, post-election, satisfied with the country's direction has increased since October, rising from 23% to 29%. . List: America's 20 Deadliest Animals A list of the creatures has ranked deer as America's deadliest animal, responsible for far more injuries and fatalities than any predator. An analysis of official stats on animal interactions, attacks, and fatalities found deer cause 59,000 injuries and 440 deaths annually, with most fatalities from vehicle collisions, though rare direct attacks can occur during mating season. Dogs, often called man's best friend, ranked second on the list, causing over 4.5 million bites annually, with at least 100 proving fatal. Rattlesnakes, livestock, and hornets round out the top five, with grizzly bears, alligators, and great white sharks ranking seventh, eighth, and sixteenth, respectively. . | ➤ A New York judge on Friday indefinitely postponed the sentencing of President-elect Donald Trump in his criminal case, allowing his attorneys to file motions to dismiss the 34-count conviction. () ➤ Former Rep. Matt Gaetz announced Friday that he will not rejoin Congress after withdrawing from attorney general consideration but plans to support the incoming Trump administration in another role. () ➤ The House passed H.R. 9495 on Thursday, authorizing the treasury secretary to revoke tax-exempt status for nonprofits supporting terrorism. The bill now heads to the Senate. () ➤ Mississippi's public university governing board voted Thursday to remove the word "diversity" from several policies, including one requiring evaluations of university presidents on campus diversity outcomes. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤ Traditional social media promised connection but left many feeling isolated and drained. Bigger than social media, it's your digital Christian community. # **ICC Issues Arrest Warrants in Israel-Gaza Conflict**
---
| | | | | [ ](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vikhp-jabeaq-kyd76rh3/)
---
| | | | The International Criminal Court (ICC) issued arrest warrants for Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, former Defense Minister Yoav Gallant, and a Hamas official, citing war crimes and crimes against humanity in the ongoing Gaza conflict. This bold move reinforces the ICC’s mission to defend human rights, even as over 44,000 lives have been lost in Gaza. The ICC is standing up for human rights, as it was designed to do. It is shameful how the United States government—Democrats and Republicans alike, including President Biden—has responded to the ICC. President Biden has yet to grasp the situation in Gaza or come to terms with the responsibility of the U.S. government in aiding and abetting this genocide. The ICC’s actions mark a critical step in holding leaders accountable for atrocities, but real justice requires global cooperation and moral courage. As the United States continues to shield its ally from accountability, it is imperative to demand a shift in policy that aligns with the principles of justice and human rights. The world is watching, and history will judge those who stand on the wrong side of humanity.

subject: Our culture has a sick hatred for integrity and achievement
body:
Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

|
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kTsf_MztW1oPJZJ_ECue5Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJFnIP0RbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTIzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvblcDc3BjQgpnP8HBQWeWrzgpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Friend,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven’t heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I’ve never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to “cancel” me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I’ve ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization’s top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. **[Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kTsf_MztW1oPJZJ_ECue5Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJFnIP0RbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTIzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvblcDc3BjQgpnP8HBQWeWrzgpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**
[Donate >>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kTsf_MztW1oPJZJ_ECue5Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJFnIP0RbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTIzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvblcDc3BjQgpnP8HBQWeWrzgpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I’ve EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That’s where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand’s _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand’s role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That’s where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for “ _skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_.” **Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos — every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The “Draw My Life” videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand’s shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like “Morals & Markets.”

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand’s philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt’s Gulch Summit, where I spoke!). Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. [Donate $10 >>>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/L3UWp1lo99xuJhyMfmXLrA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJFnIP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTIzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvbiZhbW91bnQ9MTBXA3NwY0IKZz_BwUFnlq84KVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

[Donate $500 >>>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/TB1wlr3UYLfucrR1VlwvGw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJFnIP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTIzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvbiZhbW91bnQ9NTAwVwNzcGNCCmc_wcFBZ5avOClSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
[Donate $1,000 >>>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/OKzMsN8UDW0lKPj5P1LXcw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJFnIP0RnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTIzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvbiZhbW91bnQ9MTAwMFcDc3BjQgpnP8HBQWeWrzgpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
[Donate Any Amount >>>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kTsf_MztW1oPJZJ_ECue5Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJFnIP0RbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTIzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvblcDc3BjQgpnP8HBQWeWrzgpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR:
* Free market capitalism
* Rational self-interest
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST:
* Cancel Culture
* Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism
* Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas
* Big government

I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount.

As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000.

[Here is the link to donate one more time.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kTsf_MztW1oPJZJ_ECue5Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJFnIP0RbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTIzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvblcDc3BjQgpnP8HBQWeWrzgpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Thank you for everything,

James O’Keefe

P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society’s top student leaders.
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kTsf_MztW1oPJZJ_ECue5Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJFnIP0RbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTIzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvblcDc3BjQgpnP8HBQWeWrzgpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity.

Well, NOT these students.

The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same.

[Please take action by making a donation to The Atlas Society today. You can click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kTsf_MztW1oPJZJ_ECue5Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJFnIP0RbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90aGUtYXRsYXMtc29jaWV0eS9wYS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMTIzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXJvblcDc3BjQgpnP8HBQWeWrzgpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Thank you,

James

### 7 Secrets About Hiring a Financial Advisor
Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But [choosing the wrong one](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0f2357a8cf1400aaad302388decac7f&_e=924CjEPhWhVT07nAkoCb8oavVnsvsTv5xso9ON8rrBMN615WIdVa1gWbtWibAEimjoOezCW59r54y_kBns3KDR316JBKKSEy9TvCvhpng2r7Qothc2cUaIYuYTQhZMjfUTFj04MYBwYMkC9Owv2OubmoM7JqCjxbaGdt7X7Xp0q9q56gkDzCpu_I6rRCyO2NmnMQdy3dVSEFSac4B7ikObF8Os3g_99sHYUD4hYDm9F80zic9cWBLqVOQbQ18MUD6YjesBGU05L-LWtShhk966glx4xs4FXZD6SfbHI6GowUGI-KyqT3AjwNaT2nSSUuno131t4GdRyC3sn70VMFAT2-mEhs5pT4vx8RZikADbnejtpjuDhMMtdGVW0435otx9MqQg24cIC-173pNsv3zHSErcFUur_M1giar0ww6H5TAQGJU3cF-YapCIzER72t) could potentially wreak havoc on your retirement. A 2022 Northwestern Mutual study found that 62% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 35% of Americans work with a financial advisor.1 While advisors are prohibited from promising returns, research suggests that people work with a financial advisor:
* Feel more at ease about their finances, and
* Could end up with 15% [more money to spend in retirement](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0f2357a8cf1400aaad302388decac7f&_e=924CjEPhWhVT07nAkoCb8oavVnsvsTv5xso9ON8rrBMN615WIdVa1gWbtWibAEimjoOezCW59r54y_kBns3KDR316JBKKSEy9TvCvhpng2r7Qothc2cUaIYuYTQhZMjfUTFj04MYBwYMkC9Owv2OubmoM7JqCjxbaGdt7X7Xp0q9q56gkDzCpu_I6rRCyO2NmnMQdy3dVSEFSac4B7ikObF8Os3g_99sHYUD4hYDm9F80zic9cWBLqVOQbQ18MUD6YjesBGU05L-LWtShhk966glx4xs4FXZD6SfbHI6GozgcXOLIS8UlMS_JFJ28Bg9nqk6YQAXHlQlFM0JPljKkjUJkwBKlrvqSNRhAFcIwVPfgLO4I8kKgWgOalMeLOfMKH07-Mk3icm3CCrvI5IwTKlHlqRy8vJVtH0l8m38mXGOVPH-1r6sduXBt-5PjwBS).2

name: History Facts
subject: The surprising thing Marie Curie donated to the WWI war effort
body:
During her legendary career as a physicist and chemist studying radioactivity, Marie Curie won the Nobel Prize twice [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68c6jzdf6k2nfuwt49w3trfo2t2i3fxl7w4u91tje6u9ibzft260s33beqrnd921aymsrh9d067mzxklkpfnvlwx8kdx1rteijhqtx3j966nzppcaqjja1rpawdjd1g3pvw0snf0gqwgrltbx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snekcr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Marie Curie donated her Nobel Prize to the WWI war effort.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snekcr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Science & Industry](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snekcr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snekcr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| D uring her legendary career as a physicist and chemist studying radioactivity, Marie Curie won the Nobel Prize twice: once in physics in 1903, an award she shared with her husband Pierre and their colleague Henri Becquerel, and once in chemistry in 1911. When World War I broke out across Europe, Curie decided that she would use her prize to assist the war effort. She offered to [donate](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snekcr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) the gold from her two medals to be melted down, but the French National Bank refused to accept the offer. Instead, Curie used most of the prize money she had received to purchase French war bonds.
---
The scientist’s contributions to the war effort didn’t stop there. She also used her expertise in radiology to develop mobile X-ray vans, which she and dozens of trained women, including her daughter and future Nobel winner Irène Curie, used to treat wounded soldiers. Curie’s mobile X-rays were a crucial innovation: Though X-ray machines were becoming commonplace in French hospitals, they were often far from the battlefield and too complex to carry in combat. The X-ray vans, nicknamed “little Curies,” were equipped with machines that could locate shrapnel and broken bones in wounded soldiers, and provide them with more immediate medical care.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snekcr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snekcr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## President Warren G. Harding gave Marie Curie a gram of radium.
During Marie Curie’s career, radioactive elements were incredibly rare, and Curie and her colleagues had trouble finding sufficient amounts for study. In a [1921 interview](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snekcr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) with American journalist W.B. (Marie) Meloney, Curie revealed that her laboratory only had 1 gram of radium available for experimentation. Upon learning this, Meloney founded the Marie Curie Radium Fund, which raised money, mostly from American women who admired Curie’s work, to purchase more radium for the esteemed scientist to study. The effort was a massive success: Donors raised [$100,000](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snekcr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), a fortune sufficient to purchase an additional gram of radium. Curie received the gram of radium during a trip to the U.S., where it was presented to her by President Warren G. Harding. During the ceremony, the President [called](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snekcr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Curie the “foremost among scientists in the age of science,” and a “leader among women in the generation which sees woman come tardily into her own.”

clean_body: During her legendary career as a physicist and chemist studying radioactivity, Marie Curie won the Nobel Prize twice | D uring her legendary career as a physicist and chemist studying radioactivity, Marie Curie won the Nobel Prize twice: once in physics in 1903, an award she shared with her husband Pierre and their colleague Henri Becquerel, and once in chemistry in 1911. When World War I broke out across Europe, Curie decided that she would use her prize to assist the war effort. She offered to the gold from her two medals to be melted down, but the French National Bank refused to accept the offer. Instead, Curie used most of the prize money she had received to purchase French war bonds. The scientist’s contributions to the war effort didn’t stop there. She also used her expertise in radiology to develop mobile X-ray vans, which she and dozens of trained women, including her daughter and future Nobel winner Irène Curie, used to treat wounded soldiers. Curie’s mobile X-rays were a crucial innovation: Though X-ray machines were becoming commonplace in French hospitals, they were often far from the battlefield and too complex to carry in combat. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---

| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...

| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren't old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That 's why I'm reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0d338d9a6e75495cbd40012692e1a635&_e=_HjrSo4kQBqDVbc2IQsINNlUaJgfBuDx9eiMCt0e0yHBYHhS80dAyxnbfR4WRYRWvLk1JPtxpZqz9VcL6zJRYt_YedgTpLlwC1atrBmu8g70cT6QBChf72rjxIgZ-GVZEB53jAWLqgRjHmE_IkyI325S-RGMWd_kT0BvAf5H2OHJKO7onJns7WJeUkDi1KrYZGKfxlJ4XHwpuFA9B54BuvHDXcVkKsJh9OVYWJz-dkJWxpWUH6AfHPgbRrz9RlzNZKhont3SOrY_mQH6mNgy4G7ddNBWhPhBx552y8yidJU0btJAmFMeVXDbFjJGs1Ozz2wwYk10wNY6u6p-vqDa2F2RFLEAyXUDMFYrEF23aog6TVPS8GET_-4fANWMjd3euDxht4p7CKbbFLGilVz0P_fWUU2NrMZPORp76z8Slt4%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0d338d9a6e75495cbd40012692e1a635&_e=_HjrSo4kQBqDVbc2IQsINNlUaJgfBuDx9eiMCt0e0yHBYHhS80dAyxnbfR4WRYRWvLk1JPtxpZqz9VcL6zJRYt_YedgTpLlwC1atrBmu8g70cT6QBChf72rjxIgZ-GVZEB53jAWLqgRjHmE_IkyI325S-RGMWd_kT0BvAf5H2OHJKO7onJns7WJeUkDi1KrYZGKfxlJ4XHwpuFA9B54BuvHDXcVkKsJh9OVYWJz-dkJWxpWUH6AfHPgbRrz9RlzNUv3ADtr8K8D1AQpifkfSCo4s5qZ1nbB-cZgacOZOIbx8uR64RkuOCQIIthb8i-APBnqKcWPn-ZoUfBwqRmnwBq8qTnHbrhOE1Nwho8SKJ50roUfeM56iX3EC1ygwfA16zVfH1vwb4aZb3BrtlP9L5XZ-wkoKZ-P7lw5VZI5Ghls%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won't work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0d338d9a6e75495cbd40012692e1a635&_e=_HjrSo4kQBqDVbc2IQsINNlUaJgfBuDx9eiMCt0e0yHBYHhS80dAyxnbfR4WRYRWvLk1JPtxpZqz9VcL6zJRYt_YedgTpLlwC1atrBmu8g70cT6QBChf72rjxIgZ-GVZEB53jAWLqgRjHmE_IkyI325S-RGMWd_kT0BvAf5H2OHJKO7onJns7WJeUkDi1KrYZGKfxlJ4XHwpuFA9B54BuvHDXcVkKsJh9OVYWJz-dkJWxpWUH6AfHPgbRrz9RlzNWPwsjHemTcx4tlp7ogI5U1-W7bauCfCphLBKYYGz_gCwj1ybwgh7-dCwW2sWCaoMYElCdngrF0M6kUpV7kHuwUHDXCdMHhSK922-5yKxVVS4ZixJT-6S3ZcQe7Nja3TnYJUogGq5uLphAw2KIkjMQDQFc_FfZ05Jo6gyV49Elpc%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we'll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **

clean_body: Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren't old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. That 's why I'm reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Season One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won't work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the $35 and above level, we'll send you** all ten episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a Founding Supporter. | | Kirk Cameron Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron Actor, Author, and Father | | | | | Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302 Conroe, TX 77304 | Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

## College Football Preview
There are two weeks left in college football's regular season, and plenty of Texas teams are positioning themselves for postseason play. Before next week’s showdown between [No. 3 Texas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OhCAUxfGnwQ7jvSjEgmIbu9l2S8PHdYYMigFWZ95-4_Tbn_zzy_m5zTcTYtju32YlXV9LmrHDngNwFLM3Ib7nvvHadn6EhjQogUIOgKp5aGktSLRCLX6x1is1jlKaAQcl_AAWm6CvGAAKQJTD2I5kyEEHSngBMBLrO_KhptzWB1V6mbLEdzooty6tTdSPWvfCxBfDieF0nme7pFfZU67lWjCcTK7BRSoMJ5dipDvxJaVqTYwMp0-SH4U_aau_7vnmeyYfXA1p48n7wvfgnoVv6aDVUuYo-EVusvb7GWIMRSrWd_fVhPgx1X9POjT-BQAA__89bWug) and [No. 15 Texas A&M](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LFugzAQxvGnMdshfCYQBg9d2NK1IzK-I7FisGU7kLx9lYyVup9-p__3c5kuxnm3Xb_Nyro8lzBhgy1ICagmMs6_prYiPTc0yIq17BWq7iSxr27anlvCVp6NGuzpbJCGpVuGXqFhZRVR5fQbkxKVROxOQz2wYSsb2StSUg4s2obJlZDqcuPCT5MX_wo7p9qGtfL6VkrMQn0JHAWOx3HUds45hlTy-0LgaIP3fGVYQiiz8V7guPGRBY7mMT_SBnuGDwwGVghEGaKz9ww5JjYE3m0Mn-S_EhzMd5AKYmJytriwZVhSWCGmsPMGayB-_6uSpng4713uetE219U4_wko_y66a_wNAAD__-EKe7k), they'll try to avoid upsets against Kentucky and Auburn, respectively, with results having enormous implications in the SEC race. [No. 13 SMU](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuOqzAQhp_GdIMYG7AoXJyGLqfdEhl7IKMYjGwvJG-_SsqVtv-v39dtulkOvK__7UamPJc4yUa2gAhSTd5yeE1t5c3c-AErMqiVVH2HUld3s8xN1znddahdo1Braq305Pu5nz32WLF5hyFKhVL23VAPZMlhg1p5hTiQaBvyXGKqy50KPW1ewiuelGoXtyqYeylHFuqfkKOQ43VdtZtzPmIq-a0QcnQxBFoJlhjLbEMQctzpykKOJ6eVd7ZwZsjbN0TvM-QjkfUQeCf4HP3th4PdI8NF9ABUcCTy7ArHPcOS4gZHiiftsEVP764qGX9cHALnXou2WTfL4TO-_EnzNPInAAD__75pekg) has a chance to clinch a berth in the ACC title game with a win at Virginia at 11:00, while a loss opens the door to losing their tie-breaker with Clemson. Baylor can [extend its winning streak](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOszAQBOCnMZ0Ru3ZCKFz8DV3-9kq02BtYxeAI-yB5-xPXXzfSSJ9G83Uf7iRR1uk_LezK-5EGbNBqAI1mCCTxM9gquLEJHVTsoDVorhfAtpoded8E68na1tz4FiyP5HH0AUbbWG8qcScGgAYQr5eu7pjYQwOtCQagY2UbDlLSVpeZC78pP-In7bzVPi1VdHMpr6zMP4W9wv44jvqZI52lwv60FfYAZ0aF_UifmDYdU3pmze_Ca9CHrKusk85lY3rqh-ysJ1o4612yFD2n71zSqrCvNhdeh8Qo-doq20wLSfzdUf48Znf4EwAA__-Rb2Xx) to five with a win at Houston in an in-state matchup at 6:00, Texas Tech faces Oklahoma State at 2:30, and [UTEP takes a trip](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb_G7rCYgZi4oHhNurx2S4s142QkDBHMOvHfr7LVNlvfq3Ok83Gdr4ET59v_sJGX11pm1GgVgEIzx8DpmG0f_aeOE_TkwRk04wnQ9Xc_audOtGg424g6gKPz6kZtaYHzElbbs3_DANAA4niahokCLaDBmWgAJuqspshS6iB3EnqFtqaj7FSHpWx98neRR-vMvw4vHV6EcqbWiIbKe0jtferwkunZfq9qb-pL6KFuYSPFeS11C8Ilq1yEmmpS6pE4U-urj48np8RtdJ3Vty1w-lHLny12j98BAAD__-HrY7Q) to Tennessee fresh off the Vols’ loss to Georgia last week. TCU will look to improve its bowl prospects versus Arizona at 2:00.
## Abbott Orders Agencies to Divest From China
Gov. Greg Abbott has prohibited state agencies from making [new investments in China](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGuozAQheGnMZ2RZ-wEKFxsQ5dtt0QDHmAkgyPsheTtr5L-9kefjv5_j-FBEmVf_tLGvrzmNKBBpwE02iGQxPfgquBHEzqo2ENj0d5vgE21eiTDTGZyhmxrjaPGOcdt13YtzA5ulfgPBoAWEO-3ru6YeAIDjQ0WoGPlDAcp6ajLyoVflOf4Ticf9ZS2Kvq1lGdW9o_CXmF_XVc9p9f4P8vOOX82CvtnilJkygr7r6CXdGoax1SKTkfgI-tcqLCmhfdJOOsgJ-ei5yNtelplp-rw4XlJjJLvjXJm2Uji90L5tcnp8ScAAP__yxtmAw) and to sell off current holdings “at the first available opportunity,” according to a letter sent Thursday. Abbott identified China as a foreign adversary posing a financial risk to Texas, citing "[belligerent actions](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L1uxCAQBOCnwR0Wu2A4Coo07i5tSmtj1jYSNieD7ufto7s-_Xwz0vxcpyulnI71m3YO7bmUCRUaCSBRT5FSfk2mi-FXRQ8dB3AatR0AXbcFRWwv4AyTd2SGuFhviWzUl0jzRUGXwrsMADUg2sH3nolnUOB01ACehVEcUytn3zZu_KS65Fe589nPZe9y2Fq7VaG_BI4CxyUddMzcv2gr5Z0QOB78qALHj5Xrmx7llOWMfFZZGzWWtPIxJ65SOT0MRqHvt7bn7gzx9kg5p2qdMGrdKeXPbvv3iHvAvwAAAP__aFpgjQ) across the Southeast Pacific region.” The governor also noted in the letter that he directed The University of Texas/Texas A&M Investment Management Company, managing a $80 billion investment portfolio, to divest from China earlier this year. The directive follows a series of moves aimed at the Chinese Communist Party (CCP), including an [executive order](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuszAUhZ_GbCDfa4N_Bg8MIX-HtGNHy8QXYslgZLs0efsqGbp1-pajo3O-z4u5WB_8trzblXS5z9EgR1kD1CiMsz48jKycnrjroSINSqDoWkBV3XQ7CcKW5DQpUH2nOsdF1ysECQoFbyuvn2UAKACxa_umJ0tX4KCEEwA9McnJ-RJTU25U6G7zHB7xoNRc41oFfStlz0wMDEeG4xKP5hVqlngwHL_2EK3LDMfZB3pyT5SfPH3U56GWyowxkV82M7iDUrbJUzbDVnz93yab80pbMW-X4Xz6vQ3_mt3NVdJu__Yh-NwpJvmyWh9eo8qflg6NPwEAAP__ROpn4g) issued Monday to arrest CCP operatives in the state.`
## TX Supreme Court: Paxton Can’t Be Deposed
The Texas Supreme Court ruled on Friday that Attorney Gen. Ken Paxton can not be questioned under oath in the [whistleblower lawsuit](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2uozAQRp8GOiPPmN_CxTZ02XZLZPAQrDUY2UNM3v4q6W__fUdH599jehjn3fH8a3bSfK9hQom1ABCoJmucf091afUs7QAlaegUqrYB7MpN297ItlkWg7Je137uOwm271WDM0FnmtLpDwwAFSC2zVANZGgBCZ2yCmCgopZkHYdY8UZMt0mrf4cXxWoJe-n1xnymQv0pcCxwzDlXa7ix3cKVOByfUYHjQTkVOH7vIl1npJ3EEq7IIl6ekvhPhzjNzeEQORwsmBK79S3y5hJ7mn3IFIU3OV2Oy6jtmZ33LrVdUcvnbpz_6vCvfV4afwIAAP__dU1rvA) against him. The lawsuit, brought by four former employees of the Office of the Attorney General (OAG), alleges they were [fired for reporting Paxton](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDHPozAMhn9N2IyIodAMGW5h6603okDcEl0IKHFK-fendLjtW6xXsvTYz_vnMT2M8y68fpuNNH-e-4QNdiAlYDtZ4_w1dZXVc2OVrEjLocW2v0kcqlX3937B-4x3S9STHbpOzlYtStF8U3YeKqcLTEpsJWJ_U7UiQ4ts5NDaVkpFomvIOt5jzSsxfUx6-mt_U6yXfau8XpmPJNpfAkeB43medU6BzlTWAscSBY65DBPZLZ5K_G-AAscvFVI-Im0Ey54jQ7nAOYYEMRd54NUwJDZMYJj3GOiCFwWKxsNfCnCYD-8BmBK75wUugDdnyo6rqO1xOu9d6gfRNa_NOP99nn9s863xXwAAAP__sZh62A) to the FBI for using his office to help real estate investor Nate Paul. The allegations were central to the impeachment proceedings for Paxton in 2023, a case in which he was acquitted. In January, Paxton agreed [not to contest](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGSgyAUheGn0Q6He0FZCopt0mXbLR2Ea2SC4ggJ5u13kn77M9-Z-X-v49WGGLbbj13JlHNOI3KUDIChGL0N8TXK1puJew0tGVACxdADqnYxep69dP0A05edpBXKKeToppkAnBKiDeaNAaAAxKHXnSZLDjgo4QWApkZy8qGkoysLFTptnuMrPenoXFrbaJZS9tyI7wYvDV5qrd1GNVei-3vQ4OVOG9vtWdLGoq35EQoL607WLStthX1Ilh_7QSsxlx5HYaA177lsD-P3GmIMeVCN5LfVhvi5Lf92eBr8CwAA__-XL2F3) the whistleblower lawsuit, leading the Supreme Court to overturn a lower court ruling that he be deposed in the case.

TCU will look to improve its bowl prospects versus Arizona at 2:00. Abbott Orders Agencies to Divest From China Gov. Greg Abbott has prohibited state agencies from making and to sell off current holdings “at the first available opportunity,” according to a letter sent Thursday. Abbott identified China as a foreign adversary posing a financial risk to Texas, citing " across the Southeast Pacific region.” The governor also noted in the letter that he directed The University of Texas/Texas A&M Investment Management Company, managing a $80 billion investment portfolio, to divest from China earlier this year. The directive follows a series of moves aimed at the Chinese Communist Party (CCP), including an issued Monday to arrest CCP operatives in the state.` TX Supreme Court: Paxton Can’t Be Deposed The Texas Supreme Court ruled on Friday that Attorney Gen. Ken Paxton can not be questioned under oath in the against him. The lawsuit, brought by four former employees of the Office of the Attorney General (OAG), alleges they were to the FBI for using his office to help real estate investor Nate Paul. The allegations were central to the impeachment proceedings for Paxton in 2023, a case in which he was acquitted. In January, Paxton agreed the whistleblower lawsuit, leading the Supreme Court to overturn a lower court ruling that he be deposed in the case. ### 7 Secrets About Hiring a Financial Advisor
Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But [choosing the wrong one](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ec717ceb78d4f3db6f3d55abcc6f812&_e=M51YB_glMrjw_xGAS3wge6L3cUL2kc2P3jnCGQIFiGg2gCKGlAsoLtlIZhiClmFv6pF4MTjN9Sd7W3HNkZ2L_4oaOF1NO9pO0rM7nNRrWrFYZ7-QjiV1XF5S7t6jrNt3OSheyidxrPhoL9tQHoJc3fxu5X5KNiYPawzUzsrJWIqODjjupcbn6Nxjy6wVkSpOIQcbOndyKDHUQgRu0XG7qp2gAvAF1_YyZmfQUZ8zxCj1wjCZgmn7s7OrriYy6dJ56g4Ngd2U7TqUke9PPgTip60iUmNCIs6Fg0O8afU6qxlCo4l6NWdiLj3pox_0aggLd33emlSYVAIfLl2DgWTvKWyCosAH7B9bzy1iC-h2Ecz3XvxB1lfEWr_-ePA-8j_B18QnYXQeP-Qy3V-e6Pq8fEKtnr7BPF6VZKd1s0cfNum7I5A8YpRiEElF68krsBG1) could potentially wreak havoc on your retirement. A 2022 Northwestern Mutual study found that 62% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 35% of Americans work with a financial advisor.1 While advisors are prohibited from promising returns, research suggests that people work with a financial advisor:
* Feel more at ease about their finances, and

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Here’s how I’m planning to stay in the fight. How about you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
We can do this. Together.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2420%2E4032634%2EnGoNc7)
---
As we get ready to face a second Donald Trump presidency, we can sit with our fear, our anger, and our grief — and we can also make plans for how we’ll fight back. In the U.S. Senate, for as long as Democrats still have control, I’ll keep pushing to confirm as many federal judges as possible, as well as federal regulators who can’t be removed by Trump. Next year, I will do everything I can to hold the line against Trump’s dangerous nominees and his toxic agenda — including his tax breaks for the rich. We won’t always win, but we can slow or sometimes limit Trump’s destruction. With every fight, we can build political power to put more checks on his administration and build the foundation for future wins. And we can’t win if we don’t fight. [**I want to hear from you: How are you planning to stay in the fight? It could mean getting more involved with a local group, volunteering your time for a political campaign, running for office yourself, or all the above. Please fill in this quick survey to let me know. It should only take a couple of minutes, and it will give me a good sense of how this team intends to stay mobilized in the weeks, months, and years to come.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-postelection-survey/?source=EMZ23Z_GOP_E_20241123_V1S1&t=8&akid=2420%2E4032634%2EnGoNc7) When we link arms, we make each other stronger. When we make commitments to ourselves about the actions we plan to take, we reinforce our determination. And when we share those plans with the people in our lives, we make our persistence contagious. We spread hope. [**So I hope you can take a moment to fill in this survey, let me know your thoughts, and tell someone else about your plans as well. We are in this together.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-postelection-survey/?source=EMZ23Z_GOP_E_20241123_V1S1&t=9&akid=2420%2E4032634%2EnGoNc7) | [**TAKE THE SURVEY**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-postelection-survey/?source=EMZ23Z_GOP_E_20241123_V1S1&t=10&akid=2420%2E4032634%2EnGoNc7)
---
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: School choice for me, but not for thee!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/formenotforthee?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, **What do you most like about your job?** For me, it is being invited to speak about the work the Mississippi Center for Public Policy (MCPP) is doing to try to improve our state.

**Typically, I get a couple of invitations each month to talk at Rotary Clubs, schools or the Kiwanis.** Just the other week, I received one such invitation from the North Jackson Rotary Club.

**As invited to, I talked about some of our policy goals, such as school choice, deregulation and tax reform.** Ever sensitive to the fact that good folk have different opinions about things, I meticulously avoided saying anything even remotely partisan.

Rotary Club lunches are enjoyable precisely because they are committed to building goodwill and understanding.

**As I sat down after speaking, however, up popped Luther Munford, someone I had only met on my way into the event.** Mr Munford proceeded to attack school choice – and at times I almost felt, me - at length, all under the guise of asking a question.

Fair enough, I thought. ** Free speech and all that, although Mr Munford did not sound very big on ****goodwill. In fact, he sounded borderline rude.**

I thought no more of the incident until I read Mr Munford’s recent newspaper article in which he appears to have continued the attack he started at the North Jackson Rotary Club.
---
|
---
_Luther Munford; Such a committed supporter of public education he sent his own children to private school._
| **Curiously, for an article purporting to be about school choice in Mississippi, he launched his article with an attack on Brexit.** Aware as he is of my role as one of the founders of the official Brexit campaign back in my native Britain, Mr Munford perhaps thinks that by attacking the way 45 million Brits voted he is somehow getting at me. Whatever.

Once Mr Munford gets around to attacking school choice, rather than me, he makes a series of erroneous assumptions that deserve a rebuttal.

**Mr Munford says school choice is unpopular. This is just not true.** Polls show that more than 7 in 10 Mississippi voters, including a majority of Democrats, want school choice.

Mr Munford seems especially vexed by the idea that parents given the choice might want their children to attend a religious school. Assuming I have understood him correctly (his syntax is a little garbled) school choice would mean that “the problem of funding truly racists religious beliefs becomes even greater”.

**Any suggestion that Mississippi private schools are full of “racist religious beliefs” will no doubt come as a surprise to anyone that attends or teaches at one. **

Mr Munford then attacks private schools on the basis that “no one knows how well Mississippi private schools are doing because they are not subject to any form of public accountability”.

Again, plain wrong. **Private schools are hyper accountable to fee paying parents. It is the public school accountability system that is failing, giving A grades to school districts where many kids can’t read properly.**

Mr Munford then proceeds to attack school choice on the basis that it would take money out of the public sector. Allowing each public school student to take their base share of state funds (about $6,600) to a public school of their choice (assuming the public school has capacity) would not impoverish the public sector. It would reallocate the money, forcing failing schools and underperforming districts to raise their game.

**Our plan for a Mississippi Parents’ Tax Credit for those that choose not to take their place at a public school, because they prefer to home school or go private, would be capped at $150 million.** It is not draining money from public schools but supporting families that are currently paying twice.

**_What I find hardest to understand about Luther Munford’s attack on school choice is that he sent his own children to one of the most expensive private schools in our state, St Andrew’s._**

Luther Munford is on record as saying he “believes strongly in public education”. But not strongly enough to send his own kids to public school.

**Mr Munford attacks putting money into private religious schools because of the risk of “racist religious beliefs”. I presume there were no such beliefs at St Andrew’s Episcopal School when his own kids went there? **

He attacks private schools for not being accountable. When he was a parent at St Andrew’s was there not sufficient accountability to him as a parent?

**Perhaps if one were to ask why, as an advocate of public education, Mr Munford did not take the opportunity to send his own kids to, say, Murrah High School, he might have an explanation as to why his family circumstances were different.**

Anti school choice activists need to recognize that every family’s circumstances are different. That’s why families need to be able to make choices about their children’s education that currently only people like Mr Munford are able to make.

Sending a child to St Andrew’s today costs about $20,000 a year. We should all support parents’ 100 percent if they are blessed enough to be able to send their children to such an awesome school.

But we should at the same time help local families that cannot afford that to allocate their $6,600 of state funding to a school they can get into. To do anything else could be called hypocrisy.

Have an awesome weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=e5197f08fc&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

That’s why families need to be able to make choices about their children’s education that currently only people like Mr Munford are able to make. Sending a child to St Andrew’s today costs about $20,000 a year. We should all support parents’ 100 percent if they are blessed enough to be able to send their children to such an awesome school. But we should at the same time help local families that cannot afford that to allocate their $6,600 of state funding to a school they can get into. To do anything else could be called hypocrisy. Have an awesome weekend! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | |

name: API PA
subject: Our Fight for the Future Begins - Will You Join Us?
body:
https://www.apipennsylvania.org [https://www.apipennsylvania.org]
Hi Peter,
A second Trump administration brings with it heightened tensions and real challenges. We know that organized, community-driven responses will be crucial in defending our rights, protecting our communities, and ensuring our democratic values are upheld. That’s why your support today is more important than ever.
Donate [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/donate?am=35&contactdata=/RjsCSO05HJxJMp2f/gO+BMIjalvaCX8EPFo5pdp0ZkBzl1E7jI3K2GyKAJy6NvaMKx13C5arK0WeILhsf8N8I17PkVHCDmbEd8W/KC72dqob3hIS+CcvmCAepmD4OgVVuy1yfumd51ENE4INswIfrFJ4wyJ8/EtPZx4g+RUH10=]
Like many of you, we’re feeling a range of emotions - anger, sadness, uncertainty - similar to what we experienced in 2016. But this time, we have the experience, the clarity, and the determination to take action. We know exactly what’s at stake. We’ve seen the damage a Trump presidency can cause, and we are ready to fight back.
API PA is the political home for Asian Americans in Pennsylvania. We are committed to standing strong in the face of an administration that threatens our communities - one that plans to deport our neighbors, strip away our healthcare, and dismantle our democracy. But we are ready to stand firm and fight for what matters for all of us. We can’t do it without you.
Your generous contribution will provide the critical resources necessary to continue our vital work. With your support, we can defend against Project 2025 and other harmful policies that threaten our future, protect Philadelphia’s Chinatown and our communities, ensure access to culturally competent mental health services for our people, and expand language access across Pennsylvania so that no one is left behind.
These are just a few of the battles we are already fighting, and there’s much more ahead. We need the funds to equip ourselves with the tools, resources and staff to win.
Donate [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/donate?am=35&contactdata=/RjsCSO05HJxJMp2f/gO+BMIjalvaCX8EPFo5pdp0ZkBzl1E7jI3K2GyKAJy6NvaMKx13C5arK0WeILhsf8N8I17PkVHCDmbEd8W/KC72dqob3hIS+CcvmCAepmD4OgVVuy1yfumd51ENE4INswIfrFJ4wyJ8/EtPZx4g+RUH10=]
Over the next four years, we will face ongoing challenges, but we are committed to staying in the fight for you, for all of us. Together, we can build a movement that ensures our Asian American communities in Pennsylvania have the political power to stay safe, healthy, and strong.
Thank you for standing with us!
https://www.facebook.com/apipennsylvania [https://www.facebook.com/apipennsylvania] https://twitter.com/apipennsylvania [https://twitter.com/apipennsylvania] https://instagram.com/apipennsylvania [https://instagram.com/apipennsylvania] https://www.tiktok.com/@apipennsylvania [https://www.tiktok.com/@apipennsylvania]

API PA
PO Box 22611
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/SxZcLwbmqUib9krCmDRzmw2?unsubscribedata=c7fhlWreI5ObfpWnN5EjSr0IHZAYknaAK8UHpPPRdviABmL%2FA4jW54hiMLAWEsExbD29ZAnorcjC28T5hG%2B2wRmr83jT0msSfNMF37eckzcCRu%2FLaxDk2gQi1H%2BGbia8v%2BAH9Qd0zdtWcE3LKto%2Ftom4eP%2FTj4FNLhfzlnDy5HqPcjq2oxL05gDlDv30%2BQh1nD%2BzvLgdDm6xibiomGg5f%2FVTYvdacL8QVNTD76ZomVeeRTlIRNHm9hpbvyfYd0WM0B%2B0MMN050j1XLOGGGkt%2F%2FTvm6qHbnUraQvFAjU0xD3%2B8shNf2Mh6O8L7J0oWRHMMdUUtwod%2BXacItAQmM17e%2BntowTQ3UF3Fj9ZO1FvXenFF5LiztwL9bEheAnf1o0SMCyEDbie3lvJTIQfNg4eaLXmmtPRvXXymMyRUpJOJAQ%3D .
