_**Warning: This email contains details of sexual misconduct that many may find disturbing. Please be advised.**_

Hi Peter,

In light of the recent news that Matt Gaetz has withdrawn as Trump’s pick for Attorney General, we wanted to send an email to unpack what this really means.

Matt Gaetz’s sexual misconduct has been headline news for years, but the truth is, many of the men that Trump has chosen for leadership positions within his administration have their own troubling backgrounds. Just because Gaetz seems to be out of the picture certainly doesn’t mean women are safe under this administration.

Additionally, nearly all of the men Trump has nominated have publicly expressed sexist, misogynistic, and outdated viewpoints about women’s roles in society.

[**It’s more critical than ever that we elect women up and down the ballot to serve as a representative voice in the checks and balances system as these men make decisions that could impact our everyday lives. Help us make that a reality by pitching in $25 or whatever you can today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97535787/513756562/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241123picks_N_AS_90DO_14_NG_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIyYzk2MDRhLWEzYTktZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uNaHUp-bZRbcufC-nLqSpuLpKC4MOQ-iL-DVReEr32E=)

**Here is a look at some of Trump’s picks:**

**To lead the Department of Health and Human Services, Trump nominated Robert F. Kennedy Jr.:** According to _Vanity Fair_ , a woman who worked as a nanny for Kennedy’s children described inappropriate behavior and sexual advances, including an incident in which Kennedy approached her from behind and allegedly groped her in a pantry. At the time, the woman was 23. Kennedy was 45 and married, with five children.

As _The New York Times_ confirms, RFK Jr. has no medical or public health degree. Trump has appointed him to lead the agency tasked with regulating food and medicine for the American people.

**For Defense Secretary, Donald Trump has selected Pete Hegseth:** A 22-page police report was released earlier this week detailing rape allegations against Hegseth from 7 years ago. According to CNN, Hegseth’s attorney has acknowledged that he later entered into a settlement agreement with his accuser that included an undisclosed monetary payment and a confidentiality clause.

Hegseth is a Fox News host and veteran who has gone on record with his opinion that **women should not have combat roles in the military.** Despite this, he is Trump's pick to run the Pentagon and serve as our nation’s lead defense policymaker.

**Elon Musk has been appointed to lead the new Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE):** According to _CBS News_ , **eight** employees of Musk’s company, SpaceX, have accused him of creating a hostile and abusive work environment “rife with sexual harassment” that demeaned women and the LGBTQ+ community. He has also been accused of exposing himself to a flight attendant...

Musk has been tasked with cutting, dismantling, and restructuring the federal government through this new department.

**Every single one of these men has been accused of sexual misconduct, which isn’t surprising given that _Trump himself has been accused of sexual misconduct by at least 15 women._**

[**We CANNOT sit back and watch our government become overrun with misogynists and sexual predators. We need women in government with these men to hold them accountable and protect our rights. Help us continue the work to elect WOMEN to office by pitching in $25 or more today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97535791/513756583/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241123picks_N_AS_90DO_14_NG_N_L2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIyYzk2MDRhLWEzYTktZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uNaHUp-bZRbcufC-nLqSpuLpKC4MOQ-iL-DVReEr32E=)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The difference heaven makes today
body:
Imagine you’re planning a move to a new country
| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=71df50bd3e504ac9ac30664d8434c1c4&_e=ZF2dcfVZlvkAOe0sdrg1ndDcth7WDb_KQ2KXbMRvgmsfFYngqC3QXRHTlod_MYL0v8G68vcvfDVZDwjXKTXdgIpHG1oMoNEBMELZL2I2Vsv27L-9-eu-F-gTfjs3r0GQ4XRWX-kJqLe3h6r_AdrCLpz1TTPeqlNs1386lGvNTat485i4mF4VRehy7kBXzifzoRNvZX8dI3d4uXrY0gTcsiNAzdxHc9ZPMAqRMgh5Lm_tTfUk0j6rGro5EGXcu-_uwUazwv9gTpYIBMPua48cCHNelLTps88XIUvexLDgqSNcFCpgPFYsSmhqoolzkt-dxW9rzcFeMbYz83VK7W5hxceB0KiH3brwCGYEERZ-DER-8c9jt8C83-4mHeFhH9NRHo3BWCVBUU3N7AUQH67szUKVwfsRiqR1UlL4Ftwpi78%3D)
---
Hello Friend,

Imagine you're planning a move to a new country--a faraway place you've never visited before. Wouldn't you want to know everything you could about it--what the culture is like, the language, the climate, and most importantly, how to get there? It would make a huge difference in how you prepare for the journey!

As Christians, we know that one day we will leave this world and be united with God in heaven. But surprisingly, many of us know very little about what awaits us in that incredible place.
---
| | In my book _A Place Called Heaven_ , I dive into Scripture to answer 10 surprising questions about heaven, including:

* Is heaven a real place or just a state of mind?
* Will we know our loved ones when we get there?
* Do people in heaven know what's happening on earth?
* What difference does a future heaven make in our lives today?

---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=71df50bd3e504ac9ac30664d8434c1c4&_e=ZF2dcfVZlvkAOe0sdrg1ndDcth7WDb_KQ2KXbMRvgmsfFYngqC3QXRHTlod_MYL0v8G68vcvfDVZDwjXKTXdgIpHG1oMoNEBMELZL2I2Vsv27L-9-eu-F-gTfjs3r0GQ4XRWX-kJqLe3h6r_AdrCLpz1TTPeqlNs1386lGvNTat485i4mF4VRehy7kBXzifzoRNvZX8dI3d4uXrY0gTcsiNAzdxHc9ZPMAqRMgh5Lm_tTfUk0j6rGro5EGXcu-_uh7bFepaW-3B-0xOmL1Klv8pf9iz1obKlI5xu52STBNYRcHtGAOrFfgr9pTOyEBo7g2bBWx9oimf-TcuZvKVt6A4RMDcmnocWdexoQCEGQf-5KWLfG8cOjFySjKxKg06_B-rgEuZO7wF8-FGPsceecV-lerBD3jViWi9a9VTW6FM%3D)
---
| | I know many of us have asked these questions at some point. Understanding what the Bible says about our eternal home doesn't just satisfy our curiosity--it transforms how we live today. By shifting our focus from the temporary struggles of this life to the eternal glory that awaits us, we can live with greater hope, purpose, and peace.

To thank you for your generous gift to _Pathway to Victory_ today, I'd love to send you a copy of _A Place Called Heaven_ , [https://secure.ptv.org/a-place-called-heaven-generous-gift-1](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=71df50bd3e504ac9ac30664d8434c1c4&_e=ZF2dcfVZlvkAOe0sdrg1ndDcth7WDb_KQ2KXbMRvgmsfFYngqC3QXRHTlod_MYL0v8G68vcvfDVZDwjXKTXdgIpHG1oMoNEBMELZL2I2Vsv27L-9-eu-F-gTfjs3r0GQ4XRWX-kJqLe3h6r_AdrCLpz1TTPeqlNs1386lGvNTat485i4mF4VRehy7kBXzifzoRNvZX8dI3d4uXrY0gTcsiNAzdxHc9ZPMAqRMgh5Lm_tTfUk0j6rGro5EGXcu-_uPqHe50o7jEZjO5wLqo7fH2cpjCEpu0PMP-gS2SzMhrLne06sda881Apg7lnJJAE5Zoq90OQkx8_czuERoVnF_UJowOjXm_sjmPi3bViqZLmktQ3viVsMgP_pWqQQZCK9FR-JT3tDFBzQrSXK9Irdxaxa51HmbyjEH1UCru45WcE%3D)

I hope this book will give you a clearer picture of the future God has prepared for you and help you live each day with eternity in mind.

Thank you for your continued support, which helps us spread the gospel of Jesus Christ to a world in need of hope.

Thank you for standing with us and sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ.

Sincerely,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

P.S. - For your gift of $75 or more, we'll send you _A Place Called Heaven_ , the beautiful gift book _Encouragement from A Place Called Heaven_ , our exclusive ministry brochure, and the companion message series on DVD and MP3 audio. Click here to get a copy of this spiritually uplifting bundle: [https://secure.ptv.org/encouragement-from-a-place-called-heaven-large-kit-1](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=71df50bd3e504ac9ac30664d8434c1c4&_e=ZF2dcfVZlvkAOe0sdrg1nTanynemA5c6tz_Y-AL6MdR2nWX9fy_7IXIa__y5dqM8dwmB1UOixse8ZHZURzmOGByw1IyJCKPfUxeFpBe8k6R_5_v4q4FbPPRl3cznvcivucaPQhq2h0inlhm-IwFhwviTik239I9ibW9q6CzTkEkX23fdohAadI9URp2SprdMdUVjYA3AtdcWx-kNpTkoDiZu-UedJzQxbJ5Ksv3wvJS8UvLs3PBPyQ6VGf1LZzEdXtu1kJxnvJ-VLLtRqt39zvRRRHukpP86AKIGZOFtfTeOuFXeFmXqMvEM59oJOWFJ1WbVDjQ7FR3G8Xn-_SpiopeTFkKDA7DDWIU2EnsnRuxTGTRsi6Op7OmlaGvMLSJRTUZLdEQGurk3I8uUsJdsyenp8VPxbbhItFOO6AA0Dva3w0ARQSpoyz6WOAaTqe0W)

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Olivia_Krolczyk=2C_Leadership_Institute=C2=A0?=
subject: They want to fail students
body:
Stand bravely with me and Riley
| Peter, They failed me.
Leftist college administrators impose more and more unconstitutional restrictions on students like me: what we can say, do, and -- in my case -- write.
Last year, I received a failing grade at the University of Cincinnati for **using the term “biological women.”** The university sided with my professor, refusing to recognize my right -- the right of every American -- to free speech. That’s why I joined the Riley Gaines Center here at your Leadership Institute -- to protect and train more young people to stand up against leftist persecution and speak out for their constitutional liberties, on campus and beyond. Here I am with Riley and our colleague Kaitlynn Wheeler:

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=7c07faa552244c89bee30c84c967b0db&_e=fDiBJqfnf7i8Pu2NUqR1a2hXuaWjIm1MDIpSSTULu4nR8AxrHWnPPZlc_3z_z3Jvhpp9WlkBMdln5mOuotbK6A0tTq6s85fK7PzS8Ev9tk_uI71hnvNX3ZeiFSC-2ybc1mPNRQKepBR1pCWD9ErKPtpaZ4Rj8SNNAntSMWuRYxuDwnsbQUSiVkkcqqUvz0DdZ9ini9OIly2-SMdY4EKmoPcaqGlWwNtI4CVJ-CofQw0CTZUnp0b-Ji8l01PmsTqAFYLYLJFgZITjwvh6QFO_klMIuA3Mk9ymTMQYrUV18uPD-UNbJhVfMbJqRLFatMeKK4DnLM2J2Jn5thN857BCSJFzLH0ImjR6h_vKPj2S0IeDuXtMCyp-WWawwV9WJ_YtelJwGpJzRcdJMWcPaloFng%3D%3D)
18 million Americans are on college campuses across the country. Peter, if students aren’t free to write the truth in college classrooms, what freedoms can they count on? [Today I ask you to help conservative students fight for their rights this fall. ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=7c07faa552244c89bee30c84c967b0db&_e=fDiBJqfnf7i8Pu2NUqR1a2hXuaWjIm1MDIpSSTULu4nR8AxrHWnPPZlc_3z_z3Jvhpp9WlkBMdln5mOuotbK6A0tTq6s85fK7PzS8Ev9tk_uI71hnvNX3ZeiFSC-2ybc1mPNRQKepBR1pCWD9ErKPtpaZ4Rj8SNNAntSMWuRYxuDwnsbQUSiVkkcqqUvz0DdZ9ini9OIly2-SMdY4EKmoPcaqGlWwNtI4CVJ-CofQw0CTZUnp0b-Ji8l01PmsTqADfYN2InqOpiHt0q9Hg-386b5zTG3ZD1TCKhe9ZYLaT7RmEJ-4Hg6wJJYyYIm666TZnWmtf1NwwsWRJ3zFgz3MHuwr8VnpnTkre6wRDvoYwqDXwzM54_tHHRC7jAfRnBxul4o_nFxe4k5x6YlFUDK3w%3D%3D) With a new administration taking office, young conservatives’ preparedness to lead the battle for constitutional rights is more important than ever. Your Leadership Institute and its Riley Gaines Center train thousands of rising leaders coast-to-coast to lead that battle. clean_body: Stand bravely with me and Riley | Peter, They failed me. Leftist college administrators impose more and more unconstitutional restrictions on students like me: what we can say, do, and -- in my case -- write. Last year, I received a failing grade at the University of Cincinnati for using the term “biological women.” The university sided with my professor, refusing to recognize my right -- the right of every American -- to free speech. That’s why I joined the Riley Gaines Center here at your Leadership Institute -- to protect and train more young people to stand up against leftist persecution and speak out for their constitutional liberties, on campus and beyond. Here I am with Riley and our colleague Kaitlynn Wheeler: 18 million Americans are on college campuses across the country. Peter, if students aren’t free to write the truth in college classrooms, what freedoms can they count on? With a new administration taking office, young conservatives’ preparedness to lead the battle for constitutional rights is more important than ever. Your Leadership Institute and its Riley Gaines Center train thousands of rising leaders coast-to-coast to lead that battle. Your special gift will help more conservative students defend our liberties. Please let me count on you now. Thank you. Fight on, Olivia Krolczyk Ambassador Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute | The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States, (703) 247-2000

body:
The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.| | |

---
| |

#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=095d979889f04e4b88330b52e2ba1bd1&_e=oSBZIGKvR7ghtvAt1to5tNzAl5yw2mKH4Tq-nwjlsHw_bI7VcDM9SB67CuApM1PL8qJINsdRh0lk_5kWKFZJjHg0YF7bG7vzlnUKAt76AHDXG77WwSvbHZYbYqve-ancDF-Fyy2jxCXat30Yk-SkgnBykhm8dCScT755Rqcj4WnQy4MTAgZRSMEbVjptmfgPZsBti8-1CGRu-ZjqexekvsZy1sq4545FuQd0Vy59DrDMFj0yNssPVlkrGrAfIrDYiTLMVRLN0dFeD4Fij0aRzaWyOVidClkmAz5CcCdKTxhDno1PsJ1lJ6_Tjf9ezpr-ATyDxZOGlMPNONeoYqW908VxNfwjbOP3R2G5KzhFgiUp6fLjpQ5N0cfZvz83q-W-iRZE8wrXLtqG-zi1MSxaKa1Hf78fCY_oS-A7M2huidQ%3D)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=095d979889f04e4b88330b52e2ba1bd1&_e=oSBZIGKvR7ghtvAt1to5tNzAl5yw2mKH4Tq-nwjlsHw_bI7VcDM9SB67CuApM1PL8qJINsdRh0lk_5kWKFZJjHg0YF7bG7vzlnUKAt76AHDXG77WwSvbHZYbYqve-ancDF-Fyy2jxCXat30Yk-SkgnBykhm8dCScT755Rqcj4WnQy4MTAgZRSMEbVjptmfgPZsBti8-1CGRu-ZjqexekvsZy1sq4545FuQd0Vy59DrDMFj0yNssPVlkrGrAfIrDYiTLMVRLN0dFeD4Fij0aRzTd_ewWi3TE5DXe1-2zbiJue6ZFeeVCgwsMkwJVvE6ebwetczas4gpLDcJGSjscrjWgDxT1s4A6JguRERsbWfvbXgP5qUrO4fXnYBbYNYbDcJ78rXSxRKR80GO_ZG9xaxWE6Uqj6OQzy-yKDY6PXQbY%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=095d979889f04e4b88330b52e2ba1bd1&_e=oSBZIGKvR7ghtvAt1to5tNzAl5yw2mKH4Tq-nwjlsHw_bI7VcDM9SB67CuApM1PL8qJINsdRh0lk_5kWKFZJjHg0YF7bG7vzlnUKAt76AHDXG77WwSvbHZYbYqve-ancDF-Fyy2jxCXat30Yk-SkgnBykhm8dCScT755Rqcj4WnQy4MTAgZRSMEbVjptmfgPZsBti8-1CGRu-ZjqexekvsZy1sq4545FuQd0Vy59DrDMFj0yNssPVlkrGrAfIrDYiTLMVRLN0dFeD4Fij0aRzXhqDvo1ONUhiU__De-34RILhvLFcgyZvSSSUh8LRDJPpNLO7XNvVnl3ORDy8AC9EhCHPohdjZVZJBcL4e7D_xS-R9c--MgJSm66bXl_jxhe_qZPR0XWmJFKZhdD4Qk1bajXgp_hD1eyvxJ8cBbARXY%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=095d979889f04e4b88330b52e2ba1bd1&_e=oSBZIGKvR7ghtvAt1to5tNzAl5yw2mKH4Tq-nwjlsHw_bI7VcDM9SB67CuApM1PL8qJINsdRh0lk_5kWKFZJjHg0YF7bG7vzlnUKAt76AHDXG77WwSvbHZYbYqve-ancDF-Fyy2jxCXat30Yk-SkgnBykhm8dCScT755Rqcj4WnQy4MTAgZRSMEbVjptmfgPZsBti8-1CGRu-ZjqexekvsZy1sq4545FuQd0Vy59DrDMFj0yNssPVlkrGrAfIrDYiTLMVRLN0dFeD4Fij0aRzdMqDLmQgXlJ3lFCBShax_hBNhDlSlK5OLbo-rGse2ohWDR1kR8UxN7uYqjr31cXMzCtAdaD6ANQcvYX9XBAFLXSfGWwdTTh11n9pzXG54Gb0xDXqRKBqDjWLEtFi52Dxr_UoOJDNt2Ac1gAX_t1b4E%3D)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake

Kari Lake

| | P.S. It all started when Alvin Bragg indicted President Trump in New York. Then they bankrupted Rudy Giuliani. Threw Peter Navarro in jail. Arrested Pro-Life protestors. **And sued me for defamation.** Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the **“First Amendment Fund”** that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. Thank you for your support during this difficult time.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=095d979889f04e4b88330b52e2ba1bd1&_e=oSBZIGKvR7ghtvAt1to5tNzAl5yw2mKH4Tq-nwjlsHw_bI7VcDM9SB67CuApM1PL8qJINsdRh0lk_5kWKFZJjHg0YF7bG7vzlnUKAt76AHDXG77WwSvbHZYbYqve-ancDF-Fyy2jxCXat30Yk-SkgnBykhm8dCScT755Rqcj4WnQy4MTAgZRSMEbVjptmfgPZsBti8-1CGRu-ZjqexekvsZy1sq4545FuQd0Vy59DrDMFj0yNssPVlkrGrAfIrDYiTLMVRLN0dFeD4Fij0aRzeqx1l1JlnLzncmX5LcLBe8hZXNWb1MsjBmb62LEXeFQ4WBPlTHGuO8PHGJ-tWgylOG3xD5-dbhcCKjTAwWG6NjPlrtVeZRWAvhwQFWBlPkBVwyJlDYz9UCjmlCzQJK97S-zTwN3Nmrcrd4TLMVGC4I%3D)**

Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new“First Amendment Fund” to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy. Every dollar given to this “First Amendment Fund” will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly, | | Kari Lake | | | Kari Lake | | P.S. It all started when Alvin Bragg indicted President Trump in New York. Then they bankrupted Rudy Giuliani. Threw Peter Navarro in jail. Arrested Pro-Life protestors. And sued me for defamation. Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the “First Amendment Fund” that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. | | Paid for by American Media Council American Media Council PO Box 96602 Washington D.C. 20090-6602

subject: I’m not emailing you about my music
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=da0730b0ec4144eab4e5717976ff2683&_e=VyFeWVHkjFKtR0WYzVZW4hVc_RnK55ouF5nweSd6z-V4WDLFfwXlpMBFzZ5_19zPsFxak9GkT1ZZZB2dmT9cuW0Zzuy79OCw8Ox578yiG5GKAjLHGdfdaSJMHgFJneXpIJjeREDf6vrhJNJkTUwBKc-Y-Phzi7UWpK-jhrz38I4cexgfzH0NCUyuJnN-dkHSikLLZtmfT61D1oH4izL_MMpTevVZ8m3FtVXp9uyHBCbp27HO3-GEl4gaJM8MAJxoGQQaGVRikn095r1xKfpt3eShZZJ2BRUEHLuEiOTyyCB_zqFxGvm3288tq8hHOknNQo42mvqzAlJGd9KsX3cGVBLmMae8hqfw8ecRECw04bEDskrtZjykNOUpMZ3Hd-aCaN8iOu1jEFYUGle3cWozeg%3D%3D "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Peter,

Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools.

But have you ever wondered, "Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?"

It's not Woke teachers (although they don't help).
It's not even school boards.
It's Scholastic Book Fairs.

Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like _Where the Red Fern Grows_ , _Huckleberry Finn_ , and other classics.

Scholastic is now promoting books like _Welcome to St. Hell_ , which promotes trans ideology to kids.

clean_body: "SkyTree Book Fairs" Peter, Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools. But have you ever wondered, "Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?" It's not Woke teachers (although they don't help). It's not even school boards. It's Scholastic Book Fairs. Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like Where the Red Fern Grows , Huckleberry Finn , and other classics. Scholastic is now promoting books like Welcome to St. Hell , which promotes trans ideology to kids. SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic. Here's how you can help. SkyTree Book Fairs are already operating in schools to provide wholesome content for families. They are spreading across the entire country, and I wanted to share some photos of their recent events with you. SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination. I once said if a teacher is doing their job correctly, you should never know about their politics, details of their personal life, or cultural stances. It's the same with our kids' literature. Thank you, and God bless, John Rich SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023. |

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: The Future Looks Bright in America
body:
We are the dawn of a Golden Age | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=1e7af3a694)

# The Future Looks
# Bright in America
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | _By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator_
---
| As Donald Trump takes office, a sense of optimism is emerging nationwide. The middle class, often regarded as the backbone of America, is no longer being read, they are being positioned at the forefront of a bold economic and cultural renewal. Businesses are preparing to expand, families are beginning to feel the weight of economic strain lifting, and the concept of the American Dream—once thought to be fading—is being reignited. overlooked; ins
Trump’s presidency represents a paradigm shift—a government that embraces the dynamism of private enterprise, prioritizes results over politics, and advocates for the people who make this country thrive. From his focus on restoring jobs in communities once devastated by globalization to his plans for strengthening infrastructure and reimagining healthcare, the seeds of a brighter future are planted today.
Of course, there will be challenges ahead. Change of this magnitude only comes with resistance or the need for adjustment. However, if Trump’s early momentum is any indication, his administration is well-positioned to overcome obstacles and deliver on its promises. The president-elect has tapped into the hopes and ambitions of millions of Americans, and now he can channel those hopes into lasting, transformative action.
The future looks bright for America. With fresh leadership and a renewed commitment to the middle class, we are entering an era where opportunity is no longer reserved for the few but shared among all who strive for it. The challenging days of uncertainty and stagnation give way to an age of ambition, resilience, and growth.
_**The Trump presidency has opened the door to a new chapter of American greatness—and the best is yet to come.**_
---
|
---

From: Christina (personal) <info@bohannanforcongress.com>
Date: Fri, Nov 22, 2024
Subject: Until every vote is counted

Peter,

I want to first, again, say thank you. Your tireless dedication is truly unmatched, and it is because of you that our race for IA-01 is this close.

I also want to thank you for your patience. As we have requested a recount, and the process is underway, we are so grateful to continue to have you by our side. In the last presidential election, Mariannette Miller-Meeks only won by six votes. Right now, we’re only behind by a few hundred votes – or 0.2% of the vote total – and we are still fighting in this race.

With the stakes this high, and the votes this close, we need to ensure every vote is counted and every voice is heard. That’s why I want to ask you today if you could chip in once again to help us in this recount and finish what we started. You can make a donation here: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bohannanrfemail**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97548864/513795651/-678669148?refcode=em24_241123_rcfnd3_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_241123_rcfnd3_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=8c1df4e0-afa9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzFkZjRlMC1hZmE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GtjHrbborWTlkBGkGwE5F36E8b_bzGdFarHesqCXeUc=)

Thank you so much for your continued support,

– Christina

subject: This fight isn’t over yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
This fight isn’t over yet, team. **We still have a chance to build more Democratic power in the House.[Will you split a contribution between Fight Like Hell PAC and two House candidates who are still fighting to win their races to ensure we count every vote?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97548892/513795698/972137153?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20241123_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODUxZGY0ZTAtYWZhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AJu22xIjwnGtnyWeirMx520uziXgPTz0l0n6Dk1IMFQ=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97548893/513795699/972137153?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20241123_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODUxZGY0ZTAtYWZhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AJu22xIjwnGtnyWeirMx520uziXgPTz0l0n6Dk1IMFQ=)
---
As of this moment, these candidates are running in battleground House districts that are too close to call:
* Adam Gray (CA-13)
* Derek Tran (CA-45)

There are people in the field whose job is to ensure that every vote is counted in both of these races, and we need to make sure these campaigns continue to have resources to support this staff.
We have a real shot at electing more Democrats in the House that will fight like hell to protect our fundamental freedoms, defend Social Security and Medicare, and lower costs.
But we won’t be able to elect these champions for working people without your support.
**[There is still time to fight and build Democratic power in the House, and we need to leave it all on the field. name: Rep. Raskin is RIGHT! (via VPP)
subject: We can’t stop fighting now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Claim your spot on our exclusive letter to Rep. Raskin >>
| Rep. Jamie Raskin is RIGHT! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85169?t=6&akid=18089%2E878179%2EPpIDNU) We can’t be anything but STEADFAST in our commitment to preserving our Democracy — _especially_ with the Republican trifecta looming.

**Jamie Raskin led the charge to impeach Trump — and now, MAGA Republicans are seeking REVENGE...**

[**That’s why we’re sending an urgent letter to Raskin to prove that top Democrats fully support him! YOUR SIGNATURE SPOT CLOSES AT MIDNIGHT:_Sign on now!_ »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85169?t=7&akid=18089%2E878179%2EPpIDNU) | [32 SIGNATURE SPOTS REMAINING: Chip in $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85169?t=8&akid=18089%2E878179%2EPpIDNU)
---
TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank You! Rep. Raskin,

**I couldn’t be more thrilled to have your voice in the House at this critical time in our history.**

As a key part of the January 6th committee, you stood up to Donald Trump and his MAGA Republicans over and over again. _Now the GOP is furious at you,_but you continue to stand strong and lead our party forward.__

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of the work you’ve done to hold MAGA Republicans accountable – so I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to VPP to keep electing incredible Democrats just like you. As long as you keep fighting for Democracy, we’ll be beside you! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85169?t=9&akid=18089%2E878179%2EPpIDNU) Standing with you, **_X YOUR SIGNATURE HERE_** | [SIGN THE LETTER NOW! Chip in $3 to add your name! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85169?t=10&akid=18089%2E878179%2EPpIDNU)
---
32 SIGNATURE SPOTS LEFT! We’ll be sending our letter to Jamie Raskin promptly at 9AM. [**Don’t wait, friend: Sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85169?t=11&akid=18089%2E878179%2EPpIDNU)

-Team Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18089%2E878179%2EPpIDNU). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18089%2E878179%2EPpIDNU).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18089%2E878179%2EPpIDNU) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=18089%2E878179%2EPpIDNU). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18089%2E878179%2EPpIDNU)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=18089%2E878179%2EPpIDNU)

**$5.**
That’s the amount I’m asking you to contribute to my campaign today.
$5, because the GOP now controls the White House, Senate, AND the House.
$5, because the moment they regain power, they’ll push forward with their full-blown agenda: banning abortion, gutting Social Security and Medicare, and attacking our fundamental rights.
$5, because with far-right extremists now in a position to implement their ultraconservative agenda, it’s never been more critical to have progressive attorneys general like me standing in their way.
**I know $5 might not seem like much, but if every fearless fighter on this team contributes, we can continue to fight back against this dangerous far-right plan.**
**[So please, donate $5, or whatever you can, toward my $10,000 goal before midnight. Together, we can stop extremism from taking over our country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97549929/513798651/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1646-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmQyYjZhOS1iMmE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gDeyE7O5ea67FZxiiQt-CJm24uHySYlohP4cHFH-8uk=)**

Anti-Muslim hate crime on a pregnant woman, failing legacy media, ICC to arrest Netanyahu, and Trump advances fascism (sadly) with Democrat support. Let's dive into this week's recap for _Let 's Address This with Qasim Rashid_.
* * *
## Calls to Action
* **WHAT?** Simply watch an effective way to protect your identity & safety online
* **HOW?** [Check out my short video about DeleteMe](https://substack.com/redirect/a39b8ff8-6e56-4da1-a563-be90a7a278af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

I am doing everything in my power over the next 4 years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I welcome your support. **Subscribe below and join the movement.**.

## Articles This Week
* **Monday:**[Hate Crime Charges Filed After Anti-Muslim Attack Caught on Video](https://substack.com/redirect/b254899d-1ed0-408f-b0e3-01af011eff63?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): A racist attacked a pregnant Muslim woman as onlookers stood and watched
* **Monday:**[The Qasim Rashid Show Episode 146](https://substack.com/redirect/ae49a565-6915-4525-9c18-217d8d191438?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): How Biden can slow MAGA fascism, former Rep Marie Newman shares her key to future Dem victory
* **Tuesday:** [Legacy Media Is Failing, But We Have Options](https://substack.com/redirect/0b342d8d-dc3f-4192-b999-76f878c8d19a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): With historic lows in ratings, Americans are tired of misinformation--so let's talk solutions
* **Wednesday:**[UN Report--Netanyahu's Acts in Gaza Consistent With Genocide](https://substack.com/redirect/35bc4cbf-9605-4209-b9c6-9dd92362354d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Biden continues to arm Netanyahu despite his war crimes
* **Thursday:** [HR 9495 Threatens Non-Profits, Free Speech, & Civil Rights](https://substack.com/redirect/2513a759-9de2-443e-b9e5-19ee1422d862?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Sadly, 15 Democrats joined MAGA Republicans to pass this autocratic bill
* **Friday:**[ICC Issues Arrest Warrants For Netanyahu & Hamas Leaders](https://substack.com/redirect/2a92ffcf-c975-4653-a693-d806860f692e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Biden stands by Netanyahu, even as his own White House staff openly rebukes him

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97551006/513801985/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMwZTU3MGQtYjRhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8zhMcE1hlTGNFkv06_IW7jZDyIOHyZlsDgOTtQD3FnQ=&emci=67e15e30-18a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=830e570d-b4a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
The election was a punch to the gut.
Now, it’s time to punch back!
We’re not going to let Trump and his handpicked radical MAGA majority on the Supreme Court continue to rob women of their healthcare rights, refuse any challenge to gun laws, and continue to allow our politics to be awash in big money from billionaires and special interests.
Term Limit the Court is working with 75 members of the House and Senate to end lifetime appointments to the Supreme Court and enact 18-year term limits.
We’re already back at work!
Our plan is to back candidates for the House and Senate in the mid-terms, pledging to support the TERM Act.
We’re mounting a major public pressure campaign to tap into the 70% of Americans who agree with us and want Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito sent into retirement.
But we need your help!
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/term-limits-yes-inc-1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97551011/513801990/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMwZTU3MGQtYjRhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8zhMcE1hlTGNFkv06_IW7jZDyIOHyZlsDgOTtQD3FnQ=)
[**> >>We need a SCOTUS that calls balls and strikes and guarantees “Equal justice under law.”
For the sake of our nation, join the movement!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97551016/513802022/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMwZTU3MGQtYjRhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8zhMcE1hlTGNFkv06_IW7jZDyIOHyZlsDgOTtQD3FnQ=)
Alan Cohn
Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

**[Please pitch in what you can today to support the national campaign to create term limits for the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97551021/513802027/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMwZTU3MGQtYjRhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8zhMcE1hlTGNFkv06_IW7jZDyIOHyZlsDgOTtQD3FnQ=)**
[CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97551025/513802032/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMwZTU3MGQtYjRhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8zhMcE1hlTGNFkv06_IW7jZDyIOHyZlsDgOTtQD3FnQ=)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: What do all these signs and symbols mean for you?
body:
Truths from Revelation
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?
| | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e3baf37373b343a7aa7ada67db08780e&_e=gI6M1cSvxUadvZlIUcFHlaIj9W65e90dVfDEFsz9pH4HWmwcukkZrSgTD58HHRKXDm-fWvABH3NELJ-XKg-w7PRKpoYBlqtwwuYbSEPUqM9vH2y-00CMMPpdJFjkx-auX5LWjcXj5YUYM7JvXy0iL8hwgWIopU0yu7d--gRjdeqSL7harvy2CWbge5obwgtHNdvtMuJzBfUx9LTIXyv3zDe6cgpKARKm4FT6Evug32PwM-G3PikzqIP15FpuLQidiwtufTvTg1Q-Um6vwoFVDQiDpzEi54isoY6xI7tOkz91C8LuFybLL0CHoSKWtHJKan1jmaDxB8x1LSFViBXmHsWEDcbhpKg-gaOHsqVvDiOyJ5izr515not4lRXP68WCTNeHf3vS5L_POjO2VcfvWQ%3D%3D)
---
Hello Friend, Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return? _When we all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!_ _When we all see Jesus, we’ll sing and shout the victory!_ The words of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ’s return is going to be glorious! **But between now and then, how should we live**? What does God’s Word say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ... **what should our response be?**
---
| | When I have those kinds of questions, I turn to the book of Revelation, which I’ve found helps provide answers and strength in these dark days. And today, I’m pleased to offer you my verse-by-verse study of the book of Revelation entitled _Final Conquest._ Final Conquest is my first commentary on the book of Revelation. It’s all about the return of Jesus Christ, the most hope-filled event in human history. This book will help you face the future with confidence! God doesn’t want you to live in fear. Final Conquest will unpack God’s plan as never before — you’ll be encouraged!
---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e3baf37373b343a7aa7ada67db08780e&_e=gI6M1cSvxUadvZlIUcFHlaIj9W65e90dVfDEFsz9pH4HWmwcukkZrSgTD58HHRKXDm-fWvABH3NELJ-XKg-w7PRKpoYBlqtwwuYbSEPUqM9vH2y-00CMMPpdJFjkx-auX5LWjcXj5YUYM7JvXy0iL8hwgWIopU0yu7d--gRjdeqSL7harvy2CWbge5obwgtHNdvtMuJzBfUx9LTIXyv3zDe6cgpKARKm4FT6Evug32O8sVrSlvUZluj4gsgpCQRnHshF-vkMBkVZu0DAcww6EK2S1bHSTTKezL4is6dDpC9UGOqqsSkTurCuAs-KkhRbe-aQw44VK-QwmHy5nD3DbeMNXO5VzXZKAGiok4bX2KLtaiAwRBHMboyYnCg6dAgz-GrQodqL_U6tERglbaFtKA%3D%3D)
---
| | With your generous donation to _Pathway to Victory_ \-- to help keep our ministry strong, for you and your family, and for listeners and viewers across the country--I will send you a copy of _Final Conquest_ for free! You can make your most generous donation here: [https://secure.ptv.org/final-conquest-generous-gift-kit-1](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e3baf37373b343a7aa7ada67db08780e&_e=gI6M1cSvxUadvZlIUcFHlaIj9W65e90dVfDEFsz9pH4HWmwcukkZrSgTD58HHRKXDm-fWvABH3NELJ-XKg-w7PRKpoYBlqtwwuYbSEPUqM9vH2y-00CMMPpdJFjkx-auX5LWjcXj5YUYM7JvXy0iL8hwgWIopU0yu7d--gRjdeqSL7harvy2CWbge5obwgtHNdvtMuJzBfUx9LTIXyv3zDe6cgpKARKm4FT6Evug32OXno7po1V6scY3pzQK8oKSDP7aHdabDAUOd49NS2bmxErzfktINeRS-u7BB2femtv3VcTgMCEH6qET8RqFVPDSRu7xFrimN8ZpbCblfs6QMJE_DN96MN568hMbRZx4ceM3A3e39R0Ug-Ux3YbRmZNcEQ3vff9C5uGkYq16J3npVA%3D%3D) One day soon the darkness will pass...and our long-awaited King of kings and Lord of lords will return and make His final conquest. Until that moment, we are focusing our hope on Christ and working together to proclaim the gospel and expand His coming kingdom. Sincerely, Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

PO Box 223609. Dallas, TX 75222

What we raise during this giving season will make a measurable impact on what we’re able to accomplish together in the year ahead. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can she count on your support? = Nancy Pelosi is counting on you. If you want to stay updated but , let us know If you would like to completely from future emails, you can do so | Nancy Pelosi for Congress 700 13TH STREET NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States | | Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress

Hello Peter, Amidst all the post-election news, I wanted to make sure to take a moment to highlight an important victory for Democrats here in North Carolina: **Mo Green’s election as our next Superintendent of Public Instruction.** Mo is a fierce advocate for public education and public school teachers. He has years of experience fighting for NC public schools and is ready to stand up to any threat GOP legislators throw their way. He’s exactly the person we need in this critical role, helping shape the next generation of North Carolina’s leaders. Our team provided significant support to Mo’s campaign, and I want to thank you personally for your help. Mo’s opponent was a dangerous QAnon conspiracy theorist who would’ve done untold harm to students, teachers, and schools. You helped keep her out of power. **[I know we have a lot of work to do to make sure North Carolina’s students receive the quality of education they deserve, starting by fully funding our public school system. Will you sign my petition calling on Republican legislators to work with us to get students and teachers the resources they need? I know Mo Green would appreciate it, too. name: Ro Khanna
subject: TAKE ACTION: Ban PAC and lobbyist spending
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

The 2024 election shattered campaign spending records. According to OpenSecrets [https://www.opensecrets.org/news/2024/11/big-money-big-stakes-5-things-everyone-should-know-about-money-in-2024-election/] , federal election spending exceeded $16 billion, with nearly $4.5 billion coming from independent expenditures and $1.1 billion from dark money groups.

Sign if you agree: It’s time to eliminate corruption, big money, and dysfunction in Washington. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/pac-spending-petition?contactdata=fVjLgqhymZyZMJp2PQDyi+v0WJ04QNhl/LGobDlqKreNpFQrRmttqvgSkMWGA6XYMs8uYnhbjCNb4MoiCgSKW7gSROwgpLHeDywq9OlCH87T+YGbBHXijY3h/+TCKayM43+Dvjlp4vbn+5JdjdOF7Q==]

https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1858632651072274836 [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1858632651072274836]

I’ve never taken PAC or lobbyist money. When I was first elected, I co-founded the No PAC Caucus and introduced a bill to ban all PAC and lobbyist money from Congress.

Americans want to unrig Washington. To make that happen, we need to strike at the root of dysfunction–big money and special interest lobbying.

Tell Congress: Ban PAC and lobbyist spending. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/pac-spending-petition?contactdata=fVjLgqhymZyZMJp2PQDyi+v0WJ04QNhl/LGobDlqKreNpFQrRmttqvgSkMWGA6XYMs8uYnhbjCNb4MoiCgSKW7gSROwgpLHeDywq9OlCH87T+YGbBHXijY3h/+TCKayM43+Dvjlp4vbn+5JdjdOF7Q==]

Thank you for your activism and all that you do.

In solidarity,
Ro

Wait! One more thing–

Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.

If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

DONATE $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20241123-election-spending&amount=3]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20241123-election-spending]

https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com] https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA [https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA] https://twitter.com/RoKhanna [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna] info@rokhanna.com [info@rokhanna.com]

Ro for Congress
P.O Box 3513
Santa Clara, CA 95051
United States

Paid for by Ro for Congress

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/cIVR7XfUT02sRbeEdob-Og2?unsubscribedata=BMe2DUuuS38PV8nBwiPPOKhdC7orYWfMvGxh1AuChmXFDZ7UWDkkiafckcK36Na4xy0SA7%2BZ1O1LLSvlMOG5i1Q8t4g5C0GPuHokLXn%2Bcwa7bcDyM7%2FUGlkW4KiVR8s451aU9R3HcHEX%2Bo3yd%2BRkkh1G5vYXK9remKcP8kWgcJmZyA3kP%2BcDJ1whr3xpM0FSvf%2ByeZE5nL%2B3%2FE7MpLFNb66gHxqIYl7wddKTM2Wo0x3ymD21JUh6dWzgU30B223AQjuWQw7Y4u1BCb8pm0IPAPtYwONtqMK8KLDtM7RIF4Hy7xuMSNTu7ALmx9hhhQLhR4MG7GrelrfB29KLSW87b30HfmPM8c4uQ5cFzCuOGYfGKXcBLynpZ90jx938lrXhLR6txcN5W6%2BWCIfCdGaHMu8ezVH7ZScdSjcaYAiJ0q3QuUWMowHQtHLgvCO36Sj%2F .

name: The Collective PAC
subject: from governors’ races to local elections

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9biRkT0ZFLBZo_8f8EnE7Jowo6A0R8oop8Rrw_kitS3sMwrJn2ozruxmkvaG936_l1duoWABImS72zia5WVvFdVfe-L3XbKPqamdZ01CAI769LWkQVG7D23IpipCclcUYBqO1K4bIOmnLFDOLhxeOfUUIiFwmr9hJJZvhNea1Y99YP9ap2zYwJm3PfXLpj0YEZtyWhyytvv-nVN-PwdLHuFJ9CM6wLPHOvoLI7c8T3fsYCxYVKqPvApPIVaxR7Ull4UaXccxqSDeSJm3Qap9N7ZOPQewZGERVqHZ80uFRalHfS-67ayWKbD4lsl1S4yDVhC8J8THa8MK1usFQZVk1Aie6ChalYF2CG4dL2u9a0MydVjTGPIXsWfmpFQ6K1XkWFR7E03bUkSf0cRUUwfAxcPCbXDEj792REwMXj0IPj43pv1TG2J7rIGec5pdGZP-0/4bp/1b7cw0nOSG2VI_yFzn6tCw/h0/h001.3ZiXXUUPULhRAMPHE4TvG6lu8IWIzU3lPBVnn9Fn164)
| | Peter,

Looking forward to the next few years, we need to make sure we have what it takes to defend our communities from the continued threat of Trumpism and the right-wing agenda.

That’s why **we’re focusing on state and local levels across the country right now.** From governors’ races in New Jersey and Virginia to local elections across the nation, these races are key to ensuring we have leaders in place who will protect our values, our communities, and defend our future from Trump’s dangerous agenda.

**As we chart the course for 2025, we want to hear from you —[will you click here to take our short survey and let us know what your focus is in 2025?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38etALaB2A0_pShuGOpdyBt8EoshvprBzCLcqXBEO58ivsL08qEj3sYZNl8FGFx_7uczfeEYb4bF2RFvxJAGGzWDiCligUp7q1EwFp8Hlei-u0MqgkvnSMiDv_qBtvQVqjTGeNn8QPDq4sTsbZFL1qpI2vEOheoCtGNEFyMedsQucjp39CgBhF63WUi8aBKfQzrt-R_hYkzUhKmK-lPO6XQxZmSfkr-8PagY5bi0nuiq7cCS_CRY0XKaVzdm-hjjjitjMuhMQlQQDMixqfMVusNpNisV5628J64AL-OvrF26Ru_NozIIcG9TqPOE-JCZIbHoqeSqOfloMLdOpQL6FK_/4bp/1b7cw0nOSG2VI_yFzn6tCw/h1/h001.lmJtJGZA-EOcNOQIiJnkOc8k0U3sLMY28zHakg2n8RU)** | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38etALaB2A0_pShuGOpdyBt8EoshvprBzCLcqXBEO58ivsL08qEj3sYZNl8FGFx_7uczfeEYb4bF2RFvxJAGGzWDiCligUp7q1EwFp8Hlei-u0MqgkvnSMiDv_qBtvQVqjTGeNn8QPDq4sTsbZFL1qptMZ5KJNo6WLH6-FZVulD0I5ZTNtb84_QV4c5QlgmW7NpcSr5RdILI22yQWDCZ9SpY92B2-UUMEH6ejg7SD26vCDphZMU6JnG56YlyaDX0V6VW-GUaRWpKC-LG0tY2is1wjnlqEhMHA7v5AbqqyKlSK-Lissqf488Dcjdup3jctGoWvUMFi3tGOdHefhrsBCx/4bp/1b7cw0nOSG2VI_yFzn6tCw/h2/h001.QGPk3H3Nv8giCUgU2kjUBiKRIQANdYzYweavS1tV9-8)
---
The Collective PAC is more committed than ever to get organizers on the ground, secure critical wins, and make major steps forward in the next few years to fight back against Trump.

But we can’t do it without you, Peter. Together, we can make sure we're ready to take on the challenges ahead and defend what matters most.

— The Collective PAC
* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtMtM9o7MpfQTM1SqECAoa9PnuvrCzoBy5DfIGWsplANbnjpBAv4hJoqiZg5D3GXPrH7PmHbPVZX2RjyFDYCVfzNMnwuZyP8Ll1l8xMRHobGVZXmpaYhr0tMmute7rCYtBMDNQWZuLcNLAPivLkv6vr_PiY9wnNrlwvilED1WImwKbkATnN3_ESzsx8r9XZFq1eM8yLutrGsd07neiN4Q5S29j51bHAmWV66sdByN-IKqL2zGaYQ5o5vhHq_iUW2XPzY7jqfu059SVT1c8JeTkZFhTpA3OAT_9kjgEG6qivi6el1ceUWHYhA7atMvluMkX5JPvSwoZLSpB2XNFkrn4bEOaElQvLQi4By6x-f6GX-Lk3aP5jsO_WorLioHqjCkgP5yFxaTJ9KgH6kfTTNINGmVvr9wwfbA2i6stWfoA5wg/4bp/1b7cw0nOSG2VI_yFzn6tCw/h3/h001.dSfkdeFXPYH65O3zLs0218CQbJ1yTXuhFZNxGhoI1Tk) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 500 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

Friend, This week, the Biden administration:
* Lobbied members of Congress against the first-ever Congressional vote to block weapons sales to Israel. Despite this pressure, nearly half of all Democratic Senators (19) voted to uphold U.S. and international law, standing with the majority of Americans—and the majority of Jewish Americans—who want to cut off U.S. weapons to Israel.
* Vetoed a ceasefire resolution at the United Nations, for the fourth time since last October.
* Tried to undermine the International Criminal Court’s historic arrest warrants for Israel’s Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and former Defense Minister Yoav Gallant for war crimes and crimes against humanity. This further isolates the U.S. from the international community: Leaders in Canada and multiple European countries have already affirmed that they’ll arrest Netanyahu and Gallant if these war criminals step foot in their countries.

We’re seeing historic steps from U.S. Senators and international leaders that show the tide is turning. **The days of the Israeli apartheid government operating with impunity are ending.** We must keep pressuring the U.S. federal government to end our complicity in these violations of human rights and laws. We must stop arming and funding this genocide and stop shielding Israel from accountability. **We have other tools to pressure President Biden in these last months while he's still in office.** My sister-in-service Rep. Cori Bush and I recently led a letter to President Biden to make clear that his actions—such as deploying U.S. troops to the region, intelligence sharing, and operational coordination with Israeli forces—require Congressional authorization. These unauthorized actions violate Article I of the U.S. Constitution and the War Powers Resolution of 1973. Congress can act to bring troops home and more. [**Will you sign on to support our recent letter to President Biden, pushing for an end to U.S. involvement in genocide and Israel’s regional war?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-v4-yKgeScPwECjr-3C52u-ZSI0YD2oZLwndrwUDQpplIcV-45mOkAW_J_2Lkc0i8YOFanhC8uI-niU5BX8qTjIOBfsU4tc_0Rjh9uN_oPmQ_hx9YaToqi8reuXwppD_68PWKIllMMfZCWFNbK8LAdxyL7M6av8duDO-pmWbKJ_yf1hF4jsAj7VXr3GiDr9fikCoHInWY7gH9x9NDHXaRPe-rmds5vwssx7x0YxhLVGXEuyUTNXoGgQr8wy3RYvOXwCxy72h9pu2VT_hapFCsGaX55H76BjAQavHLjIoVlHBu9n05Jk7Qq-aV-sOqkyWAc68E5wK_mhU1tS83G9f2xq6ObGSUbBLTgXe-rMmw8KgJHDmsj-U5jxv1jMJThYWGh-wzvSHcfoRde-CDG-tJUb48tb9WKJfI5hZIAo-ePrkqqknj5lEFjz8VdNHYXUS5evXJMd1WC2TAT8cGzmo6-xiSlYyp1hpEMsMc63Ai8mgR_l417XZ04PU-RvyX3FvE/4bp/fW0-6Nj-Q8iusuR20XYu-w/h1/h001.s3MsLGD5_zhf21ygqF6JuetvH__MU6FgulLhPC71Xh0) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-v4-yKgeScPwECjr-3C52u-ZSI0YD2oZLwndrwUDQpplIcV-45mOkAW_J_2Lkc0i8YOFanhC8uI-niU5BX8qTjyw3QTygU9f4wWCwEVHjRX8Gv-Vkvt1EN8VPlagtLoOvx2OZRrUIPCiuCxL6zwPaUmsvKxsKZL6eVDjqKqSKVZlx03BDfTKWwhBT9B4JnqWDG2VweuVN33Oe7lVNfinv3UJVjxfoSwa7DgSAHV5IhpwVKDBly8Fit1V0yyph2y2gw8PJ48ja9HmcDWmfTKXyobyJH7VHxraddbQINuFtInGwI6FPcAHpNFaTizRc7KRLE-2paL8QdIQQrBlCuyma-DBeVcOSn7rxDU3epkRiwTqTfheOoACyQK610BLbZeEmvMKYbGem4fQK-UU38WmMjIEI2onSj8sk3ymL7UPhn7K7UQc-BOO_SfchdUDnr3hg4NlmsMqbnsqL-ieedTfMZLePiFdHrC7FaHaabB7oSm-OrWlvC3S-kXtOURp1ocFI/4bp/fW0-6Nj-Q8iusuR20XYu-w/h2/h001.q7jH5jTeRKk12QIaTpDWb8FM6eZwkGdjYlFJRxhP2kY)

For decades, unconditional support for Israeli atrocities against Palestinians has been a shared bipartisan stance in the U.S., but our movement is bringing much-needed change. We must build on this momentum and continue pushing our federal government to uphold U.S. and international laws.
Last week, I spoke on the floor of the U.S. House of Representatives about the Biden administration’s failure to act despite sending a letter giving Israel’s government 30 days to stop blocking aid into Gaza. That deadline has passed and although Israel’s government continues to block even more aid, the Biden administration announced it will do nothing.
As the Institute for Middle East Understanding wrote:_“The letter’s recognition that Israel has been blocking aid from entering Gaza over recent months itself is evidence that the U.S. should have suspended all weapons to Israel immediately, according to the law.”_ I explained on the House floor that U.S. law is very clear: No nation blocking U.S. humanitarian assistance can receive U.S. weapons.
**The Biden administration cannot pick and choose when they comply with our own laws** , including laws that restrict military assistance to countries violating human rights and laws that require Congressional authorization before involving U.S. Armed Forces in war.
[**Add your name today: Hold President Biden accountable for violating U.S. laws and our constitution by co-signing the Congressional letter that Rep. Cori Bush and I led earlier this month.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-v4-yKgeScPwECjr-3C52u-ZSI0YD2oZLwndrwUDQpplIcV-45mOkAW_J_2Lkc0i8YOFanhC8uI-niU5BX8qTjDoZmnhozO3-lWAEievw0XHE6Czly8DPkpRQA9vmMliCnPjciEUpFAFv-sK_18uWmeQHtOPSqazajn_Eoju5fMb6SDINsPf__gISZNCrs7poE_GheBFbae5OJOz5Et_a1nV2Rv1bhfJwxuJ3THZE5aEhp9r-ONZOjJhW0Wv4SsEzEZxks1HMZArKHcWC_pv8-3YW60NANmDeIymSQyUzeZuP6hzBOeBzILjAqfOf_Rzc7eOFnIxFsiV0Vd367SP8kxF4qvtSCIMrWD3dv8akb2BUEa_3cC26eR9f_VpGAAz4izJ1mwMiZhVC-D-tBbQgEhWABZCui4IP8FPDt9F6vTB8RtDzNt-o_vM3n-vW_J1VNjHjeiV0lh341cX2zdtylxTi3M0LoDQr4RpYPIo1CVHj7p936CaX-jrFPn1_mRP0/4bp/fW0-6Nj-Q8iusuR20XYu-w/h3/h001.pjtD-_WQVL3s97ntYGC0N6T_qeNj1sXYtm1SQY9Cw7g)

In solidarity,
Rashida

name: Adam Gray
subject: Count every vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
| My name is Adam Gray and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District. When I ran for this seat in 2022, our race came down to just 564 votes. It was the second-closest race in the entire country. This year, I know that we can finish the job. Right now, our race is **_still too close to call_** and we know it’s going to come down to every last vote. [**Will you split a donation between our recount fund and DASS PAC today to ensure we can count every vote in CA-13 and flip this seat?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97557093/513822261/-1980978591?refcode=em-11.23.24-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2U0OWQzZi1iZWE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_JEyEy7LwDqCayqtCrUiPIN1bkDC3ODCzX3pSMcorE=) | | ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97557094/513822262/-1980978591?refcode=em-11.23.24-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2U0OWQzZi1iZWE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_JEyEy7LwDqCayqtCrUiPIN1bkDC3ODCzX3pSMcorE=)****

I decided to run for Congress again because the San Joaquin Valley deserves leaders who work just as hard as we do. I got into this race to finally get results for this community, just like I did for 10 years in the California State Assembly.
**I’ve been part of close races before, and we knew this year’s race would be another one.** As votes continue to be counted, I just want to say how thankful I am to have your support.
**Let’s finish the job. That means counting every single vote.**
[**This isn’t over. Please split a donation of $10 or more between our recount fund and DASS PAC. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Please met Freyja (aka Sweet Little Ramona):
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Our family is growing and I wanted you to be among the first to know.
Please met Freyja (aka Sweet Little Ramona):
Freyja is a rescue who joins canines Artemis and Count Ziggenpuss (aka Ziggy), cats Silver and Sky, bearded dragon Sandman, and seven unnamed chickens, four geckos and a horse named Teddy.
Molly’s training Freyja to sit and to not pee in the house. And this morning Amy and I took her on the mountain to see what kind of shape she’s in. (She did good.)
Spending time with this playful, curious puppy has been a nice break from the news of the day.
We can only put it off for so long, but it’s nice while it lasts.
I hope you are well,
Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20241123-239904-footer&t=1&refcode2=239904_444211_Zmp67b&akid=239904%2E444211%2EZmp67b)**

name: COURIER
subject: When Morning Joe met Trump: A warning for democracy
body:
Trump’s actions follow a well-worn authoritarian playbook: Undermine the free press. Spread fear. Silence dissent.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97557525/513823515/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWYwMmEzNjItYmZhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8OkhGiwPoUXP5Zt_xz0j30oCzYkMu31uBxlMHd6ixEo=&emci=ad02a362-bfa9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=af02a362-bfa9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=14016711)
Peter **–**
This week, _Morning Joe_ hosts Joe Scarborough and Mika Brzezinski made a pilgrimage to Mar-a-Lago.
Why? Reports say the MSNBC hosts, who have often criticized Trump, were afraid of possible retaliation from his new administration. While they defended the meeting as “diplomacy,” it underscores how authoritarian threats can instill fear, prompting even vocal critics to change course in an effort to protect themselves.
This isn’t just about one meeting—it’s yet another warning sign of how Trump’s authoritarianism is chilling the free press. Trump frequently threatens to jail reporters, revoke broadcast licenses, and strip legal protections for journalists. These calculated moves aim to intimidate, silence, and erode free speech, putting the independence of the press—and democracy itself—at risk.
[**If you believe in fearless, independent media that won’t bend to Trump’s authoritarian tactics, chip in $25 now to support COURIER’s critical work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97557526/513823516/-593472309?refcode=20241123-EM-MediaFear&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWYwMmEzNjItYmZhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8OkhGiwPoUXP5Zt_xz0j30oCzYkMu31uBxlMHd6ixEo=)
**Trump’s actions follow a well-worn authoritarian playbook: Undermine the free press. Spread fear. Silence dissent.**
This is the same strategy perfected by leaders like Vladimir Putin. Putin doesn’t need to send every dissenter to a gulag like Stalin did—he only needs to target a handful of high-profile journalists publicly. The fear he generates ensures others fall in line – dissent comes with consequences.
Trump, who has openly praised strongmen like Putin, is borrowing directly from that playbook. His allies in Congress are working to block the PRESS Act, a bipartisan bill designed to protect journalists from government surveillance. He’s vowed to take control of independent agencies like the FCC to punish critical voices. And his “jokes” about exacting violence on journalists mirror the chilling tactics used by authoritarian regimes to keep opposition in check.
**The strategy is already working. You can see it in the behavior of Scarborough and Brzezinski, and you can see it in Jeff Bezos’ decision to pull the _Washington Post_ ’s endorsement of Kamala Harris during the election.**
As fear spreads, the press becomes less willing to challenge those in power, clearing the path for unchecked authoritarianism.
**We can’t let that happen. Here’s how COURIER is fighting back:**
* **Standing firm against intimidation:** While others might be afraid to call out Trump’s authoritarianism, we won’t.
* **Reaching voters where it matters:** On social media, in email, and beyond, we bring factual reporting directly to the places where right-wing hate and propaganda spreads.
* **Delivering what voters need:** From exposing propaganda to empowering communities with the truth about the real issues impacting their lives, our work ensures voters have the facts to do their part to protect our democracy.

[**If you believe in protecting democracy and standing up to authoritarianism, chip in $25 to help COURIER expand our reach and continue delivering fearless journalism.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97557527/513823517/-593472309?refcode=20241123-EM-MediaFear&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWYwMmEzNjItYmZhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8OkhGiwPoUXP5Zt_xz0j30oCzYkMu31uBxlMHd6ixEo=)

clean_body: Trump’s actions follow a well-worn authoritarian playbook: Undermine the free press. Spread fear. Silence dissent. Peter – This week, Morning Joe hosts Joe Scarborough and Mika Brzezinski made a pilgrimage to Mar-a-Lago. Why? Reports say the MSNBC hosts, who have often criticized Trump, were afraid of possible retaliation from his new administration. While they defended the meeting as “diplomacy,” it underscores how authoritarian threats can instill fear, prompting even vocal critics to change course in an effort to protect themselves. This isn’t just about one meeting—it’s yet another warning sign of how Trump’s authoritarianism is chilling the free press. Trump frequently threatens to jail reporters, revoke broadcast licenses, and strip legal protections for journalists. These calculated moves aim to intimidate, silence, and erode free speech, putting the independence of the press—and democracy itself—at risk. = Trump’s actions follow a well-worn authoritarian playbook: Undermine the free press. Spread fear. Silence dissent. This is the same strategy perfected by leaders like Vladimir Putin. Putin doesn’t need to send every dissenter to a gulag like Stalin did—he only needs to target a handful of high-profile journalists publicly. The fear he generates ensures others fall in line – dissent comes with consequences. Trump, who has openly praised strongmen like Putin, is borrowing directly from that playbook. His allies in Congress are working to block the PRESS Act, a bipartisan bill designed to protect journalists from government surveillance. He’s vowed to take control of independent agencies like the FCC to punish critical voices. And his “jokes” about exacting violence on journalists mirror the chilling tactics used by authoritarian regimes to keep opposition in check. The strategy is already working. You can see it in the behavior of Scarborough and Brzezinski, and you can see it in Jeff Bezos’ decision to pull the Washington Post ’s endorsement of Kamala Harris during the election. As fear spreads, the press becomes less willing to challenge those in power, clearing the path for unchecked authoritarianism. We can’t let that happen. Here’s how COURIER is fighting back: Standing firm against intimidation: While others might be afraid to call out Trump’s authoritarianism, we won’t. Reaching voters where it matters: On social media, in email, and beyond, we bring factual reporting directly to the places where right-wing hate and propaganda spreads. Delivering what voters need: From exposing propaganda to empowering communities with the truth about the real issues impacting their lives, our work ensures voters have the facts to do their part to protect our democracy. = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- Thank you for standing with us, In solidarity, The COURIER Team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

name: News Team @ Our Revolution
subject: Election Lessons: Where We Go From Here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: The Path Forward | Resist Trump: Rapid Response Team | John
Nichols: 3 Reasons Harris Lost | Larry Cohen: End Dark Money | Jane Kleeb:
Invest in Local Party-Building | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

THE PATH FORWARD

As we prepare for a second Trump term, one thing is clear: We need a
Democratic Party that will stand with the working class in our fight
against the oligarchs.

With a change in party leadership underway, progressives have a chance to
reshape the party to be more democratic and less beholden to the corporate
donors and consultants.

This is also a time for our movement to grow in strength and solidarity —
to make our communities more resilient and mount a powerful resistance to
Trump and his far right cronies. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17429?t=1011&akid=7300%2E5885482%2Eff8G9Z ]Please chip in what you can to build
our resources for the fights ahead >>

★ ★ ★

We just launched Our Revolution’s new [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20584?t=1012&akid=7300%2E5885482%2Eff8G9Z ]Rapid Response Team — connecting
progressives around the country in a network that can jump into action to
resist Trump.

Sign up to get looped in and we will reach out with actions — which could
include calling your reps, joining a protest, or amplifying important
information on social media.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20584?t=1013&akid=7300%2E5885482%2Eff8G9Z ]JOIN THE TEAM

★ ★ ★

ELECTION ANALYSIS

On Monday, writer John Nichols joined Our Revolution’s [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20585?t=1014&akid=7300%2E5885482%2Eff8G9Z ]live organizing
call to breakdown the election results and draw lessons to help prevent
such a defeat from ever happening again.

Nichols attributes Harris’ loss to 3 main issues. First — the need to
represent change, “and the first place to do that was on Gaza,” he said.
“It should’ve started at the convention with a Palestinian speaker on
stage.”

The second mistake was reaching out to ‘never Trump Republicans’ rather
than progressives. “The strategy of taking Liz Cheney across the Rust Belt
was never going to move votes — in fact, it may have moved some people
away,” Nichols said.

And finally, he pointed out the failure to appeal to working class voters
or center unions in the campaign. “She had an opening to talk about how
Trump’s approach to trade actually harmed American workers in states like
Wisconsin, Michigan, and Pennsylvania.”

Nichols said, “If Harris had taken those days she spent with Liz Cheney
and instead went to union halls with Shawn Fain or Bernie Sanders, I think
you’d have a very different result.”

★ ★ ★

Similarly, Our Revolution executive director Joseph Geevarghese pinned
Harris’ loss on taking the progressive vote for granted in an op-ed in
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20586?t=1015&akid=7300%2E5885482%2Eff8G9Z ]The Hill:

“In short, her team of veteran campaign strategists and consultants
misjudged the electorate. They assumed, as they did in 2016, that this
election would be a referendum on Donald Trump, when it was actually a
referendum on the Democratic Party’s shift from the needs of ordinary
Americans.”

“Absent from the campaign trail was any real commitment to boost the
minimum wage, expand Medicare and take on pharma, or blunt private equity
fueling the housing crisis,” Joseph wrote.

Like John Nichols, he believes Harris might have seized the moment with a
powerful populist economic message, naming real corporate adversaries.
“Instead, she courted billionaire Mark Cuban and war hawk Liz Cheney,” he
said.

★ ★ ★

But enough lamenting the loss. It’s time to look forward. With elections
for new DNC leadership slated for early 2025, we are looking to have an
outsized voice in shifting the direction of the DNC and all 57 state
parties (including territories).

Our Revolution Board Chair Larry Cohen spoke to thousands on [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20585?t=1016&akid=7300%2E5885482%2Eff8G9Z ]our call
Monday about the prospects for change. Larry, a longtime DNC member, led
the Unity Reform Commission after Bernie 2016 which got rid of
superdelegates.

Now, Larry says, “the number one party reform is to get dark money out of
the nominating process” — and he sees an opportunity for progressives to
build out state and local parties, which have long been neglected.

★ ★ ★

As we work to make the Democratic Party more democratic and responsive to
the grassroots, we want to hear from YOU! [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20587?t=1017&akid=7300%2E5885482%2Eff8G9Z ]Take our survey to weigh in
on changes you want to see in the party.

Some of the preliminary results of the survey indicate that progressive
priorities include getting dark money out and ensuring a more democratic
primary process — no more coronations!

Many of you also say you’d like to see corporate consultants removed from
party leadership, more financial transparency, and greater investment in
state and local organizing. We couldn’t agree more!

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution Board Member and Nebraska Party Chair Jane Kleeb spoke
directly to the need for party-building on [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20585?t=1018&akid=7300%2E5885482%2Eff8G9Z ]our organizing call.

Jane advocated for more funding for state parties for grassroots
organizing, which currently get just 8% of the DNC annual budget. And, she
called for us to help elect more progressives and populists within the DNC
to impact decisions on budgets and messaging to reflect the needs of local
communities.

Jane noted one major red flag she noticed with the Harris campaign was the
use of a data model that big consultants came up with — unfortunately, it
included every “Cheney Republican” but did not target all Democrats with
mail-in ballots.

★ ★ ★

Corporate Dems like Rahm Emanuel are already jockeying to re-take control
of the Democratic Party. We can’t let the Establishment win and continue
to ignore progressive voters and working class priorities. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20588?t=1019&akid=7300%2E5885482%2Eff8G9Z ]Read more
here.

Now, more than ever, we need your help to defeat enemies of the working
class in order to beat back Trump and rising rightwing authoritarianism.
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17429?t=1020&akid=7300%2E5885482%2Eff8G9Z ]Help us build our network of organizers and make sure we are prepared
to transform the party in 2025. Thank you.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Join Our Revolution’s new [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20584?t=1021&akid=7300%2E5885482%2Eff8G9Z ]Rapid Response Team — to connect with
progressives around the country in a network ready to jump into action to
resist Trump. We will keep you in the loop to take part in protests and
collective actions that can make a difference.

★ ★ ★

Don’t forget to [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20587?t=1022&akid=7300%2E5885482%2Eff8G9Z ]take the survey and help us strategize for the coming
battle over the future of the Democratic Party. We need to hear from you
as we work to make the party more democratic and more responsive to the
grassroots!

★ ★ ★

People Over Profits. This is a message many need to hear as we chart a new
path forward. Pick up one of our most popular T-shirts and make a
statement as we head into a new year. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20589?t=1023&akid=7300%2E5885482%2Eff8G9Z ]Get yours here!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17429?t=1024&akid=7300%2E5885482%2Eff8G9Z ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------
