clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION HEADLINES: The Path Forward | Resist Trump: Rapid Response Team | John Nichols: 3 Reasons Harris Lost | Larry Cohen: End Dark Money | Jane Kleeb: Invest in Local Party-Building | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ THE PATH FORWARD As we prepare for a second Trump term, one thing is clear: We need a Democratic Party that will stand with the working class in our fight against the oligarchs. With a change in party leadership underway, progressives have a chance to reshape the party to be more democratic and less beholden to the corporate donors and consultants. This is also a time for our movement to grow in strength and solidarity — to make our communities more resilient and mount a powerful resistance to Trump and his far right cronies. [ ]Please chip in what you can to build our resources for the fights ahead >> ★ ★ ★ We just launched Our Revolution’s new [ ]Rapid Response Team — connecting progressives around the country in a network that can jump into action to resist Trump. Sign up to get looped in and we will reach out with actions — which could include calling your reps, joining a protest, or amplifying important information on social media. [ ]JOIN THE TEAM ★ ★ ★ ELECTION ANALYSIS On Monday, writer John Nichols joined Our Revolution’s [ ]live organizing call to breakdown the election results and draw lessons to help prevent such a defeat from ever happening again. Nichols attributes Harris’ loss to 3 main issues. First — the need to represent change, “and the first place to do that was on Gaza,” he said. “It should’ve started at the convention with a Palestinian speaker on stage.” The second mistake was reaching out to ‘never Trump Republicans’ rather than progressives. “The strategy of taking Liz Cheney across the Rust Belt was never going to move votes — in fact, it may have moved some people away,” Nichols said. And finally, he pointed out the failure to appeal to working class voters or center unions in the campaign. “She had an opening to talk about how Trump’s approach to trade actually harmed American workers in states like Wisconsin, Michigan, and Pennsylvania.” Nichols said, “If Harris had taken those days she spent with Liz Cheney and instead went to union halls with Shawn Fain or Bernie Sanders, I think you’d have a very different result.” ★ ★ ★ Similarly, Our Revolution executive director Joseph Geevarghese pinned Harris’ loss on taking the progressive vote for granted in an op-ed in [ ]The Hill: “In short, her team of veteran campaign strategists and consultants misjudged the electorate. They assumed, as they did in 2016, that this election would be a referendum on Donald Trump, when it was actually a referendum on the Democratic Party’s shift from the needs of ordinary Americans.” “Absent from the campaign trail was any real commitment to boost the minimum wage, expand Medicare and take on pharma, or blunt private equity fueling the housing crisis,” Joseph wrote. Like John Nichols, he believes Harris might have seized the moment with a powerful populist economic message, naming real corporate adversaries. “Instead, she courted billionaire Mark Cuban and war hawk Liz Cheney,” he said. ★ ★ ★ But enough lamenting the loss. It’s time to look forward. With elections for new DNC leadership slated for early 2025, we are looking to have an outsized voice in shifting the direction of the DNC and all 57 state parties (including territories). Our Revolution Board Chair Larry Cohen spoke to thousands on [ ]our call Monday about the prospects for change. Larry, a longtime DNC member, led the Unity Reform Commission after Bernie 2016 which got rid of superdelegates. Now, Larry says, “the number one party reform is to get dark money out of the nominating process” — and he sees an opportunity for progressives to build out state and local parties, which have long been neglected. ★ ★ ★ As we work to make the Democratic Party more democratic and responsive to the grassroots, we want to hear from YOU! [ ]Take our survey to weigh in on changes you want to see in the party. Some of the preliminary results of the survey indicate that progressive priorities include getting dark money out and ensuring a more democratic primary process — no more coronations! Many of you also say you’d like to see corporate consultants removed from party leadership, more financial transparency, and greater investment in state and local organizing. We couldn’t agree more! ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution Board Member and Nebraska Party Chair Jane Kleeb spoke directly to the need for party-building on [ ]our organizing call. Jane advocated for more funding for state parties for grassroots organizing, which currently get just 8% of the DNC annual budget. And, she called for us to help elect more progressives and populists within the DNC to impact decisions on budgets and messaging to reflect the needs of local communities. Jane noted one major red flag she noticed with the Harris campaign was the use of a data model that big consultants came up with — unfortunately, it included every “Cheney Republican” but did not target all Democrats with mail-in ballots. ★ ★ ★ Corporate Dems like Rahm Emanuel are already jockeying to re-take control of the Democratic Party. We can’t let the Establishment win and continue to ignore progressive voters and working class priorities. [ ]Read more here. Now, more than ever, we need your help to defeat enemies of the working class in order to beat back Trump and rising rightwing authoritarianism. [ ]Help us build our network of organizers and make sure we are prepared to transform the party in 2025. Thank you. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Join Our Revolution’s new [ ]Rapid Response Team — to connect with progressives around the country in a network ready to jump into action to resist Trump. We will keep you in the loop to take part in protests and collective actions that can make a difference. ★ ★ ★ Don’t forget to [ ]take the survey and help us strategize for the coming battle over the future of the Democratic Party. We need to hear from you as we work to make the party more democratic and more responsive to the grassroots! ★ ★ ★ People Over Profits. This is a message many need to hear as we chart a new path forward. Pick up one of our most popular T-shirts and make a statement as we head into a new year. [ ]Get yours here! ★ ★ ★ [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

name: Jay Jones
subject: More than just being the first
body:
jayjones.com [jayjones.com]
Folks, I come from a family of committed public servants for Virginia.
My grandfather was an attorney and civil rights pioneer who was passionate about supporting public education. He was the first African-American to serve on the Norfolk School Board and the Virginia State Board of Education.
After a long career as a prosecutor keeping Virginia’s families safe, my mom is a judge in Norfolk. And my father has worked in all three branches of state government. He is a retired judge, directed the Department of Juvenile Justice, and was a long-serving Delegate in our General Assembly – holding the same seat that I went on to hold.
As a lifelong resident of Virginia’s 89th district, I am so proud of all my family has done to improve our community – and I believe serving as Attorney General is how I can best give back to my community and state.
If elected, I’ll fight to defend Virginians’ reproductive freedoms, protect our citizens from predatory lenders and landlords that damage their economic security, and push back against any White House policy that threatens the rights of Virginians.
Will you join me in the fight to serve Virginia by supporting my campaign for Attorney General today? Any amount you can give will go a long way to get my campaign started off strong. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024?amount=other]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024?amount=10]

Thank you,
Jay Jones

Arlington, VA 22202
United States

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: WOW! 73 Years... I've Got A Story For YOU!
body:
I have an incredible story to tell you. It's a story of God's faithfulness to Sheridan.Church in Tulsa, OK over the last 73 years. On the last Sunday
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9507.1.b9988eff4baaa07adf979e56b3b3ac7f) |
---
**I have an incredible story to tell you.** It's a story of God's faithfulness to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9508.1.972c0fd0e2343e2a4b135209e42b9972) in Tulsa, OK over the last 73 years. On the last Sunday of November In 1951, **Glenn & Ola Millard** started at small fellowship (around 12 people) in their garage at 2nd & Sheridan.
---
| Pastors Glenn + Ola Millard
---
This small fellowship quickly grew into one of Tulsa's largest churches in the 1950's.
Soon a new auditorium was built and **Sheridan Road Assembly of God** became the hub of the charismatic movement in the 1960's in Tulsa.
**Pastor Glenn Millard** invited a Texas evenglesit named **Kenneth Hagin** to Tulsa to hold a revival at Sheridan.
That revival went weeks upon weeks and **Kenneth Hagin** decided to move to Tulsa.
|
---
**Pastor Millard** and **Kenneth Hagin** built a a tremendous relationship and **Rhema Bible Training Center** was launched at Sheridan.
This was not the first Bible College to start at Sheridan though. **Trinity Bible College** started at Sheridan as well and then branched out on its' own.
The first two graduating classes of **Rhema** held all their classes at Sheridan until they expanded to Broken Arrow, OK.
During the two years that **Rhema** was housed at Sheridan, there was a young couple freshly out of **Oral Roberts University** who started attending **Rhema** and became the Youth Pastors at Sheridan.
| Glenn + Ola Millard with Billy Joe + Sharon Daugherty
---
**Billy Joe + Sharon Daugherty** served as the Youth Pastors at Sheridan while attending classes at **Rhema Bible College**.
A few years later, **Pastor Glenn Millard** decided to retire and transitioned the leadership of the church to the Daugherty's.
Under **Billy Joe + Sharon Daugherty** , the church rebranded from **Sheridan Road Assembly of God** to **Sheridan Christian Center** and quickly grew.
Due to the huge growth of the church in 1981, **Billy Joe + Sharon Daugherty** launched **Victory Christian Center** out of **Sheridan Christian Center**.
| Pastor Vep Ellis with Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
The third pastor to take the helm at Sheridan was **Vep + Lavonne Ellis**.
Under the leadership of **Pastor Ellis** several programs and ministries were launched in the Tulsa area.
Many are unaware that Sheridan has planted over 30 churches and launched many more ministries over 73 years such as: Grace Church, Eastland Assembly of God and etc...
For 34 years, **Pastor Ellis** expanded the reach of Sheridan in Tulsa area until he decided to retire in 2017 and that's where Kendra and I come into the story...
Something that amazes me about Sheridan over 73 years is how we have had **ONLY 4 pastors**.
Since 2017, we have seen Sheridan _re-blossom_ and God is doing great things today in our midst!
I want to thank **Pastor Ellis** , our church members and so many others for the opportunity to serve as the 4th Pastor of [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9509.1.81fe9486e69c940d94e33d9671476d66). It's the honor of a lifetime!
Tomorrow at 10am CT, we will celebrate 73 years!
See you there.
Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9510.1.9e8a15a2baf8ae5c426e2a5769e9d540)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9511.1.e6dbfa3e71aaea846e34770a90d4a2fc)
---
Last week at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9512.1.cc99f87475136458876535861ce7a3ec), I started a _mini-series_ within our _WKND series_ over the [Book of Acts](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9513.1.797bc295aed507684e603f01b20a7d99). In **Acts 17** , the **Apostle Paul** spent 3 weeks in Thessalonica **reasoning** , **explaining** and **proving** **Jesus** from the Old Testament Scriptures. Therefore, yesterday I took the **Book of Genesis** and _reasoned_ , _explained_ and _proved_ **Jesus as Messiah** from those 50 chapters in the 1st book of the Bible. Next Sunday, we will find **Jesus** in **Exodus** and **Leviticus** and the following Sunday we will look for Jesus in **Numbers** and **Deuteronomy**. I believe the sermon from yesterday will really teach you some things that maybe you have never seen before from the **Book of Genesis**. Watch "[Jesus In The Torah | Genesis](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9514.1.918e6522f36ebfee62ff7162937cfdcf)" here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=634OIj06ZbU](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9515.1.1700a2124ebeaef4b8424b6db354476b) **Upcoming Events At Sheridan.Church** -Sunday, November 24 @10am: **73rd Anniversary Service** -Saturday, December 7 @6pm: **Christmas Gala w/Mayor Giuliani** (6 tickets left) | RSVP: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1453870](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9516.1.cdaf55665275199ce13f4caf2e2e4a94) -Sunday, December 22 @10am: **Sheridan Christmas Concert** -Sunday, January 12 @10am: **Erick Stakelbeck** -Wednesday, February 26 @7pm: **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** Please consider partnering with the mission of [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9517.1.17a4ed60804afda9381eea75797859bc): [https://sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9518.1.7f722e736b1b08287fd4b224da9d983a)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9519.1.fa2d84bcc692c10de8b4b26d363d3922)
---
The response to [Sheridan's 1st Annual Christmas Dinner Gala](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9520.1.071965d6445d30d908a9e8c4492e96a7) has been **HUGE**! _This event is nearly sold out_. If you have not got your ticket or reserved your table yet, now is the time. Keynote speaker: **Mayor Rudy Giuliani** Comedy Performance: **Brad Stine** Live Auction Items Include: **Signed Donald Trump Painting** and more... Silent Auction as well. I will also be sharing about **Operation 2025 at Sheridan.Church** that evening. This is a black tie event. Please join us for what will be an incredible experience to close out 2024 and to look into 2025. Kindly RSVP here: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1453870](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9521.1.911db731515832384ee05e2aeed8a08c) **Date** \- Saturday, December 7, 2024 **Time** \- 6:00-8:00pm **Address** \- 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ RSVP: Gala w/Mayor Rudy Giuliani ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9522.1.becb076f4bf8f79e817b5af518ca8bfe)
---
---
## 1st Guest Speaker of 2025 @Sheridan.Church
---
|
---
Over the last year at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9523.1.65fbb580d17fd4488525f2f34c9a42d3), we have been BLESSED with so many great guest speakers from preachers to politicians to athletes and beyond. Including: [Perry Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9524.1.0894ba5bbdb48049157251eab9de8084), **Tim Tebow** , [Donald Trump Jr](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9525.1.bbec58cc7cc42139875240dafc082f5c)., [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9526.1.88c87fd7c2c1f030214378c0ab654ef3), [Lara Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9527.1.e7398df0cfd4804d6e25aa8b2534ca48), [Rabbi Jonathan Cahn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9528.1.0c1869aca915f2555631e7edafd10ccd), [Darryl Strawberry](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9529.1.6f45b2a076b0f328e0b3b8e9750bd403), **General Michael Flynn** , [Riley Gaines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9530.1.04705fcb2f4c863fb4b9bf50aeb5fa97), [Mayor Rudy Giuliani](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9531.1.7faa04ec7a7386f023636856ddfe74d7), [Dr. Randy Caldwell](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9532.1.10c9d09185429e68564a385cc2c1d591), [Roger Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9533.1.eb29cf800116e1272cc5d17e388e295c), Rodney Howard-Browne and so many others...
But our first guest speaker of 2025, I am very excited about!
Mark your calendars for **Erick Stakelbeck** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9534.1.4d8a4ba31c63f60a772f2f937b985ffd) on Sunday, January 12 at 10am CT.
Erick's show on **TBN** is _phenomenal_ and that Sunday in January will be just as great!
---
---
©2024 Jackson Lahmeyer | Tulsa, OK 74145
---
| [Web Version](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9535.1.745387e5f95677f8652e69319ec7cdb6&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxODQ4OTg1MjUtMTM1ODM1OTMyMTAtOTUxNGFhZjhkMGE1N2ViNDkzNjVkOWNlOTA0ZTc5OTg5NjFhY2FiZCIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiMTc1NjAwNzIifQ== "Web Version") [Preferences](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9536.1.65dc5d0df2e53cabe23b6691c1cb4c2c&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxODQ4OTg1MjUtMTM1ODM1OTMyMTAtOTUxNGFhZjhkMGE1N2ViNDkzNjVkOWNlOTA0ZTc5OTg5NjFhY2FiZCIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiMTc1NjAwNzIifQ== "Preferences") [Forward](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=17560072.9537.1.d234d907f39f97f701eca36c6cad22b5&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxODQ4OTg1MjUtMTM1ODM1OTMyMTAtOTUxNGFhZjhkMGE1N2ViNDkzNjVkOWNlOTA0ZTc5OTg5NjFhY2FiZCIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiMTc1NjAwNzIifQ== "Forward") [Unsubscribe](https://gem.godaddy.com/opt_out?pact=17560072-184898525-13583593210-9514aaf8d0a57eb49365d9ce904e7998961acabd "Unsubscribe")

name: Katie Porter
subject: I’m hosting a special event tomorrow, will I see you there?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39317%2E3422442%2EJfkFDs)
Derek,
First, Donald Trump won the White House.
Then, a barrage of scary announcements took place--from political appointees to initial policy plans.
Now: I want to break down what’s happened in the last few weeks so you feel like you have a better idea of everything that’s taken place since Election Day--and you’re ready for what’s next.
**[I’m bringing out my whiteboard tomorrow to host a Zoom discussion about Trump’s administration picks. A donation of any amount will get you the link to join!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241123-zoom?refcode=em20241123-39317&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39317_3422442_JfkFDs&akid=39317%2E3422442%2EJfkFDs)**
I want you to be equipped with this information because Trump and his cabinet will try to harm the American people in so many ways--and we need to be three steps ahead of them.
**We Need More Whiteboards**
Sunday, November 24, 5pm PT
_Zoom link provided upon donation of any amount_
**[A donation of any amount, whether $2 or $20, will secure your spot in our virtual Zoom tomorrow. Contribute now to join our discussion tomorrow at 5pm PT.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241123-zoom?refcode=em20241123-39317&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39317_3422442_JfkFDs&akid=39317%2E3422442%2EJfkFDs)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241123-zoom?refcode=em20241123-39317&refcode2=39317_3422442_JfkFDs&akid=39317%2E3422442%2EJfkFDs)
Hope to see you there!
Katie

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: How we win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The future of our movement starts with you.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241123-4535-footer&t=1&akid=4535%2E420207%2EPXd5Xy)
Peter,
Last week, my team promised we’d update you with the results of our post-election survey. Now the results are finally in, and the message is crystal clear: **Democrats need to get back to fighting for working people, not corporate interests.**
Here are the issues that you identified as top priorities in the survey:
* Making corporations and the wealthy pay their fair share
* Creating a Medicare For All health care system
* Passing paid family and medical leave
* Protecting reproductive rights
* Addressing climate change

But the survey told us something even more important than the specific policies. Repeatedly, supporters said _"Democrats talk about doing things and then don't follow through."_
[**Will you pitch in $3 today to help us build a Democratic Party that will actually follow through on policies that will benefit working people?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241123?refcode=em20241123-4535&amount=3&refcode2=4535_420207_PXd5Xy&akid=4535%2E420207%2EPXd5Xy)
This is one of the biggest reasons working-class voters feel abandoned by the Democratic Party. Too many in the party have spent too much time trying to win over billionaires and mythical, wealthy moderate Republicans instead of fighting for the people who need us most.
Everyday people aren’t looking for political talking points. They're demanding real solutions to the fundamental challenges crushing their families – spiraling health care costs, stagnant wages, and a system that seems rigged against anyone who isn't wealthy.
As the Chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, I've been laser-focused on lowering the cost of living. While corporations and billionaires have rigged the system for themselves, I've been pushing to make health care more affordable, strengthen labor protections, and ensure that those at the top finally pay their fair share in taxes.
But Peter, I can’t do it alone. **I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money** — in fact, I was one of the first members of Congress to refuse their support. That means I’m counting on you to help me keep up this fight.
[**Will you stand with us and pitch in $3 or more today to help build a movement that can make real change?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241123?refcode=em20241123-4535&amount=3&refcode2=4535_420207_PXd5Xy&akid=4535%2E420207%2EPXd5Xy)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241123?amount=3&refcode=em20241123-4535&refcode2=4535_420207_PXd5Xy&akid=4535%2E420207%2EPXd5Xy)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241123-4535-footer&t=2&refcode2=4535_420207_PXd5Xy&akid=4535%2E420207%2EPXd5Xy)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4535%2E420207%2EPXd5Xy)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress
clean_body: The future of our movement starts with you. Peter, Last week, my team promised we’d update you with the results of our post-election survey. Now the results are finally in, and the message is crystal clear: Democrats need to get back to fighting for working people, not corporate interests. Here are the issues that you identified as top priorities in the survey: Making corporations and the wealthy pay their fair share Creating a Medicare For All health care system Passing paid family and medical leave Protecting reproductive rights Addressing climate change But the survey told us something even more important than the specific policies. Repeatedly, supporters said "Democrats talk about doing things and then don't follow through." This is one of the biggest reasons working-class voters feel abandoned by the Democratic Party. Too many in the party have spent too much time trying to win over billionaires and mythical, wealthy moderate Republicans instead of fighting for the people who need us most. Everyday people aren’t looking for political talking points. They're demanding real solutions to the fundamental challenges crushing their families – spiraling health care costs, stagnant wages, and a system that seems rigged against anyone who isn't wealthy. As the Chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, I've been laser-focused on lowering the cost of living. While corporations and billionaires have rigged the system for themselves, I've been pushing to make health care more affordable, strengthen labor protections, and ensure that those at the top finally pay their fair share in taxes. But Peter, I can’t do it alone. I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money — in fact, I was one of the first members of Congress to refuse their support. That means I’m counting on you to help me keep up this fight. In solidarity, Pramila Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: DC Daily Journal
subject: Peter Berkowitz on Socialism and Capitalism
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Dear Friend,

In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young
Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism. This
trend raises a critical question: do they fully understand these
two systems' historical contexts and real-world outcomes?

To address this, we have created a new eBook, The History of
Socialism and Capitalism, authored by two of the most prominent
voices in today's political discourse, Hoover Institution senior
fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins,
development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each
scholar presents an in-depth analysis through two different
lenses. It's hard to overstate the relevance of this eBook in
today's policy debates, where radical proposals are gaining
traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of
socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions
about our economic and political future. The insights provided by
Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to
critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their
potential impact on society.

Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of
these pivotal economic systems. Click here to request your free
copy of The History of Socialism and Capitalism today.

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development

Hoover Institution | Stanford University

With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and
Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven
policy research organization that seeks to improve the human
condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity,
national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one
hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that
have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

CA USA 94305

body:

Nominated to Serve: A Bold Mission Ahead
EVERY DOLLAR BRINGS US CLOSER
Dear Peter,
I hope you share my excitement for what’s ahead: President Trump has nominated me to serve as Secretary of Health and Human Services.
For 19 years, I prayed daily for the chance to address the critical health challenges facing our nation, and this nomination is the answer to those prayers.
Now, I can finally put decades of experience and insight to work, rooting out corruption at HHS and ending corporations' stranglehold on our regulatory agencies. This is our opportunity to tackle the horrifying epidemic of chronic disease epidemic, especially those afflicting our children, and Make America Healthy Again.
**But I still have work to do to pay off my campaign debt, and I need your help.**
Our campaign faced unique challenges, including being unjustly denied Secret Service protection. This, coupled with other necessary expenses, left our campaign with $5.5 million in debt after Election Day.
[**Federal regulations prevent other campaigns or donors from covering this debt— _it’s up to us, the grassroots supporters, to finish this_.**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_v_11_23_24_nd1&n=5).
[Donate](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_v_11_23_24_nd1&n=6)
We’ve already made significant progress, but several million remain.
**I’m asking you personally to contribute what you can.** Once this debt is retired, I’ll be able to focus fully on the fight ahead: protecting the health and well-being of every American.
Thank you for standing with me. Let’s Make America Healthy Again!
| |
---
---
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Imagine our shock
body:
Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.
Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cc8bd03fadb744f5a38c51bcc87b960e&_e=UPfpT-fTr7xNkX3XCRrPBi7O8cLzoTl5MLswSQvNYhFxfuu8LNWc-UmwwyYL4Czw80dbeU5d_RJfCg74RtiVRg7TLErsZD_-scdZUtFH1F3nb_1KZyJ8IcxzGNTj5HBgsN2FLdZjwWlKN0LvKQuk3I3We1nKwhtLs0cyqD8Els7kg0bok_Ntg8bdQcjV84WLEKi_UNsMIn14glNHlgCgcDySxg8mNUiurImU-0liDB1--IqeyIcwBJapJptf3mD4xglIj6qbhJoqwNAk5QLaTsxgnTJ2AmLusmBDOMF_BZLtEfXgGPkjK7Hob7wjql7lpEelTljt57Osm72MgTjpr9XwP9lMaEm1TVvBkySmXB248YN7Krb9cz035-89gFgO)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cc8bd03fadb744f5a38c51bcc87b960e&_e=UPfpT-fTr7xNkX3XCRrPBi7O8cLzoTl5MLswSQvNYhFxfuu8LNWc-UmwwyYL4Czw80dbeU5d_RJfCg74RtiVRg7TLErsZD_-scdZUtFH1F3nb_1KZyJ8IcxzGNTj5HBgsN2FLdZjwWlKN0LvKQuk3I3We1nKwhtLs0cyqD8Els7kg0bok_Ntg8bdQcjV84WLEKi_UNsMIn14glNHlgCgcDySxg8mNUiurImU-0liDB2HvwhexKVRU-zCUlP9zk_nsExgwnltEyqf4OjHBe_dyS095J0WEBM-SKs7Rp7_5WofE9KzKzgutPL-e_emCLL05ZhO1WnGs5ENdG4oBXZZa-bWPCQS2Fx9cztztRi8j7YxUo-Agx38P6fsZDxNkgCY)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cc8bd03fadb744f5a38c51bcc87b960e&_e=UPfpT-fTr7xNkX3XCRrPBi7O8cLzoTl5MLswSQvNYhFxfuu8LNWc-UmwwyYL4Czw80dbeU5d_RJfCg74RtiVRg7TLErsZD_-scdZUtFH1F3nb_1KZyJ8IcxzGNTj5HBgsN2FLdZjwWlKN0LvKQuk3I3We1nKwhtLs0cyqD8Els7kg0bok_Ntg8bdQcjV84WLEKi_UNsMIn14glNHlgCgcDySxg8mNUiurImU-0liDB1fAKi_eDJ5jYOZPprVUy4NTdKda0IH1px_2hZIWqByD0cgleYLQFPoQ4Qb6MqLvyM3s8CqP0-MM7_2-F0fDckw_duxW2lNUJMZ3NeCZUrQ_74U5KJFhZfHZduuLXWjKTVx9JhoWHWZHr9ylZKDGqUa)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cc8bd03fadb744f5a38c51bcc87b960e&_e=UPfpT-fTr7xNkX3XCRrPBi7O8cLzoTl5MLswSQvNYhFxfuu8LNWc-UmwwyYL4Czw80dbeU5d_RJfCg74RtiVRg7TLErsZD_-scdZUtFH1F3nb_1KZyJ8IcxzGNTj5HBgsN2FLdZjwWlKN0LvKQuk3I3We1nKwhtLs0cyqD8Els7kg0bok_Ntg8bdQcjV84WLEKi_UNsMIn14glNHlgCgcDySxg8mNUiurImU-0liDB02cgQXqS9IVnC8BjvJtHAzKma_rC_WpvnPzHAQWYcGg2YJEyaktfKAyGZtv7cZCs6sC73EETPbWhpqa1dFF0QXHQsRa2IFjjdmDqhy5hw6D_0YBDhZea0qqK0_GNqTjlOgWj7goMHBsJfKYyrtqD74)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cc8bd03fadb744f5a38c51bcc87b960e&_e=UPfpT-fTr7xNkX3XCRrPBi7O8cLzoTl5MLswSQvNYhFxfuu8LNWc-UmwwyYL4Czw80dbeU5d_RJfCg74RtiVRg7TLErsZD_-scdZUtFH1F3nb_1KZyJ8IcxzGNTj5HBgsN2FLdZjwWlKN0LvKQuk3I3We1nKwhtLs0cyqD8Els7kg0bok_Ntg8bdQcjV84WLEKi_UNsMIn14glNHlgCgcDySxg8mNUiurImU-0liDB0J8RZmkGtkhZY_5bwBWHk-HFmXOWe58MFlJVxqC8NArLrxA3qgoZn3pdULuEMmhsU8JwBgjBvEwuatT9Zh8YSEeeAMmNhTaxTwh5NZc5JxR7H3-ZOIWojc99WWUGQE0HzjwNIkGbRq6o-Yyx3S6RTx)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cc8bd03fadb744f5a38c51bcc87b960e&_e=UPfpT-fTr7xNkX3XCRrPBi7O8cLzoTl5MLswSQvNYhFxfuu8LNWc-UmwwyYL4Czw80dbeU5d_RJfCg74RtiVRg7TLErsZD_-scdZUtFH1F3nb_1KZyJ8IcxzGNTj5HBgsN2FLdZjwWlKN0LvKQuk3I3We1nKwhtLs0cyqD8Els7kg0bok_Ntg8bdQcjV84WLEKi_UNsMIn14glNHlgCgcDySxg8mNUiurImU-0liDB27qBVbcJMunWog6rxAy8bs8txfDKnyDD5a0rVYNNHM5JWeLRYmwWV9f8MwSxdAW4XNL1VZTGuuESAKehirnvYPXt6pJPt05eAcsb69x9F2qF4ilt_gRqdTiyunAGntIZQuHT6W58A3mG3xNnMrM8cT)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cc8bd03fadb744f5a38c51bcc87b960e&_e=UPfpT-fTr7xNkX3XCRrPBi7O8cLzoTl5MLswSQvNYhFxfuu8LNWc-UmwwyYL4Czw80dbeU5d_RJfCg74RtiVRg7TLErsZD_-scdZUtFH1F3nb_1KZyJ8IcxzGNTj5HBgsN2FLdZjwWlKN0LvKQuk3I3We1nKwhtLs0cyqD8Els7kg0bok_Ntg8bdQcjV84WLEKi_UNsMIn14glNHlgCgcDySxg8mNUiurImU-0liDB2y1pyL_V3oTJNFfyQkla7-HiUJly_BHi4A8-8RZ8FW8pGHg8mcpLdlGH58mwfbsVxmDJugg_gh75wwGt99mWj9YcgairK__aEC_Tlyb-oZcbU4P6_WIsD61XuBOP0guxn78Wgjjr92japS4_ZH8pp-)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. name: Fetterman HQ
subject: a sneak peek into the data 📊
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Earlier this week we sent out a survey asking what you want to see Congress prioritize in the new year.
#
Hey Derek — earlier this week we sent out a survey asking what you want to see Congress prioritize in the new year and what you think Democrats need to do to win back working folks in future elections.
**Today we’re giving you a sneak peek into the data!** 📊 Some of the most common issues people want to see tackled are:
* Health care
* Reproductive rights
* Gun violence
* The economy and cost of living

And on what Democrats should do to win back the working class, the most common themes were **1) we need to focus on offering tangible solutions to everyday problems** , and **2) we need to get our message out in the places voters are actually listening.**
The good news is this stuff is second nature to John. He’s been fighting for yinz + youse ever since he first ran for Mayor of Braddock, PA, and he’s not stopping now.
**But after a tough election year, John’s going to need your help to keep PA 🔵 in the years ahead. **[**Will you pitch in $5 today to help John keep fighting for working folks in the Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241123?refcode=em20241123-9621&amount=5&refcode2=9621_434096_7WqLbx&akid=9621%2E434096%2E7WqLbx)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241123?amount=5&refcode=em20241123-9621&refcode2=9621_434096_7WqLbx&akid=9621%2E434096%2E7WqLbx)**
— Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20241123-9621-footer&t=1&refcode2=9621_434096_7WqLbx&akid=9621%2E434096%2E7WqLbx)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9621%2E434096%2E7WqLbx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9621%2E434096%2E7WqLbx)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: A sizeable impact
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97560731/513833868/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTYwNDNjZTgtYzdhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IEiNsxT9Bk73lGfwlESXhZ2bgpbkbpA-hd779VKPD2g=)
---
| | **Biden spurred new factories and infrastructure projects. Trump will be in office for the ribbon-cutting**
_— PBS, November 12, 2024_
* * *
_But Biden aides privately told The Associated Press that they expect Trump to continue the planned projects and take credit for Biden’s accomplishments, just like the Republicans in Congress who’ve celebrated plant openings and infrastructure developments in their districts but voted against them._
---
Team — Republicans in the House and Senate have a habit, and we just wanted to make sure you peeped it.
The bipartisan _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ was a monumental investment in our nation, one we haven’t seen in generations.**Only 19 Republicans stood with Democrats to get the job done.**
Despite nearly every Republican voting against the legislation (including no help from Arizona’s GOP delegation), we’ve seen Republicans hit the press circuit and high-dollar fundraisers touting the benefits of legislation **_they_** opposed.
And now, as we transition from the Biden-Harris Administration into the next Trump Administration, we know that Donald Trump and his GOP majority **will run the exact same playbook.**
So our job is clear: we have to stay engaged with communities across Arizona to make sure folks know exactly what Donald Trump and his administration are and are not delivering. **Fighting back against the GOP’s message for the next four years will take time, effort, energy, and frankly, a whole lot of resources. **
**[If you’re able to make a monthly investment in our team, it’ll go a long way to supporting our everyday organizing and help us build the foundation we’ll need to build power with Democrats in Arizona.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97560733/513833870/635150459?recurring=true&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTYwNDNjZTgtYzdhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IEiNsxT9Bk73lGfwlESXhZ2bgpbkbpA-hd779VKPD2g=)**
[MAKE A MONTHLY GIFT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97560735/513833872/635150459?recurring=true&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTYwNDNjZTgtYzdhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IEiNsxT9Bk73lGfwlESXhZ2bgpbkbpA-hd779VKPD2g=)
---
Elections aren’t won or lost in one month, one week, or on one night, team. It takes years of organizing and investing in communities to build the power we need to deliver on our promises to everyday families.
Our strategy for the next few years is to organize Arizona voters by building relationships and increasing long-term capacity with historically underserved communities across the state. We’re working to invite more Arizonans to the table underneath our big tent coalition and to uplift communities that have long been overlooked and underinvested in.
We’re also working to build and support a more robust volunteer program that has the skills it needs to operate in a battleground state. With a sustainable bench of knowledgeable folks to carry out the work, we can be as prepared as possible as we navigate our challenges in 2025 and beyond.
**[A grassroots monthly gift could make a sizable impact in this work. So please, if you’re looking for a way to take action and invest in a better and bluer Arizona, consider making a monthly contribution to our team today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97560737/513833874/635150459?recurring=true&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTYwNDNjZTgtYzdhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IEiNsxT9Bk73lGfwlESXhZ2bgpbkbpA-hd779VKPD2g=)**
[MAKE A MONTHLY GIFT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97560739/513833876/635150459?recurring=true&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTYwNDNjZTgtYzdhOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IEiNsxT9Bk73lGfwlESXhZ2bgpbkbpA-hd779VKPD2g=)

Thanks for sticking with us and continually supporting our team. We can do this without you.
— Arizona Democratic Party

name: Michelle Steel [iPhone]
subject: We're not in the clear yet, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Sorry to reach out like this...

| |
---
| | | Peter, Election Day may be in the books, _but my race isn 't done yet._

_**[I'm neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=ade3dadd67e64226a065c080b2bc7587&_e=fqWxfGrzCQHabjUmQkcIgWX6f6mkDQ4iNZIjvD_M5CTKuwH097L2lueDoGiHYtGsXtQoE1j34_WwJRC8ObNNTZptcWxMrdU9iEO-B-uJSN8cCi-XQ6GmnwG-ts9Za62jYGWuWR9zhANVnYBQ-3n4ZmxCQPnykJPilqb0nIyLQ95xAXwKqqKe1j2vrn-87XtD5MmeoeEML7BXj6TfXqzwvzYcfZepVAeQoXS2dLabcU2M7-3oYCJvUQHKJIaGl57RCshWSmXTVPC6Txkl6FFtQG9XwfS-qFPxeg4SUzT8TA6Tjrzg7UY8EEZYugvK3RZW41PYH43g196h7GrCKXs6W9HgoBKnarNLbyk_eckPmlylBYA1TMuA07AlxheI3Sqo5ea5MG6kROYWT9TnYvjYSp2TF-pNiGAYDUG3iESWHJxT5KO02puOmU-APAizbZg_JkHLinfeES-yCeJKwpEH9Q%3D%3D "I’m neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.")**_

If we're going to pull this out and keep my seat, then I'm going to need all hands on deck.

I spent every dime I had just to get through Election Day, and now I'm running on fumes. I NEED your urgent support to help me keep this fight going before the ballots are all counted.

_**[Please, can I count on you, Peter?](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=ade3dadd67e64226a065c080b2bc7587&_e=fqWxfGrzCQHabjUmQkcIgWX6f6mkDQ4iNZIjvD_M5CTKuwH097L2lueDoGiHYtGsXtQoE1j34_WwJRC8ObNNTZptcWxMrdU9iEO-B-uJSN8cCi-XQ6GmnwG-ts9Za62jYGWuWR9zhANVnYBQ-3n4ZmxCQPnykJPilqb0nIyLQ95xAXwKqqKe1j2vrn-87XtD5MmeoeEML7BXj6TfXqzwvzYcfZepVAeQoXS2dLabcU2M7-3oYCJvUQHKJIaGl57RCshWSmXTVPC6Txkl6FFtQG9XwfS-qFPxeg4SUzT8TA4lGnFZDkX_52lheXz0wS1HiEMzuM1ga5HtysL-pQ1BVPt6MuXJjX810PDN6MVM49kc6sQR-HW3QDAI2YEs4BXQSh9C0lemHwrC0qI_zsO8nVZ30D8hXxPJBu_3MT6qKVLJgOsS3-jhaKU_mKZKEb4zBhPq0osw6OCr-AQ1E_nJtg%3D%3D "Please, can I count on you, Friend?")**_

Thank you,

Michelle Steel

name: Texas Organizing Project PAC
subject: Priorities Survey [your response is needed]
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, toppac
body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=%2BPuKliO4mdi9YzoqPdqWa9JQtoPMKELE5oUloNij4nziiiqhjvhsK%2BwecnoGcFYsoF1vKNlKdz%2B3QptOm7IS6%2FV73D1JibGKqsE15Q0FMdT3jOpy97Mg0ksGyufsiM1XU%2Bc2sfxsu%2BK1ZtUZ%2FW8I%2FFcmvkPMJeDeLlRcR2T16UCaqyo4pu0p2Trpn68SV2V5Kd%2BwZhBLtFCNpmHnmsrz671kernbFEwVKs6m8sXhfFaeOHk8Ykd6B2xn7YTuhdDLFGzZiT5YgSuLadbLGoae5kmFX8RSS4bJemHdefkFif%2BeTIhyQ6HcI%2FVGhZPifiMsWD2BGX%2B%2BgyIBcwu0wWofUAyasU4FoXhywZrEUd5knlvYYmaipLeM9%2BgCh%2FzwOotiGUE%2FjgLV9Olp0miRQS%2FC0rPPV%2BDQVx4tMw9SYW3cay4%3D]

# [#]
Peter,

It’s Texas Organizing Project PAC! Look, while the 2024 election didn’t result in all the outcomes we ultimately hoped for, our commitment to building real political power in Texas remains steadfast.

We’re proud of the work we did in 2024 to boost voter turnout and build the power of Black and Latino communities in Texas. But now we’re getting back into the fight and looking ahead to build a plan for 2025 and beyond.

That’s why we’re reaching out to you today. We want to know what issues our top supporters are facing today, and how you felt about the 2024 election.

Your feedback is so important to us, and will help us tremendously as we work on strategy for this next phase.

Peter, this will only take a minute: Can you fill out our Priorities survey before midnight tonight? We just need 1,000 responses. [https://secure.everyaction.com/V_P0AVrdHEecSa_8nk7QYQ2]

TAKE THE SURVEY » [https://secure.everyaction.com/V_P0AVrdHEecSa_8nk7QYQ2]

Thank you!

Texas Organizing Project PAC

clean_body: Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] Peter, It’s Texas Organizing Project PAC! Look, while the 2024 election didn’t result in all the outcomes we ultimately hoped for, our commitment to building real political power in Texas remains steadfast. We’re proud of the work we did in 2024 to boost voter turnout and build the power of Black and Latino communities in Texas. But now we’re getting back into the fight and looking ahead to build a plan for 2025 and beyond. That’s why we’re reaching out to you today. We want to know what issues our top supporters are facing today, and how you felt about the 2024 election. Your feedback is so important to us, and will help us tremendously as we work on strategy for this next phase. Peter, this will only take a minute: Can you fill out our Priorities survey before midnight tonight? We just need 1,000 responses. [] TAKE THE SURVEY » [] Thank you! Texas Organizing Project PAC [] [] [] [] [] Texas Organizing Project PAC runs the largest, independent get-out-the-vote political field programs in Texas, focusing on expanding the electorate of color, with an emphasis on turning out Black and Latino voters. To date, TOP PAC has mobilized hundreds of thousands of voters across the state with the aim of transforming Texas and building a reflective democracy — one that looks like us and shares our values. name: Adam Gray
subject: Important update: This race is not over.

body:
My name is Adam Gray and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District.

| My name is Adam Gray and I’m the Democratic nominee in California’s 13th Congressional District.

When I ran for this seat in 2022, our race came down to just 564 votes. It was the second-closest race in the entire country.

This year, I know that we can finish the job.

Right now, our race is **_still too close to call_** and we know it’s going to come down to every last vote.

[Will you split a donation between our recount fund and Ritchie Torres today to ensure we can count every vote in CA-13 and flip this seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97560929/513834474/-1769714749?amount=10&refcode=RTFC_20241123_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTRkNTMwNC1jOWE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-bpqhQkOD1tKSk0fq3f2Q6BzdZhGPRBlmT9xWGj4zjo=) | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97560930/513834475/-1769714749?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=RTFC_20241123_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTRkNTMwNC1jOWE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-bpqhQkOD1tKSk0fq3f2Q6BzdZhGPRBlmT9xWGj4zjo=)
---
I decided to run for Congress again because the San Joaquin Valley deserves leaders who work just as hard as we do. I got into this race to finally get results for this community, just like I did for 10 years in the California State Assembly.

**I’ve been part of close races before, and we knew this year’s race would be another one.** As votes continue to be counted, I just want to say how thankful I am to have your support.

**Let’s finish the job. That means counting every single vote.**

[This isn’t over. Please split a donation of $10 or more between our recount fund and Ritchie Torres. In a race this close, everything counts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97560931/513834476/-1769714749?amount=10&refcode=RTFC_20241123_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTRkNTMwNC1jOWE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-bpqhQkOD1tKSk0fq3f2Q6BzdZhGPRBlmT9xWGj4zjo=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Jane Fonda Climate PAC
subject: Sign the petition to demand Washington protect our climate progress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Don’t let Trump erase our hard-fought wins.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97560998/513834744/1328794144?refcode=ea.6e0ca049-c9a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.6e0ca049-c9a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZlMGNhMDQ5LWM5YTktZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9LWijVutmzmWNsOy-qCxO2INUafi2_gf1HLj1T7CJt0=&emci=836078ce-f6a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=6e0ca049-c9a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4823105)
---
If nothing else, Donald Trump is a man of his word... _to the oil lobby._ From nominating a former congressman with a dismal environmental record to lead the EPA to tapping a fossil fuel CEO for the Department of Energy, he’s making it clear: He's delivering on the debt he owed dirty oil and prioritizing their "drill, baby, drill" agenda. If we don’t act now, decades of climate progress will be erased, leaving future generations to face even more severe consequences. **That’s why our team at JanePAC, along with leading climate organizations, is joining forces to demand immediate action from Congress to protect the progress we’ve fought so hard to achieve. But we can’t do it without your voice:** **[Sign the petition to your Congressional representatives and tell them to protect climate progress! >>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97561000/513834746/-1393488005?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jane-bax-email-ja&refcode=ea.6e0ca049-c9a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.6e0ca049-c9a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZlMGNhMDQ5LWM5YTktZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9LWijVutmzmWNsOy-qCxO2INUafi2_gf1HLj1T7CJt0=&emci=836078ce-f6a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=6e0ca049-c9a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4823105)** **Here’s what we’re demanding:** → Prevent cuts to the EPA budget or other critical climate agency budgets
→ Reject bad amendments or riders to must-pass bills
→ Prevent legislative language from passing that increases reliance on fossil fuels or weakens key climate programs Here’s the good news: we’re not alone in this fight. Across the country, millions of us are united in demanding action. And when we raise our voices together, Congress listens. **[Take 30 seconds today to sign our petition and tell Congress that protecting our climate progress is non-negotiable. clean_body: Don’t let Trump erase our hard-fought wins. | If nothing else, Donald Trump is a man of his word... to the oil lobby. From nominating a former congressman with a dismal environmental record to lead the EPA to tapping a fossil fuel CEO for the Department of Energy, he’s making it clear: He's delivering on the debt he owed dirty oil and prioritizing their "drill, baby, drill" agenda. If we don’t act now, decades of climate progress will be erased, leaving future generations to face even more severe consequences. That’s why our team at JanePAC, along with leading climate organizations, is joining forces to demand immediate action from Congress to protect the progress we’ve fought so hard to achieve. But we can’t do it without your voice: Here’s what we’re demanding: → Prevent cuts to the EPA budget or other critical climate agency budgets → Reject bad amendments or riders to must-pass bills → Prevent legislative language from passing that increases reliance on fossil fuels or weakens key climate programs Here’s the good news: we’re not alone in this fight. Across the country, millions of us are united in demanding action. And when we raise our voices together, Congress listens. | We’ve fought back before, and we’ll do it again. Because when we’re united, we’re unstoppable. With determination, The Jane Fonda Climate PAC Team | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: David Horowitz
subject: Arm yourself with the truth
body:
| | | Fellow Conservative, Are you concerned about the future of America?
---
| |
---
Fellow Conservative, Are you concerned about the future of America? Are you concerned that America’s history and values are under attack like never before? I am too. As you know, the radical Left lies and distorts the truth about our country... And these lies are threatening to undermine everything our nation once stood for... If they had it their way, the Left would have you believe America was founded as a “white supremacist” country and was built on the back of slavery. But this plot to distort the truth is just a part of their agenda to destroy our country as we know it and rebuild it with their radical socialist ideology. That’s why I wrote my latest book, **_America Betrayed: How a Christian Monk created America and why the Left is Determined to Destroy Her._** ...Because I’m fed up with the Left and their disingenuous schemes, and I wanted to reveal the **_true_** history of America’s unique contribution to human freedom dating all the way back to our founding. Ben Shapiro recently said the book is **_“totally worth the read.”_** If you want to hear what Ben Shapiro has to say about the book and the work of the David Horowitz Freedom Center, you can [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0479aadae2994982970a7f07b91b8af6&_e=Wm85UQ5mALQ5BC9UAgIowM6NorWCkkpBbAClAWqEaIrW6fGpwwoBLaeRYKQw9j5XxaRkJq52u6Oq2DrekW4FamgDrPD73QX6tkRZSqp-z13dvsDIh7SD-5cD_moILJXW4Tu_ElH3zDJn4amtICLa0LPtKlhC_5uTrleB02fM8n9L3KMOSa8ncuUOBbb1et_WhbD5HqnMGz5Uq3p04LHxLBDKMQUdVizP5074N6BuyY4%3D)[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0479aadae2994982970a7f07b91b8af6&_e=Wm85UQ5mALQ5BC9UAgIowO4ODGDEgDmu5KPkgc-BHs6nCowc5CnTiehrOjehaqDnjlfb1K_33-KJplqm8jDmdGcGmqpjCJ73jXR5t3_dJ3n_EUX5axMSiLcihtQju9Ym5pu5V6G0uO9fSqTpumynReyWy0eUw93LduYR8c7e1SWlc5sNwC_YkuDdZ40IRPY2tzh2PSG3pAERrCFL3P9CmYoUwvHVv0Xi1LO1eqSb-FB_Bil-cbgX27N869rm2DPaU9k900Zv-fr5JCYKKob-o_5xa6WYeo75AyAF2EsTKTE%3D)[**watch his comments on YouTube here**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0479aadae2994982970a7f07b91b8af6&_e=Wm85UQ5mALQ5BC9UAgIowO4ODGDEgDmu5KPkgc-BHs6nCowc5CnTiehrOjehaqDnjlfb1K_33-KJplqm8jDmdEKR1uc5szLgju93mPLx0v6FbAGWTkqDBkfw6ZOgd3qbOSEnLu-ef3idDIyeD-HdIYsuGPYMb_EUeMjQiwKVFlQAxXTv2hMWyWXKnAatiLsIhOylT7EdvzAhAW4yffZzfPWNixjYqNHg97FtOknedPig4kqcM3It4xddoWM8wrFRSKOnVaRN7oyCboFn1hhRku7yD1z1QDWIsHCwx2sZr0Zsf5BM9Pl77qObZ6dNSfe4J2v9K8bYN5xsxrOcwplF3a8B0VPU4svR6C_4ArUuSPBKGkx-QEjP0AF4NZ_lv1m59moQGGSgsZOSiEyzjMmOaJTnZTDslT9MA_DHkSrmXWQ%3D). I strongly believe the true American history the Left has fought so hard to bury will shock you. **[That’s why I want you to be one of the first to have a copy of my book.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0479aadae2994982970a7f07b91b8af6&_e=Wm85UQ5mALQ5BC9UAgIowO4ODGDEgDmu5KPkgc-BHs6nCowc5CnTiehrOjehaqDnjlfb1K_33-KJplqm8jDmdEKR1uc5szLgju93mPLx0v6FbAGWTkqDBkfw6ZOgd3qbOSEnLu-ef3idDIyeD-HdIYsuGPYMb_EUeMjQiwKVFlQAxXTv2hMWyWXKnAatiLsIhOylT7EdvzAhAW4yffZzfPWNixjYqNHg97FtOknedPig4kqcM3It4xddoWM8wrFRSKOnVaRN7oyCboFn1hhRktkWSZGrQIqG02ueV-DIvUTKMOadfVKVv6s4COVP1spjqBQRYR-PB19l-Kq4V6YaPwaM9j0J4u_sb2aGHccnicTvxEqjw2TqY4SzuFhE7J9c-umPIX9r9xXJVh3Jol71gs0IkccBcT4e7-BP3SBkkY0%3D)** Friend, this attack on our heritage is a deeply thought-out plan dating all the way back to the Communist Revolution in Russia. _Meaning this heinous attack on our nation has been going on for 100 years in the making._ And now it’s time you and I put it to a stop. **[**Equip yourself today with the truth by grabbing a copy of my book.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0479aadae2994982970a7f07b91b8af6&_e=Wm85UQ5mALQ5BC9UAgIowO4ODGDEgDmu5KPkgc-BHs6nCowc5CnTiehrOjehaqDnjlfb1K_33-KJplqm8jDmdEKR1uc5szLgju93mPLx0v6FbAGWTkqDBkfw6ZOgd3qbOSEnLu-ef3idDIyeD-HdIYsuGPYMb_EUeMjQiwKVFlQAxXTv2hMWyWXKnAatiLsIhOylT7EdvzAhAW4yffZzfPWNixjYqNHg97FtOknedPig4kqcM3It4xddoWM8wrFRSKOnVaRN7oyCboFn1hhRkpJnyPlEplNKZK8qlmKurC2_eiPNdrZw2Qs_Pq2GabBBOGfnr4Nuf8HdvzZ7hI8k4HyNIr6BaqI-TgiBXNNztIuHPa0gYHjL8V0AODFHYokasDd2eyz-zoez0E4tG0IPszvqQKHTT_28-MCG94V-GmU%3D)** Unfortunately, Barack Obama hit the gas pedal with his radical extremist presidency, providing the perfect launchpad for revisionist activists. Now the truth is harder than ever to find. And that’s why I’ve dedicated my entire life to exposing the agenda of the radical Left. Because I too once fell prey to their lies and deception– When I was a young man, about 50 years ago, I got sucked into the Marxist revolution and was one of the leaders bent on destroying all that makes America great. Regrettably, I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. ...I edited _Ramparts_ , the radical Left’s largest magazine. ...I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. Through these horrible events, my eyes were opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” on the Left were responsible for. So, thanks to God, I cut all ties and never looked back! **I proudly cast my ballot for Ronald Reagan in 1984.** **Then I founded the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years of my life to exposing their evil agenda.** _Why would I do that?_ Because, friend, I saw first-hand the threat the radical Left was to our country. I saw their evil beginnings and I knew if patriotic Americans stood by and did nothing, our country would soon be lost forever. This book is a vital defense against the malicious slanders the Left hopes will turn our country’s proud heritage into a shameful “white supremacist” story of lies.
---
**_Arming yourself with the truth is the best antidote to radical ideologies!_**

And if you’re able, please consider making a generous, **[tax-deductible donation](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0479aadae2994982970a7f07b91b8af6&_e=Wm85UQ5mALQ5BC9UAgIowO4ODGDEgDmu5KPkgc-BHs6nCowc5CnTiehrOjehaqDnjlfb1K_33-KJplqm8jDmdEKR1uc5szLgju93mPLx0v6FbAGWTkqDBkfw6ZOgd3qbOSEnLu-ef3idDIyeD-HdIYsuGPYMb_EUeMjQiwKVFlQAxXTv2hMWyWXKnAatiLsIhOylT7EdvzAhAW4yffZzfPWNixjYqNHg97FtOknedPig4kqcM3It4xddoWM8wrFRSKOnVaRN7oyCboFn1hhRks1DeO_va7543VhH7PIPiux9Au00FZHHcr4z6ujJByR7nv_d0zrrSU3e_c0iOdwDdYZr23Yibm6QWA6c1l8Xl-K72ri1yBam2WDOzE9pszmFC7TLYNq6WKzZJxGm5X-IYLV5IKTt3JhMTwIIG7uHksk%3D) **to the David Horowitz Freedom Center today. **As a heartfelt “ _thank you_ ” for your support I’ll send you a complimentary copy of “America Betrayed” so you can be armed with the truth.** Your donation will help the Freedom Center keep fighting against the Left wing activists trying to rewrite American history and seek our country’s downfall.With your help, we can ensure future generations know and understand the true history of our great nation and the principles that made it the greatest beacon of freedom the world has ever known.Thank you for your support.Sincerely,

clean_body: | | | Fellow Conservative, Are you concerned about the future of America? | | Fellow Conservative, Are you concerned about the future of America? Are you concerned that America’s history and values are under attack like never before? I am too. As you know, the radical Left lies and distorts the truth about our country... And these lies are threatening to undermine everything our nation once stood for... If they had it their way, the Left would have you believe America was founded as a “white supremacist” country and was built on the back of slavery. But this plot to distort the truth is just a part of their agenda to destroy our country as we know it and rebuild it with their radical socialist ideology. That’s why I wrote my latest book, America Betrayed: How a Christian Monk created America and why the Left is Determined to Destroy Her. ...Because I’m fed up with the Left and their disingenuous schemes, and I wanted to reveal the true history of America’s unique contribution to human freedom dating all the way back to our founding. Ben Shapiro recently said the book is “totally worth the read.” If you want to hear what Ben Shapiro has to say about the book and the work of the David Horowitz Freedom Center, you can . I strongly believe the true American history the Left has fought so hard to bury will shock you. Friend, this attack on our heritage is a deeply thought-out plan dating all the way back to the Communist Revolution in Russia. Meaning this heinous attack on our nation has been going on for 100 years in the making. And now it’s time you and I put it to a stop. Unfortunately, Barack Obama hit the gas pedal with his radical extremist presidency, providing the perfect launchpad for revisionist activists. Now the truth is harder than ever to find. And that’s why I’ve dedicated my entire life to exposing the agenda of the radical Left. Because I too once fell prey to their lies and deception– When I was a young man, about 50 years ago, I got sucked into the Marxist revolution and was one of the leaders bent on destroying all that makes America great. Regrettably, I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. ...I edited Ramparts , the radical Left’s largest magazine. ...I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. Through these horrible events, my eyes were opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” on the Left were responsible for. So, thanks to God, I cut all ties and never looked back! I proudly cast my ballot for Ronald Reagan in 1984. Then I founded the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years of my life to exposing their evil agenda. Why would I do that? Because, friend, I saw first-hand the threat the radical Left was to our country. I saw their evil beginnings and I knew if patriotic Americans stood by and did nothing, our country would soon be lost forever. This book is a vital defense against the malicious slanders the Left hopes will turn our country’s proud heritage into a shameful “white supremacist” story of lies. Arming yourself with the truth is the best antidote to radical ideologies! | | I hope you’ll get a copy of America Betrayed today and celebrate the principles of individual freedom by refusing to give into the Left’s lies about our country. And if you’re able, please consider making a generous, to the David Horowitz Freedom Center today. As a heartfelt “ thank you ” for your support I’ll send you a complimentary copy of “America Betrayed” so you can be armed with the truth. Your donation will help the Freedom Center keep fighting against the Left wing activists trying to rewrite American history and seek our country’s downfall.With your help, we can ensure future generations know and understand the true history of our great nation and the principles that made it the greatest beacon of freedom the world has ever known.Thank you for your support.Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. body:
Scott Jennings has become a standout voice for conservatives navigating the often-hostile territory of CNN. With his Kentucky charm and razor-sharp insights, Jennings provides a refreshing counterweight to the usual left-leaning commentary on the network. From dismantling the overblown “Trump is literally Hitler” narrative to skewering the media’s endless meltdowns over Donald Trump’s Cabinet picks, [...] | [](http://trk.libertyledger.-acAvDwSRf8NBPeflkA)

body:

---
Team,

Last week, I joined Morning Joe to discuss Trump’s selection of Tulsi Gabbard for Director of National Intelligence: [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57444?t=7&akid=22563%2E4449941%2E-NObTQ) As a former CIA case officer and Member of Congress, I’ve taken an oath to defend the U.S. Constitution. I also know that the DNI role is not something to take lightly – especially as the U.S. faces threats from adversaries around the world. Tulsi Gabbard is not only unprepared and unqualified for this role, but she has spread conspiracy theories, doubted the credibility of the U.S. intelligence community, and cozied up with dictators like Vladimir Putin and Bashar al-Assad.

I’m not speaking out because of my political party — I’m speaking out on behalf of America’s national security.

Throughout my life in service, I have dedicated myself to safeguarding our country, its principles, and its Constitution. As Governor of Virginia, I pledge to continue protecting our democracy, preserving our fundamental rights, and never wavering in the defense of our freedoms.

[**I hope that you’ll support my efforts with a split contribution between Fight for Reform to elect state and local Democrats and my campaign as I continue to serve out my term in Congress and as I continue this work as Governor of Virginia:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57444?t=8&akid=22563%2E4449941%2E-NObTQ) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Abigail Spanberger will go through immediately: | [CHIP IN $5 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/57445?t=9&akid=22563%2E4449941%2E-NObTQ)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: What it’s like to close down a campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2209%2E135344%2Ec0CNcu)

Friend,
People talk a lot after campaigns and share a lot of opinions, but too often we don’t talk about the people and processes behind campaigns that make them run.
I wanted to share what it’s like to close down a campaign after Election Day. It’s quite the process!
Our team is shrinking from over 50 employees down to just a handful, but in the days since the election, everyone worked hard cleaning out our office, moving furniture and supplies into storage, and logging all kinds of digital assets from the last 20 months.
Last week as things shut down, the full team helped load the furniture at our HQ into a U-Haul and then off to a storage unit.
Then to close things out, we held a professional development day for everyone to chat and ask questions about networking and finding everyone’s next job.
I’ve said for a while that this was the best team in the business, and I meant it. I’m so grateful to this entire group for their hard work, grit, and great attitudes as we hustled all over Michigan to win this race. I have no doubt they all have great things ahead!
Wishing you and yours the best,
Elissa Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=2209%2E135344%2Ec0CNcu).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2209%2E135344%2Ec0CNcu)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

One hundred percent useful information like... ...reports from the multiverse where we have an intrepid reporter on the ground telling you how the world ends in every possible universe... ...attractive infographics and charts on EVERY page that even YOU can understand... ... and helpful financial tips for what kind of currency and precious metals to hoard for the end of the world. So, if Revelation gave you nightmares as a child, rest easy. Seth Dillon CEO| The Babylon Bee | Copyright(C) 2023 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: The Babylon Bee, LLC PO Box 546 Jupiter, FL 33468 .
