name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: “There is no climate crisis… the term ‘carbon pollution’ is outrageous.” We need to fight this Cabinet pick:
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE4MTQ0ODYS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjEwMDM1ODQ1MAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
BREAKING: Trump taps science-denying oil exec for Energy Secretary. Renew your annual LCV membership to help fight back >> https://links.messages.lcv. Peter — Just days ago, Trump announced the intention to nominate a
climate change denier and Big Oil executive to lead the U.S. Department of
Energy. Chris Wright, the CEO of fracking company Liberty Energy, has said that “there is no climate crisis”and denies the scientific consensus that climate-fueled natural disasters are
becoming more frequent. From RFK Jr., to Dr. Oz, to Chris Wright — Trump’s presumptive nominees for key
positions are so awful and dangerous that there is a mounting effort to block
many of them — coming from both sides of the aisle. We need your help.From the halls of Congress to districts across the country, our movement will do
everything we can to keep climate deniers and conspiracy theorists from taking
power over critical federal agencies that protect people and the planet. But the
truth is that we need your help to make our campaigns work — so, we’re asking: Please, make an annual gift to power LCV’s work today. Support from our members is what powers our work to protect the environment from Donald Trump’s pro-polluter agenda >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/X6bzs~ “THERE IS NO CLIMATE CRISIS AND WE’RE NOT IN THE MIDST OF AN ENERGY TRANSITION EITHER ... THE TERM ‘CARBON POLLUTION’ IS OUTRAGEOUS.”

— Chris Wright,
Trump’s presumptive nominee for Secretary of Energy RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP >> https://links.messages.lcv. Earlier this year, Trump made a simple offer to Big Oil executives, including
Wright: raise $1 billion for his campaign, and in exchange, his administration
would pay them back in the form of tax cuts and rollbacks of important
environmental safeguards. By announcing his intention to nominate Chris Wright, Trump is making good on
that corrupt deal with the dirty energy industry. Combined with appalling presumptive nominees like RFK Jr. to lead the Health and
Human Services Department, Trump’s Cabinet would be the most extreme and anti-science administration in our
nation’s history. There’s still a chance to defeat these radical picks, Peter, but only
if our movement speaks out to demand it. With 50 U.S. senators needed to approve
a nomination, just a few votes will determine whether Trump’s nominations
succeed or fail. This means that what happens right now is absolutely crucial. Please, help power our campaign to protect our environment and democracy by
defeating Trump’s radical picks to head crucial federal agencies. Make an annual gift to power LCV’s work right now. Support from members will power our grassroots campaign, but we need to act quickly >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ Thanks for your support, Peter. Together, we can keep fighting to
protect people and our planet from Trump’s deeply radical agenda. Onward, Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters P.S. Looking for another way to stay in the loop? We’re thrilled to be on
Bluesky and look forward to having conversations with you about climate,
environmental justice, and democracy. Join us as we build power for people and the planet! https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Ap9dcpd9AbMR/a0VSYlJ5bnp3RmhtVktIWWh1VUJIVlIwN1dGUWg2OWI2UndnTUJ2M3hsdzBnd0RkQWJHSVo2czZsM2E4aHZZdGNmeDkxcE5HVmNuTE5rS1FTc2NKTVMxVk5PQXd2YnJxcUJPZ2gxeDVXYUU9S0/ This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=11814486&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDM1ODQ1MAS2&spReportId=MjEwMDM1ODQ1MAS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=11814486&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDM1ODQ1MAS2&spReportId=MjEwMDM1ODQ1MAS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

---
| | _November 23rd, 2024_
---
|
---
| | , It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19182/6374453/fb016bc478eef889804816b56ff88ab42e3a156e/9d9c18291bda95408b821a7db18e95d68aeadccb). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter: Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)... Zero lines, classroom time or books to read... Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit). **[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19182/6374453/fb016bc478eef889804816b56ff88ab42e3a156e/9d9c18291bda95408b821a7db18e95d68aeadccb).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19182/6374453/fb016bc478eef889804816b56ff88ab42e3a156e/9d9c18291bda95408b821a7db18e95d68aeadccb)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

Zoe served as a Trump impeachment manager and wrote bills to protect voting rights and curtail big money in politics.

After the insurrection, Zoe served with me on the January 6th Committee to find the truth and to hold Trump and his enablers accountable.

As we know, in Trumpworld no good deed goes unpunished.

The attacks on Zoe were relentless with false accusations and fake news to damage her name, her record, and her character.

_[**Zoe had to spend most of her campaign funds to defend herself. Let's not take any chances. = Country First, Adam | Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. = PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS Lofgren for Congress PO Box 913 San Jose, CA 95113 United States

_Begin Forwarded Message from Valerie Foushee:_
Hi Peter, do you have a minute to chat?
My favorite part of being a public servant has always been getting to have conversations with everyday folks like you. From my first elected role on Chapel Hill-Carrboro City Schools Board, to the North Carolina Senate, to now as your re-elected Congresswoman — I’ve remained committed to serving my neighbors, and that means listening to what my neighbors have to say.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood has done enough
body:
As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4e709907a50a4d93a2d6fbba45b7cc92&_e=wsghpIfOgIldYZQtdpfD8nZYzmrADV8g-K6Wa_czm_IqjIY7yyzqMtrK3kofPayrHPYJ1N-OLt48SMWhtNzZzuV0vUzYUwpd102M-F812NRluIj0ceSHG7tZDfsCgJYQ8TY7ER0d7xv52M9i6IIum3b7VMpClOGfqmwsWbGY7jt8KGdes45DriFkjUvkKG6PoSu6FWHqVTOwa0nbH09PGOOX-8Wko361YmOu-jwgbBdWxlMpxfTKCurzty0pHWrlvBiJ3Zh-lKQfVpIBaHz8lZbhhQyN-9h1ztjhkF6hr-gHv9trFBw4hA2Ge4yOAwHvapcW4NnF-Liz1_Z3CFTjU0p_U0MNoTH1JYabjgnm_oURPpZQ8gRkz59AdEgCrYpoQhXg-yKg37Gub8bm3_mAZw%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4e709907a50a4d93a2d6fbba45b7cc92&_e=wsghpIfOgIldYZQtdpfD8nZYzmrADV8g-K6Wa_czm_IqjIY7yyzqMtrK3kofPayrHPYJ1N-OLt48SMWhtNzZzuV0vUzYUwpd102M-F812NRluIj0ceSHG7tZDfsCgJYQ8TY7ER0d7xv52M9i6IIum3b7VMpClOGfqmwsWbGY7jt8KGdes45DriFkjUvkKG6PoSu6FWHqVTOwa0nbH09PGOOX-8Wko361YmOu-jwgbBdWxlMpxfTKCurzty0pHWrlijl6AjqMBmC1y0TDnXOgwYcdHLVbeX1nAy6mkuyCs4FifBtVl4FCQkncNgDHi7TAtHy-Lww8prB7bF4O0YFmcCFnLu8xpDVuNcHaw1qM8buLwKDSqac_yr7oCmXwZJxvkylMgzD2Q0C6goOC2JmQmA%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4e709907a50a4d93a2d6fbba45b7cc92&_e=wsghpIfOgIldYZQtdpfD8nZYzmrADV8g-K6Wa_czm_IqjIY7yyzqMtrK3kofPayrHPYJ1N-OLt48SMWhtNzZzuV0vUzYUwpd102M-F812NRluIj0ceSHG7tZDfsCgJYQ8TY7ER0d7xv52M9i6IIum3b7VMpClOGfqmwsWbGY7jt8KGdes45DriFkjUvkKG6PoSu6FWHqVTOwa0nbH09PGOOX-8Wko361YmOu-jwgbBdWxlMpxfTKCurzty0pHWrlh2LzTtxqMzysZ_tVX9gq4IYj8j1jCoVr2K8jiOd_pdBgGL-XjHiySmMUi2tcGDb9JNhW2bA1jqI5mY-49POuFt8FyaB8diwdkRpp2a1xmv0Wr4YNieqn1cmqLGVky5mA4E6BV0GY_qhuXUdbMokeSA%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4e709907a50a4d93a2d6fbba45b7cc92&_e=wsghpIfOgIldYZQtdpfD8nZYzmrADV8g-K6Wa_czm_IqjIY7yyzqMtrK3kofPayrHPYJ1N-OLt48SMWhtNzZzuV0vUzYUwpd102M-F812NRluIj0ceSHG7tZDfsCgJYQ8TY7ER0d7xv52M9i6IIum3b7VMpClOGfqmwsWbGY7jt8KGdes45DriFkjUvkKG6PoSu6FWHqVTOwa0nbH09PGOOX-8Wko361YmOu-jwgbBdWxlMpxfTKCurzty0pHWrl8GNJa6kv-MxBqn386_mX0oVzsJ3Ss0VcMcePvoTKwZWsML8ZhTo1SjsVJIekULFvMzmg5ByAKxBReLrJDhSKkTk8Hs6uqCoSdq9lidibvSdOk5ey8MbqbigrI27Vz0TKJK62wlZEjgnotHcZE93hgQ%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4e709907a50a4d93a2d6fbba45b7cc92&_e=wsghpIfOgIldYZQtdpfD8nZYzmrADV8g-K6Wa_czm_IqjIY7yyzqMtrK3kofPayrHPYJ1N-OLt48SMWhtNzZzuV0vUzYUwpd102M-F812NRluIj0ceSHG7tZDfsCgJYQ8TY7ER0d7xv52M9i6IIum3b7VMpClOGfqmwsWbGY7jt8KGdes45DriFkjUvkKG6PoSu6FWHqVTOwa0nbH09PGOOX-8Wko361YmOu-jwgbBdWxlMpxfTKCurzty0pHWrlh9Yhh854_dMavnJoRUsluAK4cnjCzlB81JRHQ07voAcs9DvW4SZfAYXTa3YEbZ4Oj8aixQZFODYcU46cUMRZ1I9KlkT7FYXIZDFnVAarL1k6ZbNyRRdK5izHp9-uzKGQNAhJHB6fnHHoBedM9ZOnyQ%3D%3D)
---
| | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4e709907a50a4d93a2d6fbba45b7cc92&_e=wsghpIfOgIldYZQtdpfD8nZYzmrADV8g-K6Wa_czm_IqjIY7yyzqMtrK3kofPayrHPYJ1N-OLt48SMWhtNzZzuV0vUzYUwpd102M-F812NRluIj0ceSHG7tZDfsCgJYQ8TY7ER0d7xv52M9i6IIum3b7VMpClOGfqmwsWbGY7jt8KGdes45DriFkjUvkKG6PoSu6FWHqVTOwa0nbH09PGOOX-8Wko361YmOu-jwgbBdWxlMpxfTKCurzty0pHWrloShNECs4XAi_ZgT6na-5R4ty9V8MgdjvLkTrPly4amu7fVVHcan31PIOEABTY3qpPIco3AMQUybNG9dx2m7xMCSyYgrZA-A4r0R_e6U02HpBeUooGc6-57L-AvUIP0K830IiDqRGXLZMFftsDnAPng%3D%3D)
---
**Kirk Cameron****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | [ **DONATE **](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4e709907a50a4d93a2d6fbba45b7cc92&_e=wsghpIfOgIldYZQtdpfD8nZYzmrADV8g-K6Wa_czm_IqjIY7yyzqMtrK3kofPayrHPYJ1N-OLt48SMWhtNzZzuV0vUzYUwpd102M-F812NRluIj0ceSHG7tZDfsCgJYQ8TY7ER0d7xv52M9i6IIum3b7VMpClOGfqmwsWbGY7jt8KGdes45DriFkjUvkKG6PoSu6FWHqVTOwa0nbH09PGOOX-8Wko361YmOu-jwgbBdWxlMpxfTKCurzty0pHWrlBg2DF5045uNDocMh5qUdmc89V3shoVnmjEPTM2OEvWw52npv03CKX_VgS526bACE1T2268kC0hDboraJeXTAwsLp_MexaH-cfbNMeMddbEQABc7VSOX_NJs-RE3hE83w1oVmgK_jViOu1UobLupvYA%3D%3D)

body:
Will you sign today?
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97563100/513842485/664783965?ms=112324_carepledge&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI1N2RmYS1kZGE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxpLlyuyC-t5-1CZ473vPsLFy9208vjOebrQHjtK_6A=&emci=bbf41bf8-8da7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=02b57dfa-dda9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=864787)
Dear Peter,
No matter who is in the White House, we’re committed to continuing the fight to pass the care agenda in communities all over the country.
But, the truth is that care workers and families across the country will **face additional challenges over the next four years.**
**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97563102/513842489/-803929654?ms=112324_carepledge&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI1N2RmYS1kZGE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxpLlyuyC-t5-1CZ473vPsLFy9208vjOebrQHjtK_6A=&emci=bbf41bf8-8da7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=02b57dfa-dda9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=864787)**
**[**_That’s why we need to come together and pledge to support our elected Care Champions and the care agenda in 2025 and beyond. Will you sign our pledge today? >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97563104/513842492/-803929654?ms=112324_carepledge&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI1N2RmYS1kZGE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxpLlyuyC-t5-1CZ473vPsLFy9208vjOebrQHjtK_6A=&emci=bbf41bf8-8da7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=02b57dfa-dda9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=864787)**
**********__[Sign the Care Pledge](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97563107/513842494/-803929654?ms=112324_carepledge&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI1N2RmYS1kZGE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxpLlyuyC-t5-1CZ473vPsLFy9208vjOebrQHjtK_6A=&emci=bbf41bf8-8da7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=02b57dfa-dda9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=864787)__**********
We need to make sure that our elected officials know how critical the care agenda is to Americans — _especially officials who have not yet championed care policies._
By signing this pledge, you’re joining the ranks of workers, caregivers, and advocates across the country who are committed to fighting to ensure **that all care workers are treated with dignity and respect and that families have access to the care they need.**

clean_body: Will you sign today? Dear Peter, No matter who is in the White House, we’re committed to continuing the fight to pass the care agenda in communities all over the country. But, the truth is that care workers and families across the country will face additional challenges over the next four years. ************** We need to make sure that our elected officials know how critical the care agenda is to Americans — especially officials who have not yet championed care policies. By signing this pledge, you’re joining the ranks of workers, caregivers, and advocates across the country who are committed to fighting to ensure that all care workers are treated with dignity and respect and that families have access to the care they need. Focusing on finding strength in our community is one of the ways we’re going to win a care agenda for all. ************** Thank you, Care in Action

name: George Whitesides
subject: The first day of school
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97563252/513843045/2104826962?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDZmZmYyMS1kZWE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nOwaLB0IULmpFv_wwjCo0UuNlgvod1Wq7yoxKnU_mq4=)
Peter,

I’ve spent the last week in Washington attending orientation and training for new members of Congress – it feels like the first day of school.

Before I dive into all I’ve been up to, I want to give a huge thank you for helping get us to this point. We ran a people-powered campaign, and I’m committed to working hard and rolling up our sleeves in Washington to solve problems for CA-27.

I took part in my first press conference with the pragmatic New Democrat Coalition. Together, we’re working toward solutions that benefit us all.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97563253/513843046/2104826962?refcode=em-11.23.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDZmZmYyMS1kZWE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nOwaLB0IULmpFv_wwjCo0UuNlgvod1Wq7yoxKnU_mq4=)
Here I am with the incoming new member class of the 119th Congress!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97563254/513843047/2104826962?refcode=em-11.23.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDZmZmYyMS1kZWE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nOwaLB0IULmpFv_wwjCo0UuNlgvod1Wq7yoxKnU_mq4=)
I ran into neighbors Laura Friedman (CA-30) and Luz Rivas (CA-29) as we crossed our fingers for the House lottery! Did you know that new members of Congress are put into a literal lottery system to determine where our office will be?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97563255/513843048/2104826962?refcode=em-11.23.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDZmZmYyMS1kZWE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nOwaLB0IULmpFv_wwjCo0UuNlgvod1Wq7yoxKnU_mq4=)
I’m proud to be one of seven incoming members of Congress from the STEM field. Our background will prove valuable as we work to make our communities better.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97563256/513843049/2104826962?refcode=em-11.23.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDZmZmYyMS1kZWE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nOwaLB0IULmpFv_wwjCo0UuNlgvod1Wq7yoxKnU_mq4=)
Speaking of science, I ran into my friend Bill Nye at the Capitol!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97563257/513843050/2104826962?refcode=em-11.23.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDZmZmYyMS1kZWE5LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nOwaLB0IULmpFv_wwjCo0UuNlgvod1Wq7yoxKnU_mq4=)
It’s been an eventful week, and there’s more to come. I look forward to receiving my committee assignments and getting to work for you. I couldn’t be more thankful for your continued support as I transition into Congress.

Thank you,

George

subject: We’re so proud of you, Fellow American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
There aren’t enough words to describe the extraordinary impact you have had on the House Republicans team throughout the years.
It’s an honor to have you on our team

|
---
| | | **We are SO proud to have YOU on our team!**

There aren't enough words to describe the extraordinary impact you have had on the House Republicans team throughout the years. **That 's why we are OFFICIALLY recognizing your devotion with the prestigious Golden Gavel Award!**

Congratulations, Friend!

---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6854f2bfa92547b5a7598263fac1d23e&_e=Ep2gHM0TCLk1jYShKK3p41kK3N5MGvinrOvM0ZBf38MuWbALmNst-xXTyz5bbRan_AwjXfHCyaY6sCFkAsEJsNI3tHFNEiik21mWpca6d-9KnXApPlu_4ZQHb9KhgR1VVgPUpLmpsew1aVzKHYqEUfA7bqZkXrO2joMeXWW0t8sbCaZcQvSBwXFbOkMGlyZ-JABzfoNuGMalwj1UUZ-1jC7jgsE97Z8fRD64cleaLJrMee4XH9l2Ubw25lYZLpFHfeb_ooXnpARsRGF-O6d5Rwz_H7w5g78RbWNS9BULHgMY4VfGILIB7b0ooWzGogJaFzvXYh7ZOsr5H9h1I2MAxsPeyp4K4l3G70XO7Qh1RCuewetiF1neYU5r075gFsrFXisspLYytB6LDhKRwsusv_AgVKK1vrqscyCgyhHT-9U%3D "Golden Gavel Award")

As a recipient of the Golden Gavel Award, you've shown that you understand the importance of standing up for what matters most. You know that our work is far from over and that we must continue to fight for a brighter future.

All that's left for you to do now is to ACCEPT YOUR PRIZE! **It 's available until MIDNIGHT tonight, so don't delay.**

| | Dear Fellow American,

America faces critical issues, and we need to know where you stand. Your voice matters in this pivotal time, and The Heritage Foundation has launched a **National Survey on President Trump 's Agenda** to gather insights from dedicated patriots like you.

**[Will you take a few minutes to complete the survey?](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=c41933ff25aa4a4f9b6980a3e0bdfc87&_e=SUR1oYZ9DAm5N4Y9NjX_Q9pPek3MpkS9A2-XKx0aBKnM7s6e0tr9s9ukfjdYGK-TNsDvVE1SKZTdar9ljoYZ71_SssiEHwJnZcsBnSqsKPv5De3KKNdCkBr8AM5YvcvEQKufrI0COQ0GttzLapcVjphMWLNe-iiY9unapXU7SfF8WpUNMaQ6__f51LGIqWx8uV73LtbHAPRrVVoxEJ-1eZryaDngog48SSdYbbYis9aMm8XPFleCH1s81yUjlsgxsh1UgUhV1UOiY9kePLP1lcOypPjLgv3wWD1mGvf-ujR3odorja7q6P3HhCHDW6H_26raw3u3AYfMUUPmzgycj6vY6csSG4M29e0Qece0CGLfUBwtzkH1qbLSwAka2iTh) **

Your answers will help Heritage as we work closely with President Trump's team to secure our borders, defend our freedoms, and restore America's prosperity. This is a unique opportunity to ensure your views are heard and represented in the ongoing battle to protect our country's values.

Take the survey now to share your thoughts on key issues, like:
* Stopping illegal immigration and securing our southern border
* Ending inflation and lowering prices on essentials
* Strengthening America's energy production and manufacturing
* Reducing government overreach and defending our fundamental rights

Your input will guide our strategy as we fight to protect what we all hold dear. Don't miss this chance to make an impact on the future of our nation.

subject: NEW Episode of Chris Farrell's On Watch Podcast w/ Dr. Shea Bradley-Farrell!
body: Dr. Shea discusses how Trump ends the Ukraine war in 24 hours, tackles the border crisis, and the future of US relations with Javier Milei's Argentina. [Action] CHRIS FARRELL'S ON WATCH PODCAST Dr Shea Bradley-Farrell: Trump Takes on Ukraine, Border Crisis, Argentina, MORE! [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71238&L=33997&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9GRzFxak9PYm1fST91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1hY3Rpb24rYWxlcnQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=870c8fc50da020ab5cf2a0cdd3a2e4bf4f5e2267fee27f1b91eebd94a7c5348f] Dr. Shea discusses how Trump ends the Ukraine war in 24 hours, tackles the border crisis, and the future of US relations with Javier Milei's Argentina. Shea Bradley-Farrell, Ph.D. is a strategist in national security and foreign policy and president of Counterpoint Institute for Policy, Research, and Education in Washington, D.C. Shea worked directly with the Trump administration (2016-2020) at the highest levels including at the White House, U.S. Department of State, and Senior Advisor Ivanka Trump, on multiple issues while serving as VP of International Affairs for Concerned Women for America. Shea also served as Professor and Subject Matter Expert (SME) for the Defense Security Cooperation University (DSCU) of the U.S. Department of Defense (DoD) for a Trump administration national security mandate; she possesses an active U.S. security clearance and executive-level certifications. Shea works with multiple nations around the world at the highest senior levels of government to build U.S. relations and promote U.S. interests and security. Previously, she worked in international development in the Middle East, Africa, and South America with donors including the U.S. Department of Labor, World Bank, Exxon, FedEx, and Kuwait Foundation for Advancement of Science. She is author of Last Warning to the West: Hungary’s Triumph Over Communism and the Woke Agenda (Dec. 2023), endorsed by multiple high-level conservative leaders. Shea regularly publishes Op-eds in outlets such as The Washington Times, Human Events, Daily Caller, The Hill, and many others. She is a weekly guest on TV news and radio and presents to venues all around the world such as Wilson Center for International Scholars, Foreign Services Institute, the Heritage Foundation, CPAC Hungary, and the Gulf Studies Symposium. Shea holds a Ph.D. and M.S. in International Development from Tulane University, where she was Adjunct Lecturer in the International Development Studies Program in 2015. She has served in a variety of other academic positions, including at the American University of Kuwait and George Mason University. subject: re: The House Majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | I need you to know the latest. Republicans are headed toward one of the smallest House Majorities EVER. Right now, a handful of House races are still up for grabs. name: Russ Vought
subject: Very big news to share
body:
It is with deep gratitude and a profound sense of purpose that I share this news: President Donald J. Trump has nominated me to return to his new a... | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10707461?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends, It is with deep gratitude and a profound sense of purpose that I share this news: President Donald J. Trump has nominated me to return to his new Administration as Director of the Office of Management and Budget. As the President noted in his announcement on Truth Social, ending weaponized government and restoring fiscal sanity are top priorities of his America First agenda that we will be aggressively fighting for on day one.
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=883aeb5620&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| I’m proud of the work we’ve done at the Center in the past four years, including our recent legal arguments making the case for restoring the President’s constitutional power to impound funds. It’s this kind of paradigm-shifting policy work and eagerness to never back down from a political fight, that have made the Center a permanent institution in Washington, _but not of Washington_.

To that end, we have spent the past several years building an unrivaled leadership team at the Center that will stay on to **continue and surpass the work we’ve accomplished so far**. Battle plans have been laid and I can assure you there is no organization in America better positioned, more capable, and more effective at fighting for our country than the Center for Renewing America.

Friends, the Left is preparing for battle and so too must we. Some will serve in President Trump’s Administration, many more will fight on the outside. All will be critical to winning the war. Don’t stay on the sidelines, make sure you stay in the fight.

Be on the lookout for updates in the coming months, in the meantime, there is unfinished business on behalf of the American people, and it’s an honor of a lifetime to get the call again.

Thank you, President Trump!

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Russ Vought
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=c96216fd6f&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=8b71128ba5&e=17913c7d6d)

300 Independence Ave. SE
Washington, DC 20003

You can [update your preferences](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=2ff3e2543d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&t=b&e=17913c7d6d&c=2ff3e2543d).

name: House Republican HQ
subject: WE LOVE YOU, PRESIDENT TRUMP!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
[SIGN THE LETTER]

|
---
| | | The attacks were relentless. The opposition was fierce. **But President Trump refused to back down.**

Despite the vicious attempts to discredit him, to destroy his reputation, and to undermine his agenda, he remained steadfast in his commitment to the American people.

And now, the American people have spoken, and President Trump will once again take the oath of office as President of the United States! 🎊

As a token of our appreciation for his unwavering dedication to our country, House Republicans are preparing a special thank you letter to President Trump.

_**[We invite you to join us in expressing our gratitude by signing this heartfelt note. Will you take a moment to say THANK YOU to President Trump?](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=6b07ce6f9c4a4ff2a3ec1f9bc4455ac1&_e=7k9UOYxY9PrxgDiplTIF1AWjly1oILTfzRX5jEIwMmOHHEHh23nyGidiz4ib1KD2H5gh1q7PvxDsLJXwE9kjewrfT93EyZ7w3yUb_AnU2jsorEiKZpQN4NieFN__3ntmWvIdQuyp1PVnAFpgbAOBbkZ3a1YKdTm433w-wiotylEv2yZC55FbVoA-go11vSK5VgHFQvCtdiT2oYI7Ro-bBVE6sHfrzuIoKVQRRx_wMJdrLhJdLlsJDWKS2r0qwotGGhKzKW2Sia0D3n5Koxr-R-2S8gkOHC03owkjHmF1B9eUIcfQxFCz8_BYTBbUFzQm0g-mU0jnDz42diVIQr5n2JxVVKa8fEih_1x8bJsrv3yTV79Nc0n7Xrs8A8fRkCsla8MZ9F6Z3s1nlYULsGd3MxlMRp9Bjc6rKrXKoNdb_4R1yWBkFFSDWs2hZj7xx5yM "We invite you to join us in expressing our gratitude by signing this heartfelt note. Will you take a moment to say THANK YOU to President Trump?")**_

---
**Dear President Trump,

God bless you!

After your historic victory, we wanted to send you this letter to make sure you feel our love, prayers, and gratitude.

So let us start by saying, from the bottom of our hearts, THANK YOU!

Thank you for always fighting for us and for giving a voice to everyday, hardworking Americans.

Thank you for standing up to the Radical Left lunatics that want to destroy our country and our America First movement.

And thank you for never surrendering, no matter what they threw at you.

We know that they were never really after you, they were after us- but you were standing in the way.

I hope you know that:

WE WILL NEVER STOP FIGHTING FOR YOU.

WE WILL NEVER STOP PRAYING FOR YOU.

AND WE WILL NEVER STOP LOVING YOU.

On this day, I hope you feel the love and prayers of the millions of patriotic Americans who will always have your back.

And I hope you know that our movement is more committed than ever to Making America Great Again.

They have tried before, and they will try again, but they will never stop our America First Movement.

Thank you, President Trump, for everything.

May God bless and keep you President Trump.

Sincerely,

[[YOUR NAME HERE]](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=6b07ce6f9c4a4ff2a3ec1f9bc4455ac1&_e=7k9UOYxY9PrxgDiplTIF1AWjly1oILTfzRX5jEIwMmOHHEHh23nyGidiz4ib1KD2H5gh1q7PvxDsLJXwE9kjewrfT93EyZ7w3yUb_AnU2jsorEiKZpQN4NieFN__3ntmWvIdQuyp1PVnAFpgbAOBbkZ3a1YKdTm433w-wiotylEv2yZC55FbVoA-go11vSK5VgHFQvCtdiT2oYI7Ro-bBVE6sHfrzuIoKVQRRx_wMJdrLhJdLlsJDWKS2r0qwotGGhKzKW2Sia0D3n5Koxr-R-2S8gkOHC03owkjHmF1B9dv51WXuEzcDSer2W6TiAkJPXPSzvMsL8YXIpnRi1K3xYqLPAFKEBEkEdJXlRBsOKE5k_O8PspmbDIRXPFsBk_OFsh6nhLPVdxfW-m_6UhXGIRHt8yT6RWDsWMwypbZ271b8KBGyl4wK1cEVeD8FnEc "\[YOUR NAME HERE\]")**

clean_body: [SIGN THE LETTER] | | | | The attacks were relentless. The opposition was fierce. But President Trump refused to back down. Despite the vicious attempts to discredit him, to destroy his reputation, and to undermine his agenda, he remained steadfast in his commitment to the American people. And now, the American people have spoken, and President Trump will once again take the oath of office as President of the United States! 🎊 As a token of our appreciation for his unwavering dedication to our country, House Republicans are preparing a special thank you letter to President Trump. "We invite you to join us in expressing our gratitude by signing this heartfelt note. Will you take a moment to say THANK YOU to President Trump?" Dear President Trump, God bless you! After your historic victory, we wanted to send you this letter to make sure you feel our love, prayers, and gratitude. So let us start by saying, from the bottom of our hearts, THANK YOU! Thank you for always fighting for us and for giving a voice to everyday, hardworking Americans. Thank you for standing up to the Radical Left lunatics that want to destroy our country and our America First movement. And thank you for never surrendering, no matter what they threw at you. We know that they were never really after you, they were after us- but you were standing in the way. I hope you know that: WE WILL NEVER STOP FIGHTING FOR YOU. WE WILL NEVER STOP PRAYING FOR YOU. AND WE WILL NEVER STOP LOVING YOU. On this day, I hope you feel the love and prayers of the millions of patriotic Americans who will always have your back. And I hope you know that our movement is more committed than ever to Making America Great Again. They have tried before, and they will try again, but they will never stop our America First Movement. Thank you, President Trump, for everything. May God bless and keep you President Trump. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: No More Blue’s Clues Pride Parades
body:
As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=30d753ebf6b04b4497049377511af165&_e=SASwejL57SGaxSJvaTl1VhMx5gq97C8TR-UHtmktkN98n740dfSCG1hyqblNzT1tS4l7D99DQ-8v6VXVP9P2qtQETm_62JOunt1IovnxNLzJN4d_CzLvVGCSc4Bmbu7noBHFqV4NUeihy2ocML07ovTq5q1D2GTQ48EypPthUXKU-AbA5JjBdOO_bAeMSNGD4cAwU2S2dEApcELOU1GpilCjOhz1t__TZmLRfR-8i4J13OuIbzWOHuC96s1u865RWln8KAJjjv1i3ec1iJBe_M-6J8sjAGbKO2pXRZyhi2y4OalQJ4wvlCQh8VryMb-WdPUyvy2seSYAFRAQ1imUEk1jDRhlKnfqe89K1LvlK2JxrW4gRpTRGCzdE0ESdL0Ydvy_1cm6B753Y4D0IRcFBtoG883_8jnsJ1WwPEg8Mc8%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=30d753ebf6b04b4497049377511af165&_e=SASwejL57SGaxSJvaTl1VhMx5gq97C8TR-UHtmktkN98n740dfSCG1hyqblNzT1tS4l7D99DQ-8v6VXVP9P2qtQETm_62JOunt1IovnxNLzJN4d_CzLvVGCSc4Bmbu7noBHFqV4NUeihy2ocML07ovTq5q1D2GTQ48EypPthUXKU-AbA5JjBdOO_bAeMSNGD4cAwU2S2dEApcELOU1GpilCjOhz1t__TZmLRfR-8i4J13OuIbzWOHuC96s1u865RdhsgffZF056we44cV-d_msgdilE8ZdPBu76VgTP11W06DvaUAwP4Dgxa4jk7zAMVFtirZnHG2vPuiUdFSA4D526XpqyunMGy7aY2nTYtVeND9eWz5o4nQby3-yXgM2z0MN_5o4Czq8L9F1jzb_2n7WPpJtuuzvyGBxhfoCPfjw8%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=30d753ebf6b04b4497049377511af165&_e=SASwejL57SGaxSJvaTl1VhMx5gq97C8TR-UHtmktkN98n740dfSCG1hyqblNzT1tS4l7D99DQ-8v6VXVP9P2qtQETm_62JOunt1IovnxNLzJN4d_CzLvVGCSc4Bmbu7noBHFqV4NUeihy2ocML07ovTq5q1D2GTQ48EypPthUXKU-AbA5JjBdOO_bAeMSNGD4cAwU2S2dEApcELOU1GpilCjOhz1t__TZmLRfR-8i4J13OuIbzWOHuC96s1u865RPIyRATcNLWaqPBPxaF7xEQeXPEq5aEkG_Zijg6IDdnxQtBmmudPRI4s_0pFuveSoaFekVyJRshoj-U4wzPcTHDDc-PX1RiSRLEkoVqCQhmYCSzWh82iSqyWNaiGyRbMfJxdscfV4Jfn7ycC-9XYo1xtar5_C5MhJG8x4IKc6-Us%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=30d753ebf6b04b4497049377511af165&_e=SASwejL57SGaxSJvaTl1VhMx5gq97C8TR-UHtmktkN98n740dfSCG1hyqblNzT1tS4l7D99DQ-8v6VXVP9P2qtQETm_62JOunt1IovnxNLzJN4d_CzLvVGCSc4Bmbu7noBHFqV4NUeihy2ocML07ovTq5q1D2GTQ48EypPthUXKU-AbA5JjBdOO_bAeMSNGD4cAwU2S2dEApcELOU1GpilCjOhz1t__TZmLRfR-8i4J13OuIbzWOHuC96s1u865RMaQtsPfWGeP8iWBt7jLHpJo86WcmlHvghUz8aBV3S6I278-Ae923ZbRcekL-wn3ZDIWfb2Ld1kR-VR99tHXTbR5BuSTxNeIRGoclm6o0Nbfm7_g-jZMqLIf4BlrW6uSRTo4wXEM_ZgFztIwwFHGHSNU0dT2YDDqr4_C3yZt87TM%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father

name: Patti Reilly
subject: Help me save my son
body:
Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.
Dear Fellow American,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f423a520aa6a4493bca4e51efe27494e&_e=tBG8SfvVsKsQ-LpmyJM44PIULBKFftwfWMEO7mBXvWlt1482UkG3u_n7vJCEDIHZaNb5VBqrLMThFrZeU2rQgrz47ZzrskkzPt4pqY_xTjd-xJBOB8x3-Nutxo_4DhO63cqaRyf9RNc1NoU43Kvl1M3WJvLXWYxsDftdlC6oUZFD5AyzZIXycZx1w8TVTxL2KqFXh7plagvbpGR7fF9gD07pXz_0gOagRYFBFX7hLTonPojNxSQlKDNNRUaCS_Pq0N8kRaim0_Lx20rX1h3-brGIxQnFSK4YpGvut9bOnO5g5uK8V8EMGENP3QEHFzhjEp3o0tbv4wuJeLcgDQxp85j8s5TE87gR9HuIbIXzazHvOrLMjf7r1vc6uQ2Z4Q5pWxOznDmjgzogg2usza1o_A%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f423a520aa6a4493bca4e51efe27494e&_e=tBG8SfvVsKsQ-LpmyJM44PIULBKFftwfWMEO7mBXvWlt1482UkG3u_n7vJCEDIHZaNb5VBqrLMThFrZeU2rQgrz47ZzrskkzPt4pqY_xTjd-xJBOB8x3-Nutxo_4DhO63cqaRyf9RNc1NoU43Kvl1M3WJvLXWYxsDftdlC6oUZFD5AyzZIXycZx1w8TVTxL2KqFXh7plagvbpGR7fF9gD07pXz_0gOagRYFBFX7hLTqbq4ZVxwp_FO53izaH77e7W5NImUuNyVlcfqOLQY3PpPvjsS5WpnxSeE1_rHqPIpAmkD3P85xITtoWPSerqhvtz5NJlG380PIVH12CmA3DCB4nNantPxy299sMnrzsqQVopTA8haLgIOL2F_qfjPRTp6qcag6DFXpwidluCGq8kQ%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f423a520aa6a4493bca4e51efe27494e&_e=tBG8SfvVsKsQ-LpmyJM44PIULBKFftwfWMEO7mBXvWlt1482UkG3u_n7vJCEDIHZaNb5VBqrLMThFrZeU2rQgrz47ZzrskkzPt4pqY_xTjd-xJBOB8x3-Nutxo_4DhO63cqaRyf9RNc1NoU43Kvl1M3WJvLXWYxsDftdlC6oUZFD5AyzZIXycZx1w8TVTxL2KqFXh7plagvbpGR7fF9gD07pXz_0gOagRYFBFX7hLTqZeRI29xHtrlLk25BSJQBagxQ1WaUrNF-X7wZihzfXsIGo6KWXjbxEhfImxNFU72CD3Pzzc8YSlWk9E9s4W8ZcSNim_P6k8tjSlcTBKoDD55VZVh7N264-a2v-_jliOlHWPPGQkHqztlweKsVmi4TMVNTIvVkJASiJcvoOUKS1-Q%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f423a520aa6a4493bca4e51efe27494e&_e=tBG8SfvVsKsQ-LpmyJM44PIULBKFftwfWMEO7mBXvWlt1482UkG3u_n7vJCEDIHZaNb5VBqrLMThFrZeU2rQgrz47ZzrskkzPt4pqY_xTjd-xJBOB8x3-Nutxo_4DhO63cqaRyf9RNc1NoU43Kvl1M3WJvLXWYxsDftdlC6oUZFD5AyzZIXycZx1w8TVTxL2KqFXh7plagvbpGR7fF9gD07pXz_0gOagRYFBFX7hLTqqJNfA78MeNrOkp2_0SLfRfC9YgtGcLgvKQMYbpvPX9SLjeaK13L3UG_1pM2KI2kP82XjvTQADbRlPt9EsZkHPwC4VKovKCjK9HzsHKrsztKeOZETTrGi9PbdGNkF7RrnVne-pJuh0YnhOl__Ch9Ta37bTeXlUBcBYtbwWfh-wvQ%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f423a520aa6a4493bca4e51efe27494e&_e=tBG8SfvVsKsQ-LpmyJM44PIULBKFftwfWMEO7mBXvWlt1482UkG3u_n7vJCEDIHZaNb5VBqrLMThFrZeU2rQgrz47ZzrskkzPt4pqY_xTjd-xJBOB8x3-Nutxo_4DhO63cqaRyf9RNc1NoU43Kvl1M3WJvLXWYxsDftdlC6oUZFD5AyzZIXycZx1w8TVTxL2KqFXh7plagvbpGR7fF9gD07pXz_0gOagRYFBFX7hLTrjvWAAKTx1I7oUHNCeVxDevzuTSM0ZyU99Qi6gHQ6L_WVLM3vC-QXbo2li9q-SJJp6iBw4U2SHN0_LCa2yM3_ya3iv4-WUIsn_66niyPJczJC81nNffkAzItHIl4nv6yFlOiGcYXU3XGTHwoiSYlTpFXGM68CgCTFNuqMRCfgtxw%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f423a520aa6a4493bca4e51efe27494e&_e=tBG8SfvVsKsQ-LpmyJM44PIULBKFftwfWMEO7mBXvWlt1482UkG3u_n7vJCEDIHZaNb5VBqrLMThFrZeU2rQgrz47ZzrskkzPt4pqY_xTjd-xJBOB8x3-Nutxo_4DhO63cqaRyf9RNc1NoU43Kvl1M3WJvLXWYxsDftdlC6oUZFD5AyzZIXycZx1w8TVTxL2KqFXh7plagvbpGR7fF9gD07pXz_0gOagRYFBFX7hLTpauEfCPSMJX_E_uAaBYDObdXQfTYuOvo_hqbS2oBLZ-HkokwbAkufnN4fjTHWw-USFVNgJMAQZG9N565Q89YP_bx7LkuGyMpjXk4WEjXq1z9hcsIzR98umfpCpaEZZdW_rSgC33nswGkUzcrBf340Ez7F6S8A-O_kCD33rPR7xig%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f423a520aa6a4493bca4e51efe27494e&_e=tBG8SfvVsKsQ-LpmyJM44JgFBjR_w3N0j70maCnNKReZnqg-gMfR5M6FxaYkwgwxYpmVsey20eQvVTgWlQhAqAslwAhEI6TXbKBDwdTBds8W9RScQUtv49hGFrE0_ywGlQktb7MAyvayiXp3nEQUm9Gecr7qp_zo6nK8N6IqZ8UvryVWn8S-66TxA1IqtPPIsrZkz4CQOE4v4rUKEQ81lA%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click here to [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=f423a520aa6a4493bca4e51efe27494e&_t=_GHtYjPrLK-8wKhE0cnMuUevq9Oc_ImDaM3oWOPNaioJHBAwdPES0gu20jMh5CBlzqbo1raVI05UISY4Leqhy3rOVjEJaB9TzYZWXj3kjR5yCkbLw89e0I3PjrgsVsX5)

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear. My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year! But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal. If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments. We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction. So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone: I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help. But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me. Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help. And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly. Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today. And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers. Gratefully, Patti Reilly P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Click here to

Thanks to patriots like yourself we defended our House Majority, flipped the Senate, and finally won back the White House. In honor of this consequential year House Republicans HQ has been crunching the numbers and figuring out what our average donation amount for 2024 is. | | | | "$21.33" Average Donation for 2024 | | | "Generic Button" | | | "Generic Button" Over this past year, we have been outraised and outspent - but we still pulled through thanks to patriots from across the country chipping in and sending a CLEAR message to the Radical Left. The work ahead of us is tremendous, but we can be one step closer to passing President Trump's America First agenda with your gift of just $21.33. "Chipping in $21.33 or more will make a huge difference as House Republicans continue fighting for President Trump’s agenda in Congress. Democrats are locked in and it’s going to take ALL of us to make sure every last drop of the swamp is drained."
